d33d391a-ae8f-588e-8dcb-02c4b1c579cc.name: Aberrant Resilience
d33d391a-ae8f-588e-8dcb-02c4b1c579cc.description: The aboleth is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

86f7df4b-92a3-5907-be55-84fe6b36ffc7.name: Amphibious
86f7df4b-92a3-5907-be55-84fe6b36ffc7.description: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

6567a051-20f1-5d18-ad89-b4af8dfb48c6.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)

78c94673-a149-501b-80d7-f932b01211e4.name: Probing Telepathy
78c94673-a149-501b-80d7-f932b01211e4.description: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

attributes.description: If a creature the aboleth can see communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires.

2f912cd8-b86f-5504-bb04-d510de54dd6f.name: Slime Pox
2f912cd8-b86f-5504-bb04-d510de54dd6f.description:
Characterized by the slimy pustules that erupt across the victim's body, _slime pox_ is a disease that infects creatures attacked by an aboleth or that come into contact with an aboleth's slime. Until the disease is cured, the infected creature can breathe air and water, can't regain HP except when underwater, and takes 6 (1d12) acid damage for every 1 hour it remains outside of water or without moisture applied to its skin. Every 24 hours that elapse, the infected creature must make a DC 16 CHA save. Each time a creature fails this save, it views the infecting aboleth more and more favorably, becoming the aboleth's doting and protective thrall after three failed saves.
The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive, but once a creature has acquired three of a kind, it no longer has to make this save, resulting in either the creature becoming a thrall of the aboleth or an autonomous - though infected - creature. _Slime pox_ can be cured only by the heal spell or similar magic.

attributes.description:

Every 24 hours that elapse, the infected creature must make a DC 16 CHA save. Each time a creature fails this save, it views the infecting aboleth more and more favorably, becoming the aboleth's doting and protective thrall after three failed saves.
The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive, but once a creature has acquired three of a kind, it no longer has to make this save, resulting in either the creature becoming a thrall of the aboleth or an autonomous - though infected - creature. _Slime pox_ can be cured only by the heal spell or similar magic.

d4d871d7-4cb9-5dcf-9be6-fafe0a510291.name: Slimy Skin
d4d871d7-4cb9-5dcf-9be6-fafe0a510291.description: The aboleth is coated in an otherworldly mucus. A creature that touches the aboleth or that hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be infected with _slime pox_ (see the Slime Pox trait).

attributes.description: The aboleth is coated in an otherworldly mucus. A creature that touches the aboleth or that hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be infected with _slime pox_ (see the Slime Pox trait).

536a97dd-1bb2-5272-8512-6c1f861c1053.description: The aboleth automatically detects every creature and trap within 60 feet of it, pinpointing the current location of each.

025ae8df-5498-5aad-876b-a93bbc1f860a.name: Multiattack
025ae8df-5498-5aad-876b-a93bbc1f860a.description: The aboleth makes three Tentacle or Psychic Bolt attacks. If two Tentacle attacks hit one target, the target must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or contract the _slime pox_ disease (see the Slime Pox trait).

fac1e4b2-6681-5793-95a5-8eaedc63c3bf.name: Psychic Bolt
fac1e4b2-6681-5793-95a5-8eaedc63c3bf.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 14 (3d6+4) psychic damage.

attributes.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 14 (3d6+4) psychic damage.

f4854d9f-b32e-54bb-8187-e4b2bc8cec39.name: Psychic Torrent
f4854d9f-b32e-54bb-8187-e4b2bc8cec39.description: The aboleth floods the minds of up to three creatures it can see within 60 feet of it with random and horrific memories from its eons-long life. Each target must make a DC 16 WIS save. On a failure, a creature takes 49 (14d6) psychic damage and is incapacitated until the end of its next turn, as its mind reels from the torrent of images, thoughts, and memories. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

56051a40-d36b-5cf0-af9c-1ba65365fedb.name: Slime Drain
56051a40-d36b-5cf0-af9c-1ba65365fedb.description: One creature infected with _slime pox_ within 30 feet of the aboleth takes 10 (3d6) acid damage, and the aboleth regains HP equal to the damage the creature takes.

15868fd8-371f-53ae-a662-1379c11e698f.name: Spellcasting
15868fd8-371f-53ae-a662-1379c11e698f.description:
The acolyte casts one of the following spells using WIS as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13).

- **At Will:** _light_, _thaumaturgy_
- **3/Day Each:** _bless_, _cure wounds_, _sanctuary_

2529b706-8b0a-5671-a0cc-ab430d7eb178.name: Acidic Vapors
2529b706-8b0a-5671-a0cc-ab430d7eb178.description: After the black dragon uses its Acid Breath, acid clings to its mouth, throat, and nostrils for a time, evaporating as the dragon breathes. While the dragon's Acid Breath is unavailable, acidic vapors surround it, and each creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 18 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

f7ab3876-723d-56ba-9418-8a2103c8d376.description: The dragon roars at up to two creatures of its choice within 120 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 16 CHA save or be vulnerable to acid damage until the end of its next turn. A target resistant to acid damage isn't resistant to it for the duration. A target immune to acid damage is still immune to it, even if the target fails the save.

36958193-7044-5fde-8498-1363a4454752.name: Frightful Presence
36958193-7044-5fde-8498-1363a4454752.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 16 WIS save or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's save is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

c417089a-9090-5af3-8a66-78317f0b586b.description: When the blue dragon hasn't exhaled its Lightning Breath, the electric charge builds up across its body. 79b4a672-558e-5d9b-96c1-3d0d473bcac2.name: Change Shape
79b4a672-558e-5d9b-96c1-3d0d473bcac2.description: The dragon magically transforms into a Beast or Humanoid that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form, which is Dragon. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it or is borne by the new form (the dragon's choice). It reverts to its true form if it dies. In a new form, the dragon retains its Legendary Resistance trait and its HP, ability to speak, proficiencies, and INT, WIS, and CHA scores, as well as this bonus action. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.

707bbe68-a742-517c-9d52-bb3804806dbf.name: Wing Attack (Adult Silver Dragon)
707bbe68-a742-517c-9d52-bb3804806dbf.description: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity save or take 15 (2d6+8) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

95ee3d05-fb9e-5196-a32b-efbc23274e55.name: Ice Walk
95ee3d05-fb9e-5196-a32b-efbc23274e55.description: The dragon can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. In addition, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement.

41b8f637-4938-572f-9a5e-cbb96902ee68.name: Numbing Chill
41b8f637-4938-572f-9a5e-cbb96902ee68.description: When the white dragon hasn't unleashed its Cold Breath, the cold builds up within it and ripples outward from it. While the dragon's Cold Breath is available, it emits a numbing chill, and each creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 19 CON save or its speed is reduced by 15 feet.

572b9d86-0666-546f-9104-61d0eeb89f07.name: Bite (Adult White Dragon)
572b9d86-0666-546f-9104-61d0eeb89f07.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (2d10+6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) cold damage.

71f6badc-f2f6-542f-bb42-96431b912d46.name: Cold Breath (Adult White Dragon)
71f6badc-f2f6-542f-bb42-96431b912d46.description: The dragon exhales an icy blast in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 CON save, taking 45 (10d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

2fedf274-0292-5e29-bd16-a666f11ab33f.name: Elemental Roar (Adult White Dragon)
2fedf274-0292-5e29-bd16-a666f11ab33f.description: The dragon roars at up to two creatures of its choice within 120 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 15 CHA save or be vulnerable to cold damage until the end of its next turn. A target resistant to cold damage isn't resistant to it for the duration. A target immune to cold damage is still immune to it, even if the target fails the save.

bf916b3a-aed5-5fbe-980a-9ddde0354ddb.name: Frightful Presence (Adult White Dragon)
bf916b3a-aed5-5fbe-980a-9ddde0354ddb.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 15 WIS save or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's save is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

178cbb63-2137-5e3c-85fe-a69974ea63ab.name: Air Form
178cbb63-2137-5e3c-85fe-a69974ea63ab.description: The elemental can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

637d5668-cc89-55fe-b5c7-dd38ad948cab.name: Cloud Camouflage
637d5668-cc89-55fe-b5c7-dd38ad948cab.description: The elemental's Stealth is 20 while in clouds, fog, or windy weather.

attributes.description: The elemental's Stealth is 20 while in clouds, fog, or windy weather.

7fbf521e-fb81-59a7-8d11-50c7df1db391.name: Elemental Nature
7fbf521e-fb81-59a7-8d11-50c7df1db391.description: The elemental doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The elemental doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

060fef44-68cf-5eeb-a51e-5161f3310577.name: Elemental Resilience
060fef44-68cf-5eeb-a51e-5161f3310577.description: The elemental is resistant to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, and unconscious conditions.

398fd5c2-b318-5c44-aa6e-a782b907f667.name: Lightning Bolt
398fd5c2-b318-5c44-aa6e-a782b907f667.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) lightning damage.

attributes.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) lightning damage.

e3e2e58f-4723-51d3-8b9d-6d5de274e495.name: Multiattack (Air Elemental)
e3e2e58f-4723-51d3-8b9d-6d5de274e495.description: The elemental makes two Wind Lash or Lightning Bolt attacks.

attributes.description: The elemental makes two Wind Lash or Lightning Bolt attacks.

fc8f2302-01d5-52b9-b455-49397f92bbfa.name: Thunderous Retreat
fc8f2302-01d5-52b9-b455-49397f92bbfa.description: When a creature the air elemental can see deals damage to it, the elemental can expel a crack of thunder and move up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Each creature within 5 feet of the space the elemental left must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or take 7 (2d6) thunder damage.

attributes.description: When a creature the air elemental can see deals damage to it, the elemental can expel a crack of thunder and move up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Each creature within 5 feet of the space the elemental left must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or take 7 (2d6) thunder damage.

17820ff4-fdbc-54fd-ab8d-af041283bcc1.name: Whirlwind
17820ff4-fdbc-54fd-ab8d-af041283bcc1.description: Each creature in the elemental's space must make a DC 13 STR save. On a failure, a target takes 18 (3d8+5) bludgeoning damage and is flung up 20 feet away from the elemental in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes an object, such as a wall or floor, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 13 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone. If the save is successful, the target takes half the bludgeoning damage and isn't flung away or knocked prone.

b3f1f705-360f-5075-a0a9-328dbb3011ff.name: Fey Resilience
b3f1f705-360f-5075-a0a9-328dbb3011ff.description: The ambush hag is resistant to the charmed and unconscious conditions.

attributes.description: The ambush hag is resistant to the charmed and unconscious conditions.

945a1971-c3f0-54ea-bace-7e0e3bc3c547.name: Mimicry
945a1971-c3f0-54ea-bace-7e0e3bc3c547.description: The hag can mimic Animal sounds and Humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 16 WIS (Insight) check.

dfb4dd81-f4c1-5ee1-9dd2-8ce51371682e.name: Spider Climb
dfb4dd81-f4c1-5ee1-9dd2-8ce51371682e.description: The ambush hag can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

4f249011-de95-509a-92ec-311a4bfc6298.name: Claw (Ambush Hag)
4f249011-de95-509a-92ec-311a4bfc6298.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d8+4) slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

The creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

85038c05-5661-5c44-b4d3-d1c3d98cfeac.name: Illusory Appearance
85038c05-5661-5c44-b4d3-d1c3d98cfeac.description:
The hag covers itself and anything it is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes it look like another creature of its general size and humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the hag takes a bonus action to end it or if the hag dies.
The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, the hag could appear to have smooth skin, but someone touching it would feel its rough flesh. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 20 INT (Investigation) check to discern that the hag is disguised.

2a4e86b4-d8f9-5c25-84b2-eb27b00c4d92.description: The ambush hag makes two Claw attacks or three Poison Spray attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

6997443d-e08a-57bf-b3a3-a26b26951c12.name: Poison Spray
6997443d-e08a-57bf-b3a3-a26b26951c12.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +8 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (4d8+4) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 STR save or be restrained until the end of its next turn.

8b5e84da-373c-5b7e-b3e1-bb6f8598bdae.name: Spellcasting (Ambush Hag)
8b5e84da-373c-5b7e-b3e1-bb6f8598bdae.description:
The ambush hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 16):

- **At Will:** _message_, _minor illusion_, _prestidigitation_
- **3/Day Each:** _blur_, _charm_, _hallucinatory terrain_ (as an action)
- **1/Day Each:** _hypnotic pattern_, _major image_, _seeming_

2416c3b5-0979-5027-9e08-72a969b43c56.name: Acidic Vapors (Ancient Black Dragon)
2416c3b5-0979-5027-9e08-72a969b43c56.description: After the black dragon uses its Acid Breath, acid clings to its mouth, throat, and nostrils for a time, evaporating as the dragon breathes. While the dragon's Acid Breath is unavailable, acidic vapors surround it, and each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

f6e96a57-6776-5ffc-ae2c-45f8a98185a1.name: Hallucinogenic Gas (Ancient Green Dragon)
f6e96a57-6776-5ffc-ae2c-45f8a98185a1.description: After the green dragon exhales its Poison Breath, wisps of poisonous gas laced with the alchemical taint that permeates the dragon's body linger around it. While the dragon's Poison Breath is unavailable, each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 21 WIS save or be terrified until the start of the creature's next turn, as the gas causes the creature to experience frightful hallucinations. A terrified creature is frightened, and its speed is reduced to 0.

A target immune to cold damage is still immune to it, even if the target fails the save.

a3112bfc-a4fd-59d8-b4df-f2a0ab83d880.description: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 24 DEX save or take 17 (2d6+10) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

5ecb4270-393e-5d56-ba2b-906af285a66f.name: Numbing Chill (Ancient White Dragon)
5ecb4270-393e-5d56-ba2b-906af285a66f.description: When the white dragon hasn't unleashed its Cold Breath, the cold builds up within it and ripples outward from it. While the dragon's Cold Breath is available, it emits a numbing chill, and each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 22 CON save or its speed is halved.

f81bf38f-0509-5211-89e9-e2e901a38a1c.description: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. WIS (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

754b208b-8c70-52c1-8cc2-0ed81f439024.name: Lacerating Swipe
754b208b-8c70-52c1-8cc2-0ed81f439024.description: The sphinx rears up on its hind legs, wings fluttering, and swipes in a wide arc with both its forepaws. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must succeed on a DC 18 DEX save or take 11 (2d10) slashing damage and suffer a bleeding wound. A creature with a bleeding wound loses 5 (1d10) HP at the start of each of its turns. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 18 WIS (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the bleeding creature receives magical healing.

2fcbc8c8-9dea-5c2f-b0de-ce8b1f5fe715.name: Multiattack (Androsphinx)
2fcbc8c8-9dea-5c2f-b0de-ce8b1f5fe715.description: The sphinx makes four Claw or Arcane Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

94e02ed7-4523-5f1a-af6e-8d1ff9621837.name: Roar
94e02ed7-4523-5f1a-af6e-8d1ff9621837.description:
The sphinx emits one of the following magical roars. Each roar is audible up to 300 feet away. When it roars, the sphinx chooses up to three creatures it can see within 120 feet of it to be affected by the roar. A creature that fails a save and is affected by an ongoing effect can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
- **Rumbling Roar.** This deep roar rumbles through each target's body, rattling it to its bones. Each target must succeed on a DC 18 CON save or deal only half damage with weapon attacks that use STR or DEX for 1 minute.
- **Terrifying Roar.** This shrill roar tugs at the self-preservation instincts within creatures. Each target must succeed on a DC 18 WIS save or be frightened for 1 minute. While frightened, a creature's speed is 0. If a creature fails the save by 5 or more, it is also paralyzed while frightened.
- **Thunderous Roar.** This booming roar slams against the chosen creatures. Each target must succeed on a DC 18 STR save or be pushed up to 15 feet away from the sphinx, knocked prone, and deafened for 1 minute.

dd436b98-9736-5f99-a4f4-fa14ef494ade.name: Spellcasting (Androsphinx)
dd436b98-9736-5f99-a4f4-fa14ef494ade.description:
The sphinx casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using WIS as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18). - **At Will:** _command_, _detect evil and good_, _thaumaturgy_ - **3/Day Each:** _dispel magic_, _restoration_, _tongues_, _zone of truth_ - **2/Day Each:** _freedom of movement_, _greater restoration_
1/day: _heal_

ca1d14d0-9f24-5f06-8d65-02c110e54804.description: The armor is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by _dispel magic_, the armor must succeed on a CON save against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 DEX save, taking 18 (4d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

150fd517-b4e3-5750-845b-d64625457f17.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (2d6+3) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage. 607e0d1d-f14f-5f1f-beb5-bca3cd0b35e1.name: Save for Later
607e0d1d-f14f-5f1f-beb5-bca3cd0b35e1.description: The ankheg quickly digs a small hole and stuffs one creature grappled by it into the hole, burying the creature and ending the grapple. A buried creature is restrained and unable to breathe or stand up. A creature, including the buried creature, can take its action to free the buried creature by succeeding on a DC 13 STR check.

65ac5ef8-140a-5e00-aa68-254061cf300b.description: One Large or smaller creature grappled by the ape is thrown up to 50 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 16 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

acff478d-7f5f-5d3f-89ca-ebc9efc058e5.name: Nature's Champion
acff478d-7f5f-5d3f-89ca-ebc9efc058e5.description: While the archdruid is conscious, wearing no armor, and in a natural environment or terrain, such as a desert, forest, or mountain, it adds its WIS modifier to its AC (included above). In addition, it is resistant to cold, fire, lightning, poison, and thunder damage.

f0ea3855-a9e8-5708-bfbf-4f78e991f5a1.name: Nature's Weapons
f0ea3855-a9e8-5708-bfbf-4f78e991f5a1.description: When the archdruid hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d8 cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder damage (included in the attack), the archdruid's choice.

01df8723-84f8-5366-abe9-78a125277cd5.name: Change Shape (Archdruid)
01df8723-84f8-5366-abe9-78a125277cd5.description: The archdruid magically transforms into a Beast that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form, which is Humanoid. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies. In a new form, the archdruid retains its HP, ability to speak, proficiencies, and INT, WIS, and CHA modifiers, as well as this bonus action. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form. The archdruid can choose to instead magically transform into an Elemental that has a challenge rating no higher than 6, or back into its true form. If it transforms into an Elemental, the archdruid can remain in that form for up to 6 hours then must finish a short or long rest before it can transform into an Elemental again.

f836640a-4480-58ef-9b00-7c4fda798132.name: Magic Resistance
f836640a-4480-58ef-9b00-7c4fda798132.description: The archmage has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The archmage has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

f2437351-3b44-5bb5-999a-26f45c707add.name: Magic Ward
f2437351-3b44-5bb5-999a-26f45c707add.description: While the archmage is conscious, wearing no armor, and not inside of an antimagic effect, it adds its INT modifier to its AC (included above). In addition, it is resistant to force damage.

7e3a71e5-828c-5199-a4f2-c22f3aa09b0f.name: Arcane Blast
7e3a71e5-828c-5199-a4f2-c22f3aa09b0f.description: _Melee or Ranged Spell Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 27 (4d10+5) force damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the archmage and knocked prone.

attributes.description: _Melee or Ranged Spell Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 27 (4d10+5) force damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the archmage and knocked prone.

a61b2328-bb0f-5e79-be8d-2feb8a0f8304.name: Burst of Magic
a61b2328-bb0f-5e79-be8d-2feb8a0f8304.description: The archmage releases a burst of swirling, multicolored, magical energy on a point it can see within 60 feet of it. Each creature within 20 feet of that point must make a DC 17 DEX save, taking 33 (6d10) force damage and 18 (4d8) acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage (the archmage's choice) on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

777c9159-d239-50de-83c4-0d71b2ea4a76.name: Counter Spell
777c9159-d239-50de-83c4-0d71b2ea4a76.description: When a creature the archmage can see within 30 feet of it casts a spell, the archmage can counter the spell, interrupting the casting. This reaction works like the counterspell spell with a +5 spellcasting ability check, except the archmage must always make the ability check, regardless of the spell's circle. The archmage has advantage on this check if the spell is on the Arcane source spell list.

8fe3edb3-cc29-53da-a3ea-40efbd7b6fde.name: Shimmering Step
8fe3edb3-cc29-53da-a3ea-40efbd7b6fde.description: The archmage teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Sparks of arcane energy appear at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

attributes.description: The archmage teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Sparks of arcane energy appear at the origin and destination when it uses this bonus action.

fbd98a4e-9339-5a4d-b1b3-f5671d1d966e.name: Spellcasting (Archmage)
fbd98a4e-9339-5a4d-b1b3-f5671d1d966e.description:
The archmage casts one of the following spells, using INT as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

- **At Will:** _detect magic_, _disguise self_, _mage hand_, _prestidigitation_
- **3/Day Each:** _charm_, _dispel magic_, _fly_, _invisibility_ (self only), _mirror image_
- **1/Day Each:** _dimension door_, _greater hold_, _wall of force_

c45e3ea4-ae56-5ba4-85a2-057055dcf516.name: Evasion
c45e3ea4-ae56-5ba4-85a2-057055dcf516.description: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a DEX save to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save, and only half damage if it fails.

attributes.description: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a DEX save to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the save, and only half damage if it fails.

5f394f17-f0a7-50ea-8cab-c2b1b9a6f116.name: Poisoned Weapons
5f394f17-f0a7-50ea-8cab-c2b1b9a6f116.description:
The assassin's weapons are coated in poison. When it hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 3d8 poison damage (included in the attack). In addition, at the start of each of its turns, the assassin can choose which of the following poisons is active on its weapons. The poison remains on the weapons until the start of the assassin's next turn.
- **Assassin's Friend.** A creature poisoned by a weapon coated with this poison takes an extra 4 (1d8) poison damage each time it takes damage while poisoned.
- **Buyer's Mercy.** A creature poisoned by a weapon coated with this poison falls unconscious while poisoned or until it takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.
- **Meddler's Fate.** A creature poisoned by a weapon coated with this poison has its speed halved while poisoned.

A poisoned creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

4a7841dc-d518-5fd0-bf03-6af03fa93ff4.description: The azer creates fire in a 15-foot line that is 1 foot wide, originating from a point the azer can see within 15 feet of it. This line is an opaque wall that is 3 feet tall and provides half-cover to creatures behind it. A creature that moves through the line takes damage as if it touched the azer. The line of fire lasts for 1 minute or until the azer uses this bonus action again.

457a8ab1-c5eb-54e1-b340-ff5adf073cef.name: Terrifying Luminance
457a8ab1-c5eb-54e1-b340-ff5adf073cef.description: When a creature that can see the balara's glowing ribcage starts its turn within 30 feet of the balara, the balara can force it to make a DC 14 WIS save if the balara isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failure, the creature is frightened until the start of its next turn, as the visions, fear, and pain of the last moments of several animals flash through its mind. While frightened, the creature's speed is reduced to 0, and it can't use reactions. Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the save at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the balara until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the balara in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

bd4cdac2-af5b-5f87-929b-ceda7b7a9a49.name: Demonic Resilience
bd4cdac2-af5b-5f87-929b-ceda7b7a9a49.description: The balor is resistant to cold and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

dd4c1354-24ec-5e35-aead-ef321892c247.name: Diving Assault
dd4c1354-24ec-5e35-aead-ef321892c247.description: If the balor is flying and moves at least 30 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 20 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the balor can make one Longsword attack against it as a bonus action.

The target must succeed on a DC 11 DEX save or lose one object it is wearing or carrying of the bandit's choice. The object must weigh no more than 10 pounds, can't be a weapon, and can't be wrapped around or firmly attached to the target, such as a shirt or armor.

d463a3d9-6c36-520d-9c21-3c701fea84c3.description: The bandit captain adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the captain must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

b65dc7a1-2f55-59bb-8f1e-237af2e24dc1.description: Each friendly bandit and thug under the bandit captain's command moves up to half its speed in a direction of the captain's choice. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

b3836934-7b2d-50fb-8618-720b59bddc07.name: Barbed Death
b3836934-7b2d-50fb-8618-720b59bddc07.description: When the barbed devil dies, its body withers, leaving behind a mass of spikes on the ground in a 10-foot radius centered on the devil's body. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute, and when a creature moves into or within the area, it takes 2d6 piercing damage for every 5 feet it travels.

0d2ea299-3cc8-5adc-bd5c-3edf832b6250.description: The devil is resistant to cold damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to fire damage and poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

d161224f-013f-5f0e-897e-48f562157523.name: Artistic Expression
d161224f-013f-5f0e-897e-48f562157523.description: The bard has one primary form of artistic expression, such as song, poetry, dance, fashion, paint, or similar. It is resistant to one type of damage associated with that artistic expression. For example, a bard expressing art through song or oration is resistant to thunder damage, a bard expressing art through paint is resistant to acid or poison damage (the bard's choice), and a bard expressing art through witty discourse or clever quips is resistant to psychic damage. This trait can't make the bard resistant to force, necrotic, or radiant damage.

e0c57dc7-3f24-5aac-bf24-90f1c7f0a391.name: Dissonant Outburst
e0c57dc7-3f24-5aac-bf24-90f1c7f0a391.description: Each creature within 30 feet of the bard and that can see or hear it must make a DC 15 WIS save. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) thunder damage and 7 (2d6) psychic damage and has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't have disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

8ce0308f-26a0-5ad3-a512-c8612a1106b8.name: Spellcasting (Bard)
8ce0308f-26a0-5ad3-a512-c8612a1106b8.description:
The bard casts one of the following spells, using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15).

- **At Will:** dancing lights, mage hand, message
- **3/Day Each:** _faerie fire_, _hold_, _suggestion_
- **1/Day Each:** _confusion_, _greater invisibility_

09a5e759-d70c-5387-af0e-96316e777d84.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Basilisk)
09a5e759-d70c-5387-af0e-96316e777d84.description: The basilisk is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The basilisk is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

c1b088f0-fdac-55f7-bcf9-2f92627d55fe.name: Petrifying Gaze
c1b088f0-fdac-55f7-bcf9-2f92627d55fe.description: When a creature that can see the basilisk's eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the basilisk, the basilisk can force it to make a DC 12 CON save if the basilisk isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failure, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is restrained. The restrained creature must repeat the save at the end of its next turn, becoming petrified on a failure or ending the effect on a success. The petrification lasts until the creature is freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic. Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the save at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the basilisk until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the basilisk in the meantime, it must immediately make the save. If the basilisk sees itself reflected on a polished surface within 30 feet of it and in an area of bright light, the basilisk mistakes itself for a rival and is affected by its own gaze.

c967c5fa-166c-5204-810b-26fa3a4d3f96.description: The bat releases a dizzying screech at one creature within 10 feet of it. If the target can hear the screech, it must succeed on a DC 12 CON save or be disoriented until the end of its next turn. When a disoriented creature moves, it moves in a random direction.

b1665a80-7325-52fd-8de6-9d6c215c079f.name: Show Mettle
b1665a80-7325-52fd-8de6-9d6c215c079f.description: While it can see a superior devil, such as a barbed devil, pit fiend, or similar, the bearded devil has advantage on saves against being charmed and frightened.

attributes.description: While it can see a superior devil, such as a barbed devil, pit fiend, or similar, the bearded devil has advantage on saves against being charmed and frightened.

3d23fdc8-b456-5308-aca0-f19d30a9a68f.name: Beard Spines
3d23fdc8-b456-5308-aca0-f19d30a9a68f.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 8 (2d4+3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, the target can't regain HP. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

While poisoned in this way, the target can't regain HP. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

1af493e3-6755-5066-ab5e-2dd494be2f72.name: Enhance Pain
1af493e3-6755-5066-ab5e-2dd494be2f72.description: The bearded devil enhances the pain in one creature it can see within 30 feet of it that is poisoned from the devil's Beard Spines attack or suffering an infernal wound from the devil's Glaive attack. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn, as it doubles over in pain.

attributes.description: The bearded devil enhances the pain in one creature it can see within 30 feet of it that is poisoned from the devil's Beard Spines attack or suffering an infernal wound from the devil's Glaive attack. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn, as it doubles over in pain.

e52e1850-f689-55ae-b0a0-110fbd58ef89.name: Glaive
e52e1850-f689-55ae-b0a0-110fbd58ef89.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (1d10+3) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than a Construct or Undead, it must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or lose 3 (1d6) HP at the start of each of its turns due to an infernal wound. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack, the damage dealt by the wound increases by 3 (1d6). Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 10 WIS (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing, provided the target is capable of regaining HP.

904ade1c-f420-5fa7-a70e-8a5a08a479e6.name: Lightning Absorption
904ade1c-f420-5fa7-a70e-8a5a08a479e6.description: Whenever the behir is subjected to lighting damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of HP equal to the lightning damage dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever the behir is subjected to lighting damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of HP equal to the lightning damage dealt.

61e1b9b3-8304-54d6-bb87-6c4bc149d514.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Behir)
61e1b9b3-8304-54d6-bb87-6c4bc149d514.description: The behir is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The behir is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

4f2c97e5-f64e-5033-b676-eb2e32f20726.name: Bite (Behir)
4f2c97e5-f64e-5033-b676-eb2e32f20726.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (3d10+6) piercing damage plus 27 (6d8) lightning damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (3d10+6) piercing damage plus 27 (6d8) lightning damage.

dbfbc0dd-95c1-55bd-9ea3-01e6cc1b283d.name: Constrict
dbfbc0dd-95c1-55bd-9ea3-01e6cc1b283d.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller creature. _Hit:_ 17 (2d10+6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller and the behir isn't already grappling a creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the behir can't Constrict another target.

32a300de-daa6-5d2c-a14b-253f2c5d40eb.name: Lightning Breath (Behir)
32a300de-daa6-5d2c-a14b-253f2c5d40eb.description: The behir exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The behir exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

558e11bb-71e2-5be0-99c1-772272553226.name: Multiattack (Behir)
558e11bb-71e2-5be0-99c1-772272553226.description: The behir makes one Bite attack and one Constrict attack. It can replace its Bite attack with a use of Swallow.

attributes.description: The behir makes one Bite attack and one Constrict attack. It can replace its Bite attack with a use of Swallow.

b7eb947a-0377-5b0a-9fb4-421bb4098f3e.name: Swallow
b7eb947a-0377-5b0a-9fb4-421bb4098f3e.description: The behir makes one Bite attack against a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the behir, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the behir's turns. A behir can have only one creature swallowed at a time. If the behir takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the behir must succeed on a DC 14 CON save at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the behir. If the behir dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

4a7e2679-bdf7-5bce-b8c5-76a822936750.name: Reckless
4a7e2679-bdf7-5bce-b8c5-76a822936750.description: At the start of its turn, the berserker can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

41c10dac-4ff1-5f83-b7ec-7bbcd060221a.name: Stalwart
41c10dac-4ff1-5f83-b7ec-7bbcd060221a.description: If the berserker starts its turn afflicted by an ongoing effect that allows for a repeated save to end the effect, such as the hold spell or the poison from an ettercap's Bite, the gladiator can make the save at the start of the turn instead of the end and has advantage on the save.

c39ea096-e28b-51bd-bc64-b67cc88259f6.name: Amphibious (Black Dragon Wyrmling)
c39ea096-e28b-51bd-bc64-b67cc88259f6.description: The black dragon can breathe air and water.

18813e84-b950-54b0-87a4-5af1b9392cc1.name: Pounce
18813e84-b950-54b0-87a4-5af1b9392cc1.description: If the dragon moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the dragon can make one Claw attack against it as a bonus action.

0349fbc7-4d76-5a1c-b77f-86cff0bfd6da.description: The dragon exhales acid in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 DEX save, taking 22 (5d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

a98501ff-557c-54a6-8978-06485017350f.name: Amorphous
a98501ff-557c-54a6-8978-06485017350f.description: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

30c60526-1340-5815-8251-1903fd6c211a.name: Corrosive Form
30c60526-1340-5815-8251-1903fd6c211a.description: A creature that touches the pudding or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage. Any nonmagical weapon made of metal or wood that hits the pudding corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Nonmagical ammunition made of metal or wood that hits the pudding is destroyed after dealing damage. The pudding can eat through a panel of nonmagical wood or metal in its space that is up to 2 inches thick in 1 round.

The pudding doesn't require sleep.

1dd000e9-e07e-5123-a468-25e5b0c578f7.name: Ooze Resilience
1dd000e9-e07e-5123-a468-25e5b0c578f7.description: The pudding is resistant to the restrained condition, and it is immune to exhaustion and to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, and prone conditions.

ba0b772a-3cbf-5b7a-8b8e-430d7f9c513c.name: Spider Climb (Black Pudding)
ba0b772a-3cbf-5b7a-8b8e-430d7f9c513c.description: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

b21d5bbd-1df1-5b84-a0f7-cf9fdbab3a87.name: Dampen Light
b21d5bbd-1df1-5b84-a0f7-cf9fdbab3a87.description: The black pudding dims the light around it. The radius of each light source within 60 feet of it is halved until the start of its next turn. The pudding can't use this action while in sunlight.

8dd84193-8cdb-5911-b78b-3dd8afeec6e2.description: The black pudding makes two Pseudopod attacks.

0f061a22-748c-5034-be7d-5f21d315bd58.name: Pseudopod
0f061a22-748c-5034-be7d-5f21d315bd58.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 6 (1d6+3) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage. In addition, nonmagical armor worn by the target is partly dissolved and takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC it offers. Armor reduced to an AC of 10 is destroyed.

1587d761-5f28-572d-b0f4-ddd4a22dba58.name: Split
1587d761-5f28-572d-b0f4-ddd4a22dba58.description: When a pudding that is Medium or larger is subjected to lightning or slashing damage, it splits into two new puddings if it has at least 10 HP. Each new pudding has HP equal to half the original pudding's, rounded down. New puddings are one size smaller than the original pudding.

6a0c5795-beb9-5a54-92dd-85d88c8e0402.description: The blink dog is resistant to the charmed and unconscious conditions.

9342506a-c7c5-55a6-bc86-18602c28d6ca.description: The blink dog has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the dog's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

118b3587-fc09-59a3-bba9-0cec67bc9214.description: The blink dog teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 40 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. Before or after teleporting, the dog can make one Bite attack.

d32460e9-325c-5b72-8616-11819e03895a.name: Instinct to Pursue
d32460e9-325c-5b72-8616-11819e03895a.description: The bloatblossom takes the Dash action toward an uninfected Humanoid it can see or sense.

d36a6651-b0de-5a10-9d51-7ec6b348ae26.name: Devilish Command
d36a6651-b0de-5a10-9d51-7ec6b348ae26.description:
The bone devil shouts one of the following commands at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 15 CHA save or obey the command. A lesser devil, such as a barbed devil or lemure, has disadvantage on this save.
- **Attack.** The target uses its reaction to make one melee or ranged attack (the devil's choice) against one creature the target can see within its weapon's range.
- **Beg for Mercy.** The target immediately falls prone and can't cast spells with verbal components on its next turn as it is magically compelled to speak pleas of mercy.
- **Flee.** The target uses its reaction to move up to its speed directly away from the bone devil. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks, but the target doesn't avoid damaging terrain, such as lava.

2f18c77a-4c32-579c-ba74-7eb5d53da6ae.name: Deadly Leap
2f18c77a-4c32-579c-ba74-7eb5d53da6ae.description: The bulette leaps up to 30 feet, diving onto a point it can see or sense within that range and landing on its feet with a thunderous crash. It occupies a space of its choice within 5 feet of that point, and each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 15 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage and 14 (4d6) thunder damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone. Any creature in the bulette's space is then pushed into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the bulette. If no unoccupied space is within range, the creature instead falls prone in the bulette's space.

0c7a6665-5a3c-5b1d-9270-e1a7e3ac0457.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage.

2a1dde2a-3815-5f62-bba8-326074565383.name: Multiattack (Centaur)
2a1dde2a-3815-5f62-bba8-326074565383.description: The centaur makes one Hooves attack and one Pike attack, or it makes three Longbow attacks.

attributes.description: The centaur makes one Hooves attack and one Pike attack, or it makes three Longbow attacks.

854ce568-94ae-5f8f-8757-16301f871c5f.name: Pike
854ce568-94ae-5f8f-8757-16301f871c5f.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (1d10+4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (1d10+4) piercing damage.

4a567bd7-e45f-50fc-a355-22d20fa302ea.name: Animate Chains
4a567bd7-e45f-50fc-a355-22d20fa302ea.description: The chain devil commands chains it can see within 60 feet of it that aren't being worn or carried to grab up to two creatures it can see within 10 feet of at least one commanded chain. Each creature must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or be restrained. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 15 STR check. The devil can have up to two creatures restrained in this way at a time. If it uses this bonus action to restrain a third, the effect ends on one of the previous targets (the devil's choice).

96cb123b-ac0c-52ab-bb92-54c9b6e3da16.name: Chain
96cb123b-ac0c-52ab-bb92-54c9b6e3da16.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 14 (4d6) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns, and the chain devil can't use the same Chain on another target.

9148fa9d-30be-5c31-99a9-2a8ff95fbb88.name: Unnerving Mask
9148fa9d-30be-5c31-99a9-2a8ff95fbb88.description: When a creature the devil can see starts its turn within 30 feet of the devil, the devil can command its mask to shift to look like one of the creature's departed loved ones or bitter enemies. If the creature can see the mask, it must succeed on a DC 15 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its turn.

attributes.description: When a creature the devil can see starts its turn within 30 feet of the devil, the devil can command its mask to shift to look like one of the creature's departed loved ones or bitter enemies. If the creature can see the mask, it must succeed on a DC 15 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its turn.

8f9e5eba-2e0d-5aba-939a-0cef08bf7d41.name: Bickering Heads
8f9e5eba-2e0d-5aba-939a-0cef08bf7d41.description:
The chimera is perpetually one step away from arguing with itself. A creature that can see the chimera can use a bonus action on its turn to appeal to one of the chimera's heads with bribes (dragon), praise (lion), displays of magic (goat), or other clever manipulation of a head's desires. The chimera must succeed on a DC 15 WIS save or succumb to that desire.
If the lion or goat head succumbs, the chimera has disadvantage on the next Bite or Headbutt attack it makes before the end of its next turn. If the dragon head succumbs, creatures caught in the chimera's next Fire Breath have advantage on the save, provided the chimera uses the breath within the next 1 minute. Once a head has succumbed to a desire, that head can't succumb again for the next 24 hours.

ad832d52-f4cd-5f0f-87ad-29f11bc7a788.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Chimera)
ad832d52-f4cd-5f0f-87ad-29f11bc7a788.description: The chimera is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

764387a5-2bb8-5c92-b112-952a783ff815.name: Multiple Heads
764387a5-2bb8-5c92-b112-952a783ff815.description: The chimera has three heads and is resistant to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and unconscious conditions.

23b5dd1a-5e3d-509f-90a6-76c68951f3f0.name: Bite (Chimera)
23b5dd1a-5e3d-509f-90a6-76c68951f3f0.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d8+4) piercing damage.

20b138e9-d9f5-583a-9d62-d2e64d105f91.name: Claws (Chimera)

59980563-6f5b-5997-b70f-a5dc453ea447.name: Fire Breath (Chimera)
59980563-6f5b-5997-b70f-a5dc453ea447.description: The dragon head exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 27 (6d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The dragon head exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 27 (6d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

a1a9c12f-a3eb-5e09-8cfe-af140de9cfad.name: Headbutt
a1a9c12f-a3eb-5e09-8cfe-af140de9cfad.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (1d12+4) bludgeoning damage.

1571c09a-f66d-5714-a594-85f0f4284bfc.name: Multiattack (Chimera)
1571c09a-f66d-5714-a594-85f0f4284bfc.description: The chimera makes one Bite attack, one Headbutt attack, and two Claws attacks, or it can make two Claws attacks and use Fire Breath, if available.

6cf03e3f-0a21-5644-8be4-2a7599353d85.name: Aberrant Resilience (Chuul)
6cf03e3f-0a21-5644-8be4-2a7599353d85.description: The chuul is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The chuul is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

896bbe61-cbb3-57eb-b739-79ebbbb70345.name: Amphibious (Chuul)
896bbe61-cbb3-57eb-b739-79ebbbb70345.description: The chuul can breathe air and water.

1012b213-c27b-5e08-b81a-d291a9933ff1.name: Sense Magic
1012b213-c27b-5e08-b81a-d291a9933ff1.description: The chuul senses and can pinpoint the location of magic within 120 feet of it. If it senses magic and can see the creature or object bearing the magic it senses, it sees a faint aura around that creature or object.

attributes.description: The chuul senses and can pinpoint the location of magic within 120 feet of it. If it senses magic and can see the creature or object bearing the magic it senses, it sees a faint aura around that creature or object.

d7e9e1e6-705b-5a7b-91ee-25809be5867b.name: Multiattack (Chuul)
d7e9e1e6-705b-5a7b-91ee-25809be5867b.description: The chuul makes two Pincer attacks.

attributes.description: The chuul makes two Pincer attacks.

300104d4-169c-5cd3-b741-40ca30b6ed81.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
300104d4-169c-5cd3-b741-40ca30b6ed81.description: One creature grappled by the chuul must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned for 1 minute. Until this poison ends, the creature is paralyzed. A poisoned creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

attributes.description: One creature grappled by the chuul must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned for 1 minute. Until this poison ends, the creature is paralyzed. A poisoned creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

69b82cf6-ceea-5981-b716-5f88d0ab8506.name: Pincer
69b82cf6-ceea-5981-b716-5f88d0ab8506.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 14). The chuul has two pincers, each of which can grapple only one target.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 14). The chuul has two pincers, each of which can grapple only one target.

8a7be80c-da92-5f57-a47c-aad003f690d1.name: Wild Reach
8a7be80c-da92-5f57-a47c-aad003f690d1.description: The chuul taps into ancient memories of magic and reaches toward nearby magic with an unpracticed grasp, releasing a burst of energy. Each creature within 15 feet of the chuul must make a DC 14 DEX save, taking 21 (6d6) damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a magic item, spell effect, or spellcaster is within 30 feet of the chuul, the burst is pure arcane energy, dealing force damage. If no magic is within 30 feet of the chuul, the burst pulls from the chuul's own life force, dealing necrotic damage. If the damage is necrotic, the chuul takes necrotic damage as if it succeeded on the save.

Each creature within 15 feet of the chuul must make a DC 14 DEX save, taking 21 (6d6) damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the damage is necrotic, the chuul takes necrotic damage as if it succeeded on the save.

7343aba0-a96b-52ac-83b8-2af9795e6557.name: Acid Absorption
7343aba0-a96b-52ac-83b8-2af9795e6557.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to acid damage, it takes no damage and instead regains HP equal to the acid damage dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to acid damage, it takes no damage and instead regains HP equal to the acid damage dealt.

2701c01c-7a18-5434-a6de-c83eff3120e2.name: Construct Nature (Clay Golem)
2701c01c-7a18-5434-a6de-c83eff3120e2.description: The golem doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The golem doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

280caf38-1406-5f9a-a33b-a418bf3fd0a9.name: Fire Weakness
280caf38-1406-5f9a-a33b-a418bf3fd0a9.description: When the clay golem takes fire damage, its body temporarily hardens like baked clay. Until the end of its next turn, the golem's speed is reduced by 10 feet, it can't use Mold Hand, and its AC becomes 18.

attributes.description: When the clay golem takes fire damage, its body temporarily hardens like baked clay. Until the end of its next turn, the golem's speed is reduced by 10 feet, it can't use Mold Hand, and its AC becomes 18.

2e7a6677-f509-5067-a5a5-ec5ee97fbfdf.name: Golem Resilience
2e7a6677-f509-5067-a5a5-ec5ee97fbfdf.description: The golem is immune to poison and psychic damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to exhaustion and to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

6ff84017-7c20-566a-8b4f-918589e4b4cc.name: Immutable Form
6ff84017-7c20-566a-8b4f-918589e4b4cc.description: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

52ab8559-9c8b-55d5-8fde-c434c3143f99.name: Magic Resistance (Clay Golem)
52ab8559-9c8b-55d5-8fde-c434c3143f99.description: The golem has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The golem has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

fa63ee28-5378-58af-ba33-b56876f91849.name: Magic Weapons
fa63ee28-5378-58af-ba33-b56876f91849.description: The golem's weapon attacks are magical.

attributes.description: The golem's weapon attacks are magical.

86f4db1e-4f3a-522c-8750-c28756f32ce2.name: Haste
86f4db1e-4f3a-522c-8750-c28756f32ce2.description: Until the end of its next turn, the golem magically gains a +2 bonus to its AC, has advantage on DEX saves, and can make a Slam attack as a bonus action.

attributes.description: Until the end of its next turn, the golem magically gains a +2 bonus to its AC, has advantage on DEX saves, and can make a Slam attack as a bonus action.

1bfbae03-8278-5fe5-a10e-184ad72b79f3.name: Mold Hand
1bfbae03-8278-5fe5-a10e-184ad72b79f3.description: The clay golem molds its hand into the shape of a weapon or back into a hand. The golem's Slam attack deals bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, depending on the type of weapon chosen, until the golem uses this bonus action again. For example, a hand shaped like an axe deals slashing damage.

31bb71ec-ffb8-540c-8c8f-b3fa87ea36a3.name: Multiattack (Clay Golem)
31bb71ec-ffb8-540c-8c8f-b3fa87ea36a3.description: The golem makes three Slam attacks.

e3398468-cddf-529c-a3f3-2a46b17c5fe1.name: Slam (Clay Golem)
e3398468-cddf-529c-a3f3-2a46b17c5fe1.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 21 (3d10+5) bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, as determined by Mold Hand. The target must succeed on a DC 16 STR save or suffer an effect based on the type of damage: knocked prone (bludgeoning), pushed up to 10 feet away from the golem (piercing), or its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn (slashing).

b622dfcb-ef7b-5f6d-8aa9-abaab34002da.name: Aberrant Resilience (Cloaker)
b622dfcb-ef7b-5f6d-8aa9-abaab34002da.description: The cloaker is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The cloaker is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

1140ac70-ca36-5d15-8ff4-9aed6b4324e2.name: Damage Transfer
1140ac70-ca36-5d15-8ff4-9aed6b4324e2.description: While attached to a creature, the cloaker takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down), and that creature takes the other half.

attributes.description: While attached to a creature, the cloaker takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down), and that creature takes the other half.

3daea794-a69d-5efc-bb48-b5bc3c139a7f.name: False Appearance (Cloaker)
3daea794-a69d-5efc-bb48-b5bc3c139a7f.description: While the cloaker remains motionless without its underside exposed, it is indistinguishable from a dark leather cloak.

attributes.description: While the cloaker remains motionless without its underside exposed, it is indistinguishable from a dark leather cloak.

983c9145-f3f4-570d-abca-73c8b84b2405.name: Light Sensitivity
983c9145-f3f4-570d-abca-73c8b84b2405.description: While in bright light, the cloaker has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 6 when perceiving by sight.

attributes.description: While in bright light, the cloaker has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 6 when perceiving by sight.

efa9b47f-9c7b-5f58-8dba-c18106f8bb4b.name: Bite (Cloaker)
efa9b47f-9c7b-5f58-8dba-c18106f8bb4b.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 18 (4d6+4) piercing damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, the cloaker attaches to it. If the cloaker has advantage on the attack roll, the cloaker attaches to the target's head, and the target is blinded and unable to breathe while the cloaker is attached. While attached, the cloaker can't make Bite attacks, and at the start of each of the cloaker's turns, the target takes 18 (4d6+4) piercing damage. The attached cloaker moves with the target whenever the target moves, requiring none of the cloaker's movement. It can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement on its turn. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the cloaker by succeeding on a DC 15 STR check.

1ab517c6-ecd7-5a37-a533-ff9afff9b0c6.name: Cloak of Shadows
1ab517c6-ecd7-5a37-a533-ff9afff9b0c6.description: While the cloaker isn't in bright light, it pulls shadows around itself, partially obscuring its form. For 1 minute or until the cloaker is hit with an attack, the cloaker's Stealth is 20, and creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the cloaker.

attributes.description: While the cloaker isn't in bright light, it pulls shadows around itself, partially obscuring its form. For 1 minute or until the cloaker is hit with an attack, the cloaker's Stealth is 20, and creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the cloaker.

66f4ee30-bb00-583f-b40a-421fbc5744b8.name: Moan
66f4ee30-bb00-583f-b40a-421fbc5744b8.description: The cloaker releases a deep, thrumming moan that rattles the nerves of all who hear it. Each creature within 30 feet of the cloaker that can hear the moan and that isn't an Aberration must make a DC 15 WIS save. On a failure, a creature takes 40 (9d8) psychic damage and is frightened until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened.

ddbfe7d6-dd4c-52d9-bc2e-9c04c12bd23c.name: Multiattack (Cloaker)

9cb334fb-9d0e-5af5-a49c-140a1c488c14.name: Tail (Cloaker)
9cb334fb-9d0e-5af5-a49c-140a1c488c14.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) slashing damage.

00aaec03-19cc-5961-81e3-c85eb41fc91d.name: Cloudsight
00aaec03-19cc-5961-81e3-c85eb41fc91d.description: The cloud giant can see through areas obscured by clouds, fog, smoke, and steam without penalty.

attributes.description: The cloud giant can see through areas obscured by clouds, fog, smoke, and steam without penalty.

9a47cdd6-3711-53c0-9f98-44c306aabaa8.name: Giant Attributes
9a47cdd6-3711-53c0-9f98-44c306aabaa8.description: The cloud giant is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

attributes.description: The cloud giant is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

a1186f42-2edb-5223-b758-912b6cf5491c.name: Heightened Smell (Cloud Giant)
a1186f42-2edb-5223-b758-912b6cf5491c.description: The cloud giant's Perception is 22 when perceiving by smell.

attributes.description: The cloud giant's Perception is 22 when perceiving by smell.

3f587abe-ee43-5a1d-968e-0d7113f8cd33.name: Cirrus Deflection
3f587abe-ee43-5a1d-968e-0d7113f8cd33.description: The cloud giant creates a bit of hardened cloud between it and an attacker, increasing the giant's AC by 4. To do so, it must be able to see the attacker.

attributes.description: The cloud giant creates a bit of hardened cloud between it and an attacker, increasing the giant's AC by 4. To do so, it must be able to see the attacker.

bbe50665-62d3-533e-88e6-39b3d948bcf1.name: Cloud-Coated Mace
bbe50665-62d3-533e-88e6-39b3d948bcf1.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (3d6+8) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) cold damage.

d8ea3f6d-dadd-58b2-a94e-5f647fb009d8.name: Cloud Cover
d8ea3f6d-dadd-58b2-a94e-5f647fb009d8.description: The cloud giant creates a 20-foot cube of clouds centered on a point it can see within 60 feet of it. The cube spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The cloud lasts for 1 minute, until the cloud giant dies, or until the cloud giant uses this bonus action again.

The cloud lasts for 1 minute, until the cloud giant dies, or until the cloud giant uses this bonus action again.

75f45644-ed50-5219-885e-200a45ee5a28.name: Condense
75f45644-ed50-5219-885e-200a45ee5a28.description: The cloud giant causes a 20-foot-radius sphere of cloud, fog, smoke, or steam centered on a point it can see within 60 feet of it to become as thick as mud, making the area difficult terrain for creatures moving through it. A creature that starts its turn in the hardened cloud must succeed on a DC 15 STR save or be restrained until the start of its next turn. The cloud remains condensed for 1 minute, until the cloud giant dies, or until the cloud giant uses this bonus action again.

d9161ce9-9b86-521f-ab90-ee7d5ff5bbdb.name: Wind Burst
d9161ce9-9b86-521f-ab90-ee7d5ff5bbdb.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +8 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 31 (5d10+4) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 STR save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the cloud giant and knocked prone.

e2aaf424-66c9-5a81-bffc-29d10f2b81b0.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Cockatrice)
e2aaf424-66c9-5a81-bffc-29d10f2b81b0.description: The cockatrice is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The cockatrice is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

da3f1b55-8b45-5ad7-9166-06bf09612c57.name: Serrated Beak
da3f1b55-8b45-5ad7-9166-06bf09612c57.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 6 (2d4+1) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 11 CON save or be restrained as it begins to turn to stone. The creature must repeat the save at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is petrified for 24 hours.

ebdaccbf-6fdd-5c40-a9e8-2d91ffa1959d.name: Shrieking Crow
ebdaccbf-6fdd-5c40-a9e8-2d91ffa1959d.description: When a creature the cockatrice can see within 30 feet of it attacks it, the cockatrice can let out a startling crow. The attacker must succeed on a DC 11 WIS save or have disadvantage on the attack roll.

attributes.description: When a creature the cockatrice can see within 30 feet of it attacks it, the cockatrice can let out a startling crow. The attacker must succeed on a DC 11 WIS save or have disadvantage on the attack roll.

04ce19ef-1f4c-521e-9272-b771a04ba161.name: Angry Mob
04ce19ef-1f4c-521e-9272-b771a04ba161.description: The commoner moves up to half its speed toward a creature it can see. Each friendly commoner within 30 feet of the commoner can use its reaction to join the angry mob and move up to half its speed toward the same target. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. If the initiating commoner is within 5 feet of the target, the target must make a DC 10 DEX save, taking 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. For each commoner after the first that participated in the angry mob and that is within 10 feet of the target, the damage increases by 1 as stones, clubs, sticks, and similar "weapons" fly at the target from all angles. Afterwards, each commoner after the first that participated in the mob can't use Angry Mob until it finishes a short or long rest.

7dd4454e-ce47-5f35-a609-e16aef5573e7.name: Club
7dd4454e-ce47-5f35-a609-e16aef5573e7.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.

487ea843-c476-5e40-8504-88afb31415f6.name: Sling
487ea843-c476-5e40-8504-88afb31415f6.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.

ab3b6bf7-d34e-5ec1-a805-64f2efdd6745.name: Acid Breath (Copper Dragon Wyrmling)
ab3b6bf7-d34e-5ec1-a805-64f2efdd6745.description: The dragon exhales acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 DEX save, taking 18 (4d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The dragon exhales acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 DEX save, taking 18 (4d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

aae1b29d-cb34-5ef5-99ae-cd82223f8694.name: Slowing Breath (Copper Dragon Wyrmling)
aae1b29d-cb34-5ef5-99ae-cd82223f8694.description: The dragon exhales slowing gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 CON save. On a failure, the creature can't use reactions, its speed is halved, and it can't make more than one attack on its turn. In addition, the creature can use either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both. These effects last for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

682f4f61-b108-5e79-961e-253b552c8460.name: Celestial Resilience
682f4f61-b108-5e79-961e-253b552c8460.description: The couatl is resistant to radiant damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.

attributes.description: The couatl is resistant to radiant damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.

65244550-3c99-5a51-890e-514f1a1cd2c5.name: Inscrutable (Couatl)
65244550-3c99-5a51-890e-514f1a1cd2c5.description: The couatl is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as divination spells or effects, such as scrying or detecting its location, that it refuses. WIS (Insight) checks made to ascertain the couatl's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

af9d7632-4523-5727-89f0-837da0b85775.name: Magic Resistance (Couatl)
af9d7632-4523-5727-89f0-837da0b85775.description: The couatl has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The couatl has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

239db422-009a-5db4-afe2-4c632d168987.name: Magic Weapons (Couatl)
239db422-009a-5db4-afe2-4c632d168987.description: The couatl's weapon attacks are magical.

attributes.description: The couatl's weapon attacks are magical.

c705d213-3400-522b-991e-e54dff22d541.name: Bite (Couatl)
c705d213-3400-522b-991e-e54dff22d541.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 8 (1d6+5) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 HP, the couatl can choose for the target to be stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining HP, and is unconscious while poisoned in this way.

451b2e03-2725-5948-b536-0544a301b2dd.name: Change Shape (Couatl)
451b2e03-2725-5948-b536-0544a301b2dd.description: The couatl magically transforms into a Large or smaller Beast or Humanoid that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form, which is Celestial. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it or is borne by the new form (the couatl's choice). It reverts to its true form if it dies. In a new form, the couatl retains its Celestial Resilience and Inscrutable traits and its HP, HD, ability to speak, proficiencies, and INT, WIS, and CHA scores, as well as this bonus action and the Rainbow Shield reaction. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.

4a21e655-5594-5f84-8372-25ce9e32b8a3.name: Constrict (Couatl)
4a21e655-5594-5f84-8372-25ce9e32b8a3.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d6+5) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15) if it is a Medium or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the couatl can't Constrict another target.

72ca08a6-0ab2-57c7-a2d7-4f8db564b38f.description: The couatl croons a soothing hiss at a creature it can sense within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) HP and is freed from any disease or poison.

attributes.description: The couatl croons a soothing hiss at a creature it can sense within 5 feet of it. The target magically regains 10 (3d6) HP and is freed from any disease or poison.

9f743c0f-a494-5b0f-a868-be4b7eb679cd.name: Multiattack (Couatl)
9f743c0f-a494-5b0f-a868-be4b7eb679cd.description: The couatl makes one Bite attack and one Constrict attack.

attributes.description: The couatl makes one Bite attack and one Constrict attack.

7e64a471-5d45-55ea-b50f-fa087bd1e286.name: Rainbow Shield
7e64a471-5d45-55ea-b50f-fa087bd1e286.description: When a creature the couatl can see within 30 feet of it, including itself, is targeted with an attack, the couatl can interpose a shield of rainbow-hued light between the attacker and the creature. The attacker has disadvantage on the attack roll. If the protected creature hasn't attacked or harmed another creature within the last minute, the attacker's attack misses instead.

f97eea0c-12ea-5bd0-9145-6b8d8e4d1774.name: Amphibious (Crab)
f97eea0c-12ea-5bd0-9145-6b8d8e4d1774.description: The crab can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The crab can breathe air and water.

5fd4c9ca-01f1-52b7-af8a-38fcf6f1d2ad.name: Claw (Crab)
5fd4c9ca-01f1-52b7-af8a-38fcf6f1d2ad.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage, and the crab attaches to the target. While attached, the crab can't attack, and at the start of each of the crab's turns, the target takes 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage. The attached crab moves with the target whenever the target moves, requiring none of the crab's movement. It can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement on its turn. A creature, including the target, can use its action to detach the crab.

d45a6a8c-f5b0-5380-aea1-1a02a749ef40.name: Pincer (Crab, Giant)
d45a6a8c-f5b0-5380-aea1-1a02a749ef40.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6+2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). The crab has two pincers, each of which can grapple only one target.

e059f818-b46c-56ab-a034-4490f32d2a20.name: Pincer Pinch
e059f818-b46c-56ab-a034-4490f32d2a20.description: One breathing creature grappled by the crab must succeed on a DC 12 STR save or be unable to speak or cast spells with verbal components and begin suffocating, as the crab squeezes the air from the target's lungs. This effect lasts until the grapple ends.

f4354175-9e33-5030-ab49-2fab6692b014.name: Amorphous (Crimson Jelly)
f4354175-9e33-5030-ab49-2fab6692b014.description: The crimson jelly can move through space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

73bf0643-f1b0-5ee5-bdbf-2f17b60173ed.name: Blood Sense
73bf0643-f1b0-5ee5-bdbf-2f17b60173ed.description: The crimson jelly can pinpoint, by scent, the location of creatures that aren't Constructs or Undead and that don't have all of their HP within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

attributes.description: The crimson jelly can pinpoint, by scent, the location of creatures that aren't Constructs or Undead and that don't have all of their HP within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

ae1091d6-a931-53ee-8826-f796db2fbaa0.name: Ooze Nature (Crimson Jelly)
ae1091d6-a931-53ee-8826-f796db2fbaa0.description: The crimson jelly doesn't require sleep.

attributes.description: The crimson jelly doesn't require sleep.

5fd18c18-7b99-5fbe-952c-dd65307e5f67.name: Ooze Resilience (Crimson Jelly)
5fd18c18-7b99-5fbe-952c-dd65307e5f67.description: The crimson jelly is resistant to the restrained condition, and it is immune to exhaustion and to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, and prone conditions.

attributes.description: The crimson jelly is resistant to the restrained condition, and it is immune to exhaustion and to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, and prone conditions.

4841d51c-f34e-5b7d-84ca-9b43bc360a74.name: Tainted Attacks
4841d51c-f34e-5b7d-84ca-9b43bc360a74.description: A creature that is reduced to 0 HP by a crimson jelly must succeed on a DC 9 CHA save or suffer one level of exhaustion. While a creature suffers from this exhaustion, it loses most of its memories aside from basic information about itself, such as its name and its capabilities, and it is wracked with nightmarish visions that include a crimson rune.

90b02316-645c-5fcf-b270-e812d4c302d1.name: Transparent
90b02316-645c-5fcf-b270-e812d4c302d1.description: While in an area of dim or bright light, the crimson jelly is invisible. While in darkness, creatures without darkvision can see the jelly's faint crimson glow.
