430b7508-1e28-5556-94f7-46211676435c.description: If the hivebound starts its turn afflicted by an ongoing effect that allows a repeated INT, WIS, or CHA save to end the effect, such as the hold spell, the hivebound can make the save at the start of the turn instead of the end and has advantage on the save.

29097328-58be-5142-9d71-7e174ff2c658.name: Spit Insect
29097328-58be-5142-9d71-7e174ff2c658.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or be pestered until the end of its next turn. A pestered creature has disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the pester ends.

82f73e21-b06f-5cb9-8f3c-d11d3eeac4a0.name: Swarm Breath
82f73e21-b06f-5cb9-8f3c-d11d3eeac4a0.description: The hivebound exhales stinging insects in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 10 (4d4) piercing damage and 17 (5d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A swarm of insects under the hivebound's control then forms in an unoccupied space in that area.

ed28ff4e-a1a5-5a37-acd6-c88c3f42bdab.description: The hobgoblin briefly studies one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. It has advantage on the next attack roll it makes against that creature before the start of the hobgoblin's next turn.

0f995d13-030d-5691-aeb7-0c6876340cc1.name: Unshakable Command
0f995d13-030d-5691-aeb7-0c6876340cc1.description: Each friendly creature within 30 feet of the hobgoblin commander can't be charmed or frightened while the commander isn't incapacitated.

ae26e004-6642-53df-bbde-3789954d61d6.name: Greatsword (Hobgoblin Commander)
ae26e004-6642-53df-bbde-3789954d61d6.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (2d6+2) slashing damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (2d6+2) slashing damage.

3245e52d-aa2c-5464-ab9c-7a23c7c97048.name: Martial Tactics
3245e52d-aa2c-5464-ab9c-7a23c7c97048.description:
The hobgoblin commander employs one of the following tactics:
- **Emboldening Shout.** One friendly creature within 30 feet of the hobgoblin commander that it can see gains 7 (2d6) temporary HP until the start of the commander's next turn.
- **Pressing Advance.** The commander moves up to half its speed and commands one friendly creature it can see within 30 feet of it to also move. The target can use its reaction to move up to half its speed in the direction of the commander's choosing. This movement for both creatures is unaffected by difficult terrain and doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

0ace3dbd-44b0-5ee4-844a-cad5c04b200b.name: Bound Construct
0ace3dbd-44b0-5ee4-844a-cad5c04b200b.description: The homunculus serves another creature as a familiar, forming a magic, telepathic bond with that willing companion. While the two are bonded and on the same plane of existence, the companion can sense what the homunculus senses and the two can communicate telepathically. While the homunculus is within 100 feet of the companion, it can use a reaction to deliver any spell the companion casts that has a range of touch. If the spell requires an attack roll, the homunculus uses the companion's spell attack modifier for the roll. While the homunculus is within 10 feet of its companion, the companion has advantage on INT (Arcana) and INT (Investigation) checks. At any time and for any reason, the homunculus can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.

3718f66c-2782-5d73-a471-e858ecf0c607.description: The homunculus doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

1a1d5be5-5ac4-55a4-b1c3-26e61361db34.description: The homunculus is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

If the save fails by 5 or more, the target is instead poisoned for 5 (1d10) minutes and unconscious while poisoned in this way.

On a failure, the target takes 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

61a37bc5-a6f3-5d97-bda2-467828bb7bc4.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +7 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 20 (5d6+3) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.

d3812e32-a328-5391-af91-47f8e0bd53ab.name: Tail (Horned Devil)
d3812e32-a328-5391-af91-47f8e0bd53ab.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (3d10+6) piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than a Construct or Undead, it must succeed on a DC 17 CON save or lose 10 (3d6) HP at the start of each of its turns due to an infernal wound. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack, the damage dealt by the wound increases by 10 (3d6). Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 WIS (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

5f9bebc1-1def-5e19-be69-5c39ca7438a8.description: If the horse moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Hooves attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the horse can make another Hooves attack against it as a bonus action.

f1c19b8a-d5e8-5f8f-89fb-d57fb339073b.description: If the horse's rider is subjected to an effect that would knock it prone or dismount it, the horse can shift its body to assist the rider. The rider has advantage on the check or save to avoid the effect.

1c41f383-c69f-5298-b922-4225de35a835.description: The husk demon can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

9476588e-2efb-51c9-b55b-6bb455034f21.description: The husk demon is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

821e18cf-0baa-5c97-830f-8f2523fad0f0.description: The husk demon has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

86f680c1-6dd5-5bec-83ab-0d592ba35eef.name: Life Drain
86f680c1-6dd5-5bec-83ab-0d592ba35eef.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage, and the husk demon regains HP equal to half the necrotic damage dealt. The target must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or its HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creatures finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.

58afed46-b242-5df4-b845-54db7bc472bb.name: Soul Feed
58afed46-b242-5df4-b845-54db7bc472bb.description:
The husk demon feasts on the light in the soul of up to two creatures it can see within 20 feet of it, causing one of the following effects. Each target must succeed on a DC 15 CHA save or suffer the chosen effect. A creature that fails the save against Soul Feed two rounds in a row suffers one level of exhaustion.
- **Happiness Feast.** The husk demon feasts on the target's happiness, causing the target to become crestfallen. The target has disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.
- **Hope Feast.** The husk demon feasts on the target's hope, causing the target to become despondent. The target has disadvantage on saves until the end of its next turn.
- **Motivation Feast.** The husk demon feasts on the target's motivation, causing the target to lose its ambitions and become apathetic. The target's speed is halved until the end of its next turn.

8309253a-17a0-5289-9abc-2786246200fb.name: Hold Breath (Hydra)
8309253a-17a0-5289-9abc-2786246200fb.description: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

attributes.description: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.

a536354a-1f0b-5e79-b7c6-2ecbef40add5.name: Multiple Heads (Hydra)
a536354a-1f0b-5e79-b7c6-2ecbef40add5.description:
The hydra has five heads and is resistant to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and unconscious conditions.
Whenever the hydra takes 25 or more damage in a single turn, one of its heads dies. If all its heads die, the hydra dies. At the end of its turn, it grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 10 HP for each head regrown in this way.

e29d0512-5655-5cee-8ccb-0c5fd4e5bf40.description: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra reaction that can be used only for opportunity attacks.

ea650fec-be97-59d4-875f-13a0dd5cb642.name: Wakeful (Hydra)
ea650fec-be97-59d4-875f-13a0dd5cb642.description: While the hydra sleeps, at least one of its heads is awake.

3dee02ee-ba53-58e8-9d38-a78be2ca2f97.name: Bite (Hydra)
3dee02ee-ba53-58e8-9d38-a78be2ca2f97.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (1d10+5) piercing damage.

01999d8b-4d0e-5883-ad3c-7ea533f9ca3d.name: Bloody Burst
01999d8b-4d0e-5883-ad3c-7ea533f9ca3d.description: The hydra squeezes the stumps of its severed heads, spraying blood and gore. Each creature within 5 feet of the hydra must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn and poisoned for 1 minute. A poisoned creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

9b1ca6b9-52c9-5e2c-9a54-26e0bccfc581.name: Multiattack (Hydra)
9b1ca6b9-52c9-5e2c-9a54-26e0bccfc581.description: The hydra makes as many Bite attacks as it has heads.

8731a9ae-456a-5ec0-876b-711ef404e1f9.name: Noxious Breath (Recharge Special)
8731a9ae-456a-5ec0-876b-711ef404e1f9.description: The hydra exhales poisonous gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 CON save, taking 40 (9d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. While the hydra has five or more heads, this action has a recharge of 6. The recharge range increases for each head the hydra has below five. For example, a hydra that starts its turn with two heads can recharge this feature on a 3, 4, 5, or 6.

5325a5e7-b1fa-502d-939d-512c36481afa.name: Cackling Chorus
5325a5e7-b1fa-502d-939d-512c36481afa.description: If three or more hyenas are all within 30 feet of each other, their cackling, grunts, whoops, and yips create a deafening chorus. A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of such a hyena must succeed on a DC 10 CON save or be deafened until the start of its next turn. The DC is equal to 8 plus the number of participating hyenas.

0ff8bea4-824c-57fa-81d8-a7dc07d59077.description: When the hyena reduces a creature to 0 HP, it can move up to half its speed and make one Bite attack. If it does, attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

d39a4c5d-ecaf-5df2-aeb6-2fdf3ee772a8.description: The devil is resistant to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to fire damage and poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

11e04ed8-252a-56a9-8065-8e06d393ca7c.name: Snow Walk
11e04ed8-252a-56a9-8065-8e06d393ca7c.description: The devil can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. In addition, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement.

9fa2a645-5190-5fe2-8c56-1fd91e607fff.name: Claws (Ice Devil)
9fa2a645-5190-5fe2-8c56-1fd91e607fff.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d6+5) slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) cold damage.

4a7a0a4f-e858-5fb3-acab-4320e0ffd388.name: Ice Shield
4a7a0a4f-e858-5fb3-acab-4320e0ffd388.description: When the ice devil or a friendly creature it can see is hit by an attack, the devil can create a magical barrier of ice to disrupt the attack. The target halves the damage from the attack.

9ac21554-af3d-50a8-b9c0-e7d11aadb318.name: Ice Wall
9ac21554-af3d-50a8-b9c0-e7d11aadb318.description:
The ice devil causes a wall of ice to magically rise from the ground at a point it can see within 60 feet of it. The wall is up to 30 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick. It can be any shape, as long as its base is connected to the ground. If the wall cuts through a creature's space when it appears, the creature is pushed to one side (the devil's choice). If a creature would be surrounded on all sides by the wall, it can make a DC 17 DEX save. On a success, it can use its reaction to move up to its speed so that it is no longer enclosed by the wall.
The wall lasts 1 minute, until the devil creates a new wall, or until the devil dies. Each 10-foot section of the wall has AC 5, 30 HP, is vulnerable to fire damage, and is immune to acid, cold, necrotic, poison, and psychic damage.

40421ee7-9826-54f9-a068-7ae7635f42ac.name: Death Burst (Ice Mephit)
40421ee7-9826-54f9-a068-7ae7635f42ac.description: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of viscous ice. Each creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 11 DEX save or be restrained by ice for 1 minute. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 11 STR check. The ice melts immediately if the restrained creature takes fire damage, freeing the creature.

af8fa345-8439-5255-b39d-b501c4b7badc.name: Change Shape (Imp)
af8fa345-8439-5255-b39d-b501c4b7badc.description: The imp magically transforms into a Medium or smaller Beast that has a CR no higher than its own or back into its true form, which is a Fiend. Without wings, it loses its flying speed. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

0d6a67cf-1223-59a8-9dbe-080dbb9eec7f.description: The insatiable brood can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the brood can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The brood can't regain HP or gain temporary HP.

2834acf2-c803-502d-b2dc-1ca49168e451.name: Igniting Mucus
2834acf2-c803-502d-b2dc-1ca49168e451.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, range 15/30 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) poison damage, and the target is covered in mucus that ignites after 1d4 rounds or if the target takes fire damage. An ignited creature takes 2 (1d4) fire damage at the start of each of its turns until a creature takes an action to douse the fire. A creature can remove the mucus before it ignites by taking an action.

52c2d291-8472-548f-b6b6-e76102530279.name: Claw (Insect, Giant Scorpion)
52c2d291-8472-548f-b6b6-e76102530279.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 6 (1d8+2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). The scorpion has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

686c6c17-06fc-5a1d-991e-4e7a6488fde9.name: Multiattack (Insect, Giant Scorpion)
686c6c17-06fc-5a1d-991e-4e7a6488fde9.description: The giant scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

da58805c-977b-5e60-8b0c-6146aa1de9b9.name: Reflexive Sting
da58805c-977b-5e60-8b0c-6146aa1de9b9.description: When a creature the scorpion can see attacks it while within 10 feet of the scorpion, the scorpion can whip its tail defensively at the creature. The attacker must succeed on a DC 12 DEX save or take 5 (1d10) piercing damage.

39d07d9a-7680-5914-96cf-d23649b4b945.name: Sting (Insect, Giant Scorpion)
39d07d9a-7680-5914-96cf-d23649b4b945.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 7 (1d10+2) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

0cb67f2f-84ca-5cb8-adad-fbeaa61d1e05.name: Assailing Pheromone
0cb67f2f-84ca-5cb8-adad-fbeaa61d1e05.description: When the wasp takes damage, it can release a scent perceptible only to other wasps. Each wasp within 10 feet of this wasp has advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.

88d0410a-d3c1-509e-881e-c7e0cbd1e3f7.name: Sting (Insect, Giant Wasp)
88d0410a-d3c1-509e-881e-c7e0cbd1e3f7.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 6 (1d8+2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 CON save or take 10 (3d6) poison damage. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 HP, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining HP, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

a294573b-f53b-5446-aba0-c8ea44d42c1f.name: Crawling Swarm
a294573b-f53b-5446-aba0-c8ea44d42c1f.description: A creature in the swarm's space is covered in crawling and buzzing insects. If the creature casts a spell with a somatic component, it must succeed on a DC 11 CON save or the spell fails to cast, expending the action required to cast it but not the spell slot or daily use.

e59d9de7-dbb0-5cb7-ab0b-ff416793de17.name: Swarm (Insect, Swarm of Insects)
e59d9de7-dbb0-5cb7-ab0b-ff416793de17.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can't regain HP or gain temporary HP.

d93fa9b5-229b-5473-8268-57734b49e08f.name: Bites (Insect, Swarm of Insects)
d93fa9b5-229b-5473-8268-57734b49e08f.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. _Hit:_ 10 (4d4) piercing damage, or 5 (2d4) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its HP or fewer.

04d4ec1f-57cf-52fd-b108-ff7074d75822.name: Elemental Nature (Invisible Stalker)
04d4ec1f-57cf-52fd-b108-ff7074d75822.description: The invisible stalker doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The invisible stalker doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

201304df-6518-53a8-811f-acd51f8c6f2f.name: Elemental Resilience (Invisible Stalker)
201304df-6518-53a8-811f-acd51f8c6f2f.description: The stalker is resistant to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, and unconscious conditions.

3f6ebc63-e3e6-5e35-9008-b9671392c9ff.name: Faultless Tracker
3f6ebc63-e3e6-5e35-9008-b9671392c9ff.description: At the end of each long rest, the invisible stalker can choose a creature it knows or has seen to be its quarry. A stalker summoned by another creature can choose only the quarry specified by its summoner, but the stalker also knows the location of its summoner while it continues to serve the summoner. The stalker always knows the direction and distance to its quarry, provided the two are on the same plane of existence.

The stalker always knows the direction and distance to its quarry, provided the two are on the same plane of existence.

687450dd-d77a-5f78-9813-9659e34081cb.name: Invisibility
687450dd-d77a-5f78-9813-9659e34081cb.description: The stalker is invisible. The condition's effect on DEX (Stealth) checks has been included in the above Stealth value.

23ac82c8-af2b-5af0-aa3c-5070f920fe89.name: Multiattack (Invisible Stalker)
23ac82c8-af2b-5af0-aa3c-5070f920fe89.description: The stalker makes two Slam attacks.

attributes.description: The stalker makes two Slam attacks.

6ccde5ef-2f50-521e-9e25-f14a2c57ccd7.name: Slam (Invisible Stalker)
6ccde5ef-2f50-521e-9e25-f14a2c57ccd7.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d8+4) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) cold damage. If the target is the stalker's quarry, the target must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or its speed is halved until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d8+4) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) cold damage. If the target is the stalker's quarry, the target must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or its speed is halved until the end of its next turn.

6f9595fe-f23a-58df-b281-8d5bc2cc6e74.name: Steal Breath
6f9595fe-f23a-58df-b281-8d5bc2cc6e74.description: The invisible stalker calls on the air in the lungs of one breathing creature it can see within 30 feet of it, causing the air to leave the creature. The target must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or be unable to speak or cast spells with verbal components until the end of its next turn. A creature that fails the save by 5 or more is also incapacitated and suffocating for the duration, as it coughs uncontrollably.

789f226e-bb7d-56fd-8d2e-0a09f59c17dd.name: Fire Absorption
789f226e-bb7d-56fd-8d2e-0a09f59c17dd.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains HP equal to the fire damage dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains HP equal to the fire damage dealt.

ba7f5244-c4c9-542d-8054-36bce6bcb2c6.name: Warrior Stance
ba7f5244-c4c9-542d-8054-36bce6bcb2c6.description:
At the start of each of its turns, the iron golem chooses one of the following fighting stances to adopt, which lasts until the start of the golem's next turn.
- **Retributive.** The next time the golem is hit by a melee weapon attack from a creature within 5 feet of it before the start of its next turn, the golem can slam its shoulder into the attacker as a reaction. The attacker must succeed on a DC 18 STR save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the golem and knocked prone.
- **Aggressive.** When the golem uses Multiattack, it can replace one additional Spear Arm attack with a Shield Bash attack. If it does so, its AC is reduced by 2 until the start of its next turn.
- **Defensive.** The golem's AC increases by 4, but it can't make Shield Bash attacks until the start of its next turn.

602625c0-a1cf-5956-9c31-03cf9b139f7f.name: Expel Poisonous Gas
602625c0-a1cf-5956-9c31-03cf9b139f7f.description: The golem vents poisonous gas from small holes across its body. Each creature within 15 feet of the golem must make a DC 18 CON save, taking 54 (12d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

3edc7924-a9d7-57e5-943d-10724e900ac2.name: Pack Tactics (Jackal)
3edc7924-a9d7-57e5-943d-10724e900ac2.description: The jackal has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the jackal's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The jackal has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the jackal's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

76166ac0-5365-5869-8663-1e2b44a3c5c0.name: Bite (Jackal)
76166ac0-5365-5869-8663-1e2b44a3c5c0.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 3 (1d4+1) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 CON save or contract shriveling fever disease, named for the way the disease causes an infected creature's muscles to shrivel. Until the disease is cured, the creature is poisoned, and at the end of each long rest, the infected creature must succeed on a DC 10 CON save or its STR score is reduced by 1d4. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest after the disease is cured. If the disease reduces the creature's STR to 0, the creature dies. A creature that succeeds on two saves recovers from the disease.

d0c90abc-4a0c-52e8-a716-34791358dbca.name: Chivalrous Presence
d0c90abc-4a0c-52e8-a716-34791358dbca.description:
The knight exudes a powerful presence. At the start of each of the knight's turns, it chooses one of the following presences, which lasts until the start of the knight's next turn.
- **Empowering Presence.** Each friendly creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the knight has advantage on the first attack roll it makes before this presence ends.
- **Protective Presence.** Hostile creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against friendly creatures within 5 feet of the knight.
- **Unwavering Presence.** Each friendly creature within 15 feet of the knight is resistant to the charmed and frightened conditions.

15ac3018-6d84-52aa-8d11-9a249b55ccb1.description:
The kobold witch casts one of the following spells, using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15). - **At Will:** _disguise self_, _druidcraft_, _guidance_ - **2/Day Each:** _command_, _ray of enfeeblement_
1/day: _bestow curse_

attributes.description:
The kobold witch casts one of the following spells, using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 15). - **At Will:** _disguise self_, _druidcraft_, _guidance_ - **2/Day Each:** _command_, _ray of enfeeblement_
1/day: _bestow curse_

7b7bbda5-44c2-53a8-be54-ebde47e35c3a.name: Witch's Cauldron
7b7bbda5-44c2-53a8-be54-ebde47e35c3a.description: The kobold witch ladles steaming brew out of a small cauldron it is holding and flings the substance at one friendly creature it can see within 15 feet of it. The target gains 5 (2d4) temporary HP until the start of the witch's next turn.

5258f6a7-da4c-562f-85e6-893160ec73c8.name: Amphibious (Kraken)
5258f6a7-da4c-562f-85e6-893160ec73c8.description: The kraken can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The kraken can breathe air and water.

46f53adf-545c-5353-8682-a9c0cdb2260b.name: Freedom of Movement
46f53adf-545c-5353-8682-a9c0cdb2260b.description: The kraken ignores difficult terrain, and magical effects can't reduce its speed or cause it to be restrained. It can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or being grappled.

0954216f-6a3a-5755-a7e7-b53a96d5a256.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Kraken)
0954216f-6a3a-5755-a7e7-b53a96d5a256.description: If the kraken fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

0093cf3f-1f0a-5191-be6f-a3a8a7f3c61e.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Kraken)
0093cf3f-1f0a-5191-be6f-a3a8a7f3c61e.description: The kraken is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The kraken is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

3a0567d3-8592-5bf9-8600-6d1bce868f5e.name: Siege Monster (Kraken)
3a0567d3-8592-5bf9-8600-6d1bce868f5e.description: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.

b735c851-1a42-5190-803d-068e65f3b017.name: Bite (Kraken)
b735c851-1a42-5190-803d-068e65f3b017.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +17 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 28 (4d8+10) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature grappled by the kraken, that creature is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the kraken, and it takes 42 (12d6) acid damage at the start of each of the kraken's turns. If the kraken takes 50 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the kraken must succeed on a DC 24 CON save at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the kraken. If the kraken dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

16f7647c-a7d4-51c5-890a-2994f59bb477.name: Fling
16f7647c-a7d4-51c5-890a-2994f59bb477.description: One Large or smaller object held or creature grappled by the kraken is thrown up to 60 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 22 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

attributes.description: One Large or smaller object held or creature grappled by the kraken is thrown up to 60 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 22 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

be28c81c-be76-5940-98df-f9b2645f7359.name: Ink Cloud
be28c81c-be76-5940-98df-f9b2645f7359.description: While underwater, the kraken expels an ink cloud in a 30-foot-radius centered on the kraken. The cloud spreads around corners, and the area is heavily obscured. Each creature in the area when it first appears must make a DC 22 CON save, taking 110 (20d10) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that enters the ink cloud for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 22 CON save or take 11 (2d10) poison damage and be poisoned until the start of its next turn. The cloud lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by a strong current.

d04e9c10-a2a7-57c8-839b-d56e95d8ec67.name: Lightning Storm
d04e9c10-a2a7-57c8-839b-d56e95d8ec67.description: The kraken magically calls bolts of lightning to strike up to two creatures it can see or sense within 120 feet of it. Each creature must make a DC 22 DEX save, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

cc746384-67af-57d0-9d5d-129e22204ff1.description: The kraken makes three Tentacle attacks. It can replace one Tentacle attack with a Bite attack.

620930b0-c26c-57f1-ae03-ef0bef7d9d86.name: Reel
620930b0-c26c-57f1-ae03-ef0bef7d9d86.description: The kraken pulls up to two creatures grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

fc5898d7-e591-5a1f-91e9-831bfc707c03.name: Swim (Kraken)
fc5898d7-e591-5a1f-91e9-831bfc707c03.description: The kraken swims up to half its swimming speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

9c6180db-06be-5d4f-aa34-44440196a481.name: Badlands Strider
9c6180db-06be-5d4f-aa34-44440196a481.description: Difficult terrain composed of sand, mud, or rock doesn't cost the lamia extra movement. In addition, the lamia leaves no tracks or other traces of its passage when moving through sandy, muddy, or rocky terrain.

6308444e-4176-5d98-ab05-0affa752fdf8.name: Intoxicating Gaze
6308444e-4176-5d98-ab05-0affa752fdf8.description: The lamia gazes at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CHA save or be charmed until the end of its next turn and cursed for 1 hour. While cursed, the target has disadvantage on WIS saves and on all ability checks.

622e6ca1-b231-5987-973e-79b9004f919a.description: The lamia makes two Hooves attacks and one Dagger attack, or it makes three Arcane Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

a2c9e761-5cc7-5e03-a164-e2966b43bb66.name: Aberrant Resilience (Lantern Hagfish)
a2c9e761-5cc7-5e03-a164-e2966b43bb66.description: The lantern hagfish is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The lantern hagfish is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

f2f4b674-9d3d-5c68-b463-2513e6145476.name: Bioluminescent Slime
f2f4b674-9d3d-5c68-b463-2513e6145476.description: The lantern hagfish sheds bright light in a 5- to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of feet equal to the chosen radius. The hagfish can alter the radius as a bonus action. In addition, the hagfish has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one other hagfish is within 5 feet of the creature and that other hagfish isn't incapacitated.

91337f1d-6b0a-51d6-8f0f-dcb95070c104.name: Void Dweller (Lantern Hagfish)
91337f1d-6b0a-51d6-8f0f-dcb95070c104.description: The lantern hagfish doesn't require air or sleep, and it is immune to the effects of Void terrain. In addition, it can swim through the Void as if through water.

attributes.description: The lantern hagfish doesn't require air or sleep, and it is immune to the effects of Void terrain. In addition, it can swim through the Void as if through water.

8a1b4760-2969-5d58-87a0-b7d80e7153b9.name: Bite (Lantern Hagfish)
8a1b4760-2969-5d58-87a0-b7d80e7153b9.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 3 (1d4+1) piercing damage. If the target is a prone creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, the hagfish can burrow into the creature's flesh. While burrowed into a creature, the hagfish can't attack, and at the start of each of the hagfish's turns, the target loses 3 (1d4+1) HP as the hagfish consumes it from the inside. The burrowed hagfish moves with the target whenever the target moves, requiring none of the hagfish's movement. It can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement on its turn. It does so after it consumes 6 HP worth of flesh from the target or the target dies. A creature, including the target, can take its action to extract the burrowed hagfish by succeeding on a DC 11 WIS (Medicine) check.

97facb69-15c1-5eb3-b722-bc5ff4037fd8.name: Slime Slide
97facb69-15c1-5eb3-b722-bc5ff4037fd8.description: While on a solid surface, the lantern hagfish slides up to 15 feet in a straight line and can move through the space of any creature without provoking opportunity attacks. Each space on that surface along that line is coated in slime until the start of the hagfish's next turn. Each creature in that line, and any creature that enters a slime-coated space for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 11 DEX save or fall prone.

6aa78431-b1d5-5ecf-95df-d534b403df63.name: Devilish Resilience (Lemure)
6aa78431-b1d5-5ecf-95df-d534b403df63.description: The devil is resistant to cold damage. In addition, it is immune to fire damage and poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

2238d75e-e6c9-5eea-af5a-31a9c5d31265.name: Devil's Sight (Lemure)
2238d75e-e6c9-5eea-af5a-31a9c5d31265.description: Magical darkness doesn't impede the lemure's darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn't impede the lemure's darkvision.

4ce06f2c-c873-5746-b6df-ad9fd463a828.name: Hellish Rejuvenation
4ce06f2c-c873-5746-b6df-ad9fd463a828.description: Unlike other outsiders, a lemure that dies in its home plane of the Hells is restored in a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its HP and becoming active again. The new body appears in the Hells within 1 mile of where it was slain. Only sprinkling holy water on the lemure's remains can prevent this trait from functioning.

5b76b0a3-8bc5-5633-8cce-f389e57213df.name: Fist (Lemure)
5b76b0a3-8bc5-5633-8cce-f389e57213df.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage.

cad426a2-3225-5836-b2dc-b82eefa3d596.name: Rippling Heat
cad426a2-3225-5836-b2dc-b82eefa3d596.description: The lemure exudes an aura of extreme heat for 1 minute. Each creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of the lemure and that isn't a devil must succeed on a DC 11 CON save or be weakened until the start of its next turn. A weakened creature has disadvantage on all attack rolls, and it deals only half damage with weapon attacks that use Strength. A creature that fails this save by 5 or more suffers one level of exhaustion. A creature that has suffered a level of exhaustion from this lemure's Rippling Heat can't suffer another level from this lemure's Rippling Heat for 24 hours.

03990d4c-4608-5e4c-bc2a-e9d7c5f59363.name: Arcane Mastery
03990d4c-4608-5e4c-bc2a-e9d7c5f59363.description: The lich can concentrate on two spells simultaneously. If it casts a third spell that requires concentration, the lich loses concentration on the oldest spell. If the lich is concentrating on two spells and loses concentration because of taking damage, it loses concentration only on the oldest spell.

d65cd354-e052-54d5-964e-e124d8a9bebb.name: Undead Resilience (Lich)
d65cd354-e052-54d5-964e-e124d8a9bebb.description: The lich is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

af3bb54b-ada4-59a3-ba49-37d0fc76e418.name: Absorb Spell
af3bb54b-ada4-59a3-ba49-37d0fc76e418.description: When a creature the lich can see within 60 feet of it casts a spell, the lich can absorb the spell's energy, countering it. This works like the counterspell spell, except the lich must always make a spellcasting ability check, no matter the spell's circle. Its ability check for this is +12. If it successfully counters the spell, the lich gains 5 temporary HP for each level of the spell.

a39e6855-ba39-53eb-b4c3-33c4f3ab5e88.name: Disrupt Life
a39e6855-ba39-53eb-b4c3-33c4f3ab5e88.description: Each creature within 20 feet of the lich that isn't Undead must make a DC 20 CON save, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The lich regains HP equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt.

attributes.description: Each creature within 20 feet of the lich that isn't Undead must make a DC 20 CON save, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The lich regains HP equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt.

0570b948-e4ce-56bd-bd58-9385c6d983e8.name: Disrupt Life (Costs 3 Actions)
0570b948-e4ce-56bd-bd58-9385c6d983e8.description: Each creature within 20 feet of the lich that isn't Undead must make a DC 20 CON save, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The lich regains HP equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt.

attributes.description: Each creature within 20 feet of the lich that isn't Undead must make a DC 20 CON save, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The lich regains HP equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt.

0bba2802-2b7c-5b0b-8fe1-c452c2125a89.name: Levitate
0bba2802-2b7c-5b0b-8fe1-c452c2125a89.description: The lich can rise or descend vertically up to 20 feet and can remain suspended there. This bonus action works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the lich doesn't need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

attributes.description: The lich can rise or descend vertically up to 20 feet and can remain suspended there. This bonus action works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the lich doesn't need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

c27ea185-cba9-5070-8ce8-e8880b421467.name: Lich's Gaze
c27ea185-cba9-5070-8ce8-e8880b421467.description: The lich fixes its gaze on one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 20 CHA save or be charmed or frightened (the lich's choice) until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The lich fixes its gaze on one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 20 CHA save or be charmed or frightened (the lich's choice) until the end of its next turn.

920cce36-0f52-5074-8949-afe0eb388187.name: Move
920cce36-0f52-5074-8949-afe0eb388187.description: The lich moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If the lich is levitating, it can use this legendary action to move horizontally, propelling itself with a blast of arcane power.

attributes.description: The lich moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If the lich is levitating, it can use this legendary action to move horizontally, propelling itself with a blast of arcane power.

a5b6279f-9e9d-5513-8b45-dd6069806c66.name: Multiattack (Lich)
a5b6279f-9e9d-5513-8b45-dd6069806c66.description: The lich uses Lich's Gaze. It then makes four Arcane Death Burst attacks, or it makes three Arcane Death Burst attacks and one Death-Infused Rod attack. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

attributes.description: The lich uses Lich's Gaze. It then makes four Arcane Death Burst attacks, or it makes three Arcane Death Burst attacks and one Death-Infused Rod attack. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

cfaf568a-0ab4-55b4-808c-6c135436caf9.name: Spellcasting (Lich)
cfaf568a-0ab4-55b4-808c-6c135436caf9.description:
The lich casts one of the following spells, using INT as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20).

- **At Will:** _detect magic_, _disguise self_, _mage hand_, _message_, _prestidigitation_
- **3/Day Each:** _charm_, _detect thoughts_, _dispel magic_, _invisibility_ (self only), _mirror image_
- **2/Day Each:** _bestow curse_, _cloudkill_, _dimension door_, _greater hold_
- **1/Day Each:** _plane shift_ (self only), _power word stun_, _wall of force_

6fa40c33-1c84-566c-bbfa-57544f8a193e.name: Heightened Smell (Lion)
6fa40c33-1c84-566c-bbfa-57544f8a193e.description: The lion's Perception is 18 when perceiving by smell.

attributes.description: The lion's Perception is 18 when perceiving by smell.

713ef540-9dfb-5ce9-b8f6-98e8cf3c2d16.name: Pack Tactics (Lion)
713ef540-9dfb-5ce9-b8f6-98e8cf3c2d16.description: The lion has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The lion has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

426473af-6c77-52ce-8676-1f9bd0bb9bff.name: Pounce (Lion)
426473af-6c77-52ce-8676-1f9bd0bb9bff.description: If the lion moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claws attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the lion can make one Bite attack against it as a bonus action.

9ed8e67c-ecf6-5321-ba97-e0326f734dd7.name: Running Leap
9ed8e67c-ecf6-5321-ba97-e0326f734dd7.description: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can long jump up to 25 feet.

attributes.description: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can long jump up to 25 feet.

b18d8b7e-2879-5c7a-a271-e7b7f2e2f6a5.name: Bite (Lion)
b18d8b7e-2879-5c7a-a271-e7b7f2e2f6a5.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage.

8e54acd5-b086-507d-afef-9463c0fc5b57.name: Multiattack (Lion)
8e54acd5-b086-507d-afef-9463c0fc5b57.description: The lion makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack.

attributes.description: The lion makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack.

59aaaf19-5eb7-588f-aea3-d3b8f08b5bdb.name: Rattling Roar
59aaaf19-5eb7-588f-aea3-d3b8f08b5bdb.description: The lion releases a bone-shaking roar in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or have disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The lion releases a bone-shaking roar in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or have disadvantage on attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

b33e9cd5-544f-502a-b469-2dfa64321c75.name: Construct Nature (Living Colossus)
b33e9cd5-544f-502a-b469-2dfa64321c75.description: The living colossus doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The living colossus doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

88842a72-58f3-57d9-bdff-9022603a40ca.name: Construct Resilience (Living Colossus)
88842a72-58f3-57d9-bdff-9022603a40ca.description: The living colossus is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

attributes.description: The living colossus is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

6f1086b2-aae8-5144-90fb-fd82de24987d.name: False Appearance (Living Colossus)
6f1086b2-aae8-5144-90fb-fd82de24987d.description: While the living colossus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue or monument of the individual it represents.

attributes.description: While the living colossus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal statue or monument of the individual it represents.

a3933ae1-b956-55a8-812e-afeb9b1074b6.name: Immutable Form (Living Colossus)
a3933ae1-b956-55a8-812e-afeb9b1074b6.description: The living colossus is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The living colossus is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

c6b281e5-ea4d-5bb4-ac51-423a16df8e93.name: Siege Monster (Living Colossus)
c6b281e5-ea4d-5bb4-ac51-423a16df8e93.description: The living colossus deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The living colossus deals double damage to objects and structures.

f4d04493-764c-508b-a58b-9eabfad18be2.name: Bolstering Spirit
f4d04493-764c-508b-a58b-9eabfad18be2.description: When a friendly creature the living colossus can see within 60 feet of it, other than itself, takes damage, the living colossus can share some of the life force of the spirit animating it with that friendly creature. The target gains 14 (4d6) temporary HP for 1 minute. If the target would take enough damage to reduce it to 0 HP, it instead regains 14 (4d8) HP.

The target gains 14 (4d6) temporary HP for 1 minute. If the target would take enough damage to reduce it to 0 HP, it instead regains 14 (4d8) HP.

a07d94e9-b71a-5451-8946-b07f5a21366c.name: Multiattack (Living Colossus)
a07d94e9-b71a-5451-8946-b07f5a21366c.description: The living colossus makes three Slam attacks, or it makes four Spirit Blast attacks.

attributes.description: The living colossus makes three Slam attacks, or it makes four Spirit Blast attacks.

b12092dd-031b-5c9a-a154-9c4aa680e0a5.name: Quake
b12092dd-031b-5c9a-a154-9c4aa680e0a5.description: The living colossus strikes the ground with its foot. Each creature within 30 feet of the living colossus must succeed on a DC 18 STR save or be knocked prone and have the air knocked from its lungs, if it is a breathing creature, until the start of the living colossus's next turn. A creature with the air knocked from its lungs can't speak or cast spells with verbal components. If a creature fails the save by 5 or more, it is also stunned until the start of the living colossus's next turn.

cf4bb688-4007-5129-9432-f0c684f04460.name: Slam (Living Colossus)
cf4bb688-4007-5129-9432-f0c684f04460.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +15 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 32 (4d10+10) bludgeoning damage.

e1e212e3-90ac-529a-9c3e-d7fdb088990b.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +11 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 24 (4d8+6) psychic damage.

d6d4c228-31f2-5bb5-ab15-1b737e53f8d2.name: Thunderous Clap
d6d4c228-31f2-5bb5-ab15-1b737e53f8d2.description: The living colossus slams its hands together, creating a thunderous wave in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 CON save, taking 59 (17d6) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

25fc1617-2e93-5904-9fbe-91919b3e71b5.name: Detach Tail
25fc1617-2e93-5904-9fbe-91919b3e71b5.description: When the lizard takes damage, it can detach its tail, reducing the damage by 2 (1d4), and immediately move up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

5814a230-1b0d-51ba-907a-3d74a454a36f.description: The lizardfolk makes one Bite attack and one Heavy Club attack, or it makes two Javelin attacks.

8f1af234-2ca5-572e-9938-cd4ced0efb82.name: Shoving Counter
8f1af234-2ca5-572e-9938-cd4ced0efb82.description: If a creature misses the lizardfolk with an attack and the lizardfolk is wielding a shield, the lizardfolk can shove its shield into the creature. The attacker must succeed on a DC 12 STR save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the lizardfolk and knocked prone.

e87fa2f4-fa97-5d53-8c0e-5b7368e18559.description: When a friendly lizardfolk the ruler can see within 30 feet of it is hit by an attack, the ruler can hiss out inspiring words to encourage the lizardfolk to keep going. The target gains 5 (2d4) temporary HP for 1 minute.

876abbea-d5a6-5c1d-8181-22239bb719c7.name: Leader's Challenge
876abbea-d5a6-5c1d-8181-22239bb719c7.description: The ruler hisses out a challenge or a threat (the ruler's choice) toward one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 13 CHA save. If the target fails the save against a challenge, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls against any creature other than the ruler until the start of the ruler's next turn. If the target fails the save against a threat, the ruler has advantage on the next attack roll it makes against the target before the start of its next turn.

cb724e0b-1be2-5ba7-80e8-3f197c5765ec.description: The shaman coats itself in poison until the start of its next turn. It takes 3 (1d6) poison damage. cf29c482-4783-50c6-b705-a2f09270cdf4.description: The mage makes three Dagger or Arcane Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

955183b1-d4e0-5092-992f-6bd0c4c7c08f.name: Spellcasting (Mage)
955183b1-d4e0-5092-992f-6bd0c4c7c08f.description:
The mage casts one of the following spells, using INT as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

- **At Will:** _detect magic_, _light_, _mage hand_, _prestidigitation_
- **3/Day Each:** _fly_, _mage armor_, _mirror image_
- **2/Day Each:** _fireball_, _haste_, _slow_
- **1/Day Each:** _cone of cold_, _greater invisibility_

e45e697a-21a1-5e28-b779-b1363b72d9d3.name: Death Burst (Magma Mephit)
e45e697a-21a1-5e28-b779-b1363b72d9d3.description: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of lava. Each creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 11 DEX save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the mephit, knocked prone, and catch on fire. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the creature on fire takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

d249b932-08fc-5022-92e3-3a15b7bafc20.name: Pyroclastic Burst
d249b932-08fc-5022-92e3-3a15b7bafc20.description: The mephit exhales an explosive blast of lava in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 11 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) fire damage and is pushed up to 10 feet away from the mephit and knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

0a9f0e2c-6068-5863-952e-2d019a666f83.name: Death Burst (Magmin)
0a9f0e2c-6068-5863-952e-2d019a666f83.description: When the magmin dies, it collapses into a Tiny cinder cone. On initiative count 20 after the magmin dies, the cinder cone erupts in a burst of fire and lava. Each creature within 10 feet of the cone must make a DC 11 DEX save, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried in that area are ignited.

dc6345c8-c6bb-5ead-bd83-e42599a55fdc.name: Hardened Magma
dc6345c8-c6bb-5ead-bd83-e42599a55fdc.description: While the magmin isn't ablaze, it is resistant to piercing and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks, and it is vulnerable to thunder damage.

1066bd85-2e36-5cd7-88fe-e20f048a1cac.description: The magmin sets itself ablaze or extinguishes its flames. While ablaze, the magmin sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.

0bd27dbf-1afb-543f-a2dc-8c1b715351a5.name: Trampling Charge (Mammoth)
0bd27dbf-1afb-543f-a2dc-8c1b715351a5.description: If the mammoth moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the mammoth can make one Stomp attack against it as a bonus action.

Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the mammoth can't use Trunk Grab on another creature.

9b00f610-2ea1-5383-9dc8-469855d7b650.description: The manticore can mimic Humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 13 WIS (Insight) check.

693dc84f-8ac9-552b-a688-ffd2f8b29023.description: The manticore is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

a8c3320b-1cd1-5804-8baf-79a27dc61bf4.description: The manticore has twenty-four tail spikes. Used spikes regrow when the manticore finishes a long rest.

63c3ad0f-65ad-5243-b07b-46ca8ec06e57.description: The manticore makes one Bite attack and two Claw attacks, or it makes two Tail Spike attacks. If both Tail Spike attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

f49b7f3c-a2f0-58b2-ae0c-8f533fc79bf7.description: When a creature the manticore can see hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it, the manticore can jab a spike into the attacker. The attacker must succeed on a DC 13 DEX save or take 5 (2d4) poison damage.

236354b4-015f-5833-a3d9-0db2706c77cc.description: The marilith is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

304a387f-9197-53f9-b06b-1c4c68594c50.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6+4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

deb22f0a-0b4f-5d8f-9ac5-e7190d544579.name: Marilith Tactics
deb22f0a-0b4f-5d8f-9ac5-e7190d544579.description:
The marilith shouts one of the following commands at up to two friendly creatures it can see within 30 feet of it:
- **March!** Each target can use a reaction to move up to half its speed in a direction of the marilith's choice. This movement is unaffected by difficult terrain and doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.
- **Protect Yourself!** Each target gains the marilith's Parry reaction until the start of the marilith's next turn.
- **Remember Your Training!** Each target has advantage on the next weapon attack roll it makes before the start of the marilith's next turn.

- **Protect Yourself!** Each target gains the marilith's Parry reaction until the start of the marilith's next turn.
- **Remember Your Training!** Each target has advantage on the next weapon attack roll it makes before the start of the marilith's next turn.

550c8453-c88e-5d54-aa2d-49c8c85578f3.name: Multiattack (Marilith)
550c8453-c88e-5d54-aa2d-49c8c85578f3.description: The marilith makes two Dagger attacks, two Mace attacks, and two Longsword attacks. It can replace two Dagger attacks with a Tail attack.

62154af7-2ad7-5532-8c0a-9a6582003da5.name: Parry (Marilith)
62154af7-2ad7-5532-8c0a-9a6582003da5.description: The marilith adds 5 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the marilith must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

cbfb3bbb-c4d1-5e25-a2ff-b3c6ad70a488.name: Tail (Marilith)
cbfb3bbb-c4d1-5e25-a2ff-b3c6ad70a488.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 20 (3d10+4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, the marilith can automatically hit the target with its Tail, and the marilith can't make Tail attacks against other targets.

60d7ce5a-7307-5b76-af1b-c3c62060f5a1.name: Teleport (Marilith)
60d7ce5a-7307-5b76-af1b-c3c62060f5a1.description: The marilith magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The marilith magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

723e0de2-1343-5165-9378-53fdb7256ba8.name: Tools of the Trade
723e0de2-1343-5165-9378-53fdb7256ba8.description: The master alchemist is proficient with alchemist's supplies and doubles its proficiency bonus for any ability check it makes with alchemist's supplies.

attributes.description: The master alchemist is proficient with alchemist's supplies and doubles its proficiency bonus for any ability check it makes with alchemist's supplies.

d1cdc46f-e69e-59c3-9a6c-a4fb63a61849.name: Explosive Flask
d1cdc46f-e69e-59c3-9a6c-a4fb63a61849.description: The master alchemist throws an explosive flask at a point it can see within 30 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 31 (7d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The master alchemist throws an explosive flask at a point it can see within 30 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 31 (7d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

024a84db-b65e-51c5-b132-116acfe1ffb9.name: Hasty Concoction
024a84db-b65e-51c5-b132-116acfe1ffb9.description:
_Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) acid, cold, fire, or poison damage (the alchemist's choice). The concoction then causes one of the following effects of the master alchemist's choice.
- **Disorienting Vapors.** Overly sweet-smelling, pink vapors erupt from where the concoction hit the target. The target and each creature within 5 feet of it must make a DC 15 INT save. When a creature that failed this save moves on its next turn, it moves in a random direction.
- **Poisonous Cloud.** An acrid-smelling, green gas pours out from where the concoction hit the target. The gas fills a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on the target. The gas spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. A creature that enters the gas for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn. The gas disperses at the start of the master alchemist's next turn.
- **Slick Floor.** A thick, purple foam bursts out from where the concoction hit the target. The floor within 10 feet of the target is coated in slick goop until the start of the master alchemist's next turn, when the foam dries. For the duration, when a creature moves through the area, it must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or fall prone. When the master alchemist makes a Hasty Concoction attack, it can choose to target a point on the ground it can see within 60 feet instead. If it does so, the concoction causes only one of the above effects centered on that point instead of dealing damage.

The attacker must succeed on a DC 13 DEX save or have disadvantage on the attack roll.

3fbe884b-73a8-51a1-bb32-d8e57dbdeb8c.name: Quick Creation
3fbe884b-73a8-51a1-bb32-d8e57dbdeb8c.description: The mechanist cobbles together various machine parts it is carrying and creates a Tiny Construct. The Construct obeys the mechanist's spoken commands. It uses the statistics of a solodron but it isn't a mechadron or part of the Plan. The mechanist can have up to two such Constructs under its control at one time. Each Construct remains for 1 minute, until the mechanist dies, or until the mechanist uses this bonus action again to dismiss one or both of them.

a8d49a3b-0abd-5567-9eac-86792897e2be.description: The medusa is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The medusa is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

132592a2-7975-5f3d-8f90-741201e9d071.name: Petrifying Gaze (Medusa)
132592a2-7975-5f3d-8f90-741201e9d071.description:
When a creature that can see the medusa's eyes starts its turn within 30 feet of the medusa, the medusa can force it to make a DC 14 CON save if the medusa isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. If the save fails by 5 or more, the creature is instantly petrified. Otherwise, a creature that fails the save begins to turn to stone and is restrained. The restrained creature must repeat the save at the end of its next turn, becoming petrified on a failure or ending the effect on itself on a success. The petrification lasts until the creature is freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic.
Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the save at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the medusa until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the medusa in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.
If the medusa sees itself reflected on a polished surface within 30 feet of it and in an area of bright light, the medusa, due to its curse, is affected by its own gaze. A medusa isn't resistant to its own gaze.

66a78d30-9bc0-5b65-8364-629a352224e1.description: The medusa can communicate with snakes as if they shared a language, and snakes can't be petrified by the medusa's Petrifying Gaze.

887bf347-a0b1-51fd-9bdf-32ae8af4c6d2.name: Harpoon
887bf347-a0b1-51fd-9bdf-32ae8af4c6d2.description: _Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d6+4) piercing damage, and the harpoon sticks in the target. While the harpoon is stuck, the merrow can't make Harpoon attacks against other targets, and the target and merrow can't move farther than 60 feet away from each other. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the harpoon by succeeding on a DC 14 STR check. Alternatively, the cord connecting the merrow to the harpoon can be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; HP 15; immune to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage), dislodging the harpoon into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target and preventing the merrow from using Recall Harpoon.

If the harpoon is stuck in a creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be pulled up to 20 feet toward the merrow. Regardless, the harpoon is dislodged and returned to the merrow's hand.

47ad2ef7-3c93-5c1a-9c8c-98982e5c9abc.description: While the minotaur skeleton remains motionless and prone, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate minotaur skeleton.

attributes.description: While the minotaur skeleton remains motionless and prone, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate minotaur skeleton.

489fc301-7a12-52b1-a131-908ec675e8f4.name: Labyrinthine Memories
489fc301-7a12-52b1-a131-908ec675e8f4.description: The minotaur skeleton has advantage on checks and saves to avoid becoming lost or to recall a path it has previously traveled.

attributes.description: The minotaur skeleton has advantage on checks and saves to avoid becoming lost or to recall a path it has previously traveled.

5d0331d0-09db-576d-84e7-95a065ebe9ad.name: Undead Nature (Minotaur Skeleton)
5d0331d0-09db-576d-84e7-95a065ebe9ad.description: The skeleton doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The skeleton doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

9eb0d9ff-446f-51da-9f81-b588a0f1d3e4.name: Undead Resilience (Minotaur Skeleton)
9eb0d9ff-446f-51da-9f81-b588a0f1d3e4.description: The skeleton is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

attributes.description: The skeleton is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

d7e54d28-eaa6-5b45-9054-25ad4e81fcf7.name: Counterattack
d7e54d28-eaa6-5b45-9054-25ad4e81fcf7.description: When a creature the minotaur skeleton can see hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it, the skeleton can make one Gore attack against the attacker.

f1a8eb25-9fe5-534a-b481-36d15449564a.name: Amphibious (Mire Fiend)
f1a8eb25-9fe5-534a-b481-36d15449564a.description: The mire fiend can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The mire fiend can breathe air and water.

5115e8ce-3c52-5aee-81d0-90eef1866e5e.name: Demonic Resilience (Mire Fiend)
5115e8ce-3c52-5aee-81d0-90eef1866e5e.description: The mire fiend is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

f087683a-5fc5-5d12-841a-0e9ed641c7d0.name: Magic Resistance (Mire Fiend)
f087683a-5fc5-5d12-841a-0e9ed641c7d0.description: The mire fiend has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

92f7d0cc-1b86-5736-8715-b38243bb94ee.name: Pack Tactics (Mire Fiend)
92f7d0cc-1b86-5736-8715-b38243bb94ee.description: The mire fiend has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mire fiend's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The mire fiend has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the mire fiend's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

041ac085-ea1d-58a9-a920-b3c167158071.name: Swamp Camouflage
041ac085-ea1d-58a9-a920-b3c167158071.description: The mire fiend's Stealth is 21 while in swampy terrain.

attributes.description: The mire fiend's Stealth is 21 while in swampy terrain.

1f0b951b-06f9-5f31-b803-31376c891bce.name: Acidic Retribution
1f0b951b-06f9-5f31-b803-31376c891bce.description: When the mire fiend takes damage, including any damage that reduces it to 0 HP, it can expel acid from its stinger in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 DEX save, taking 10 (3d6) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

dee84b66-d915-5083-a8eb-933dc2d86cf8.name: Mandibles
dee84b66-d915-5083-a8eb-933dc2d86cf8.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) slashing damage.

0cb7cec0-62a2-57cf-8be7-11b20ad98c8e.name: Stinger
0cb7cec0-62a2-57cf-8be7-11b20ad98c8e.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned.

99b835fe-c996-525a-80f9-8cea4e352ebb.name: Stunning Snap
99b835fe-c996-525a-80f9-8cea4e352ebb.description:
If the mire fiend has no creature grappled, it snaps its mandibles together with great force, creating a miniature sonic boom in a 30-foot cone.
Each creature in that area must make a DC 14 CON save. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) thunder damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

b8a9b412-ebd6-58e4-afd4-e179f40bbf9c.name: Aberrant Resilience (Mordovermis)
b8a9b412-ebd6-58e4-afd4-e179f40bbf9c.description: The mordovermis is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The mordovermis is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

9755d618-663f-5e83-8fa2-9dccdc1696f0.name: Sinuous Form
9755d618-663f-5e83-8fa2-9dccdc1696f0.description: The mordovermis can easily move through any opening large enough for a Small creature. It can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The mordovermis's destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

attributes.description: The mordovermis can easily move through any opening large enough for a Small creature. It can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The mordovermis's destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

e7dac946-0891-531d-afe0-be52dd223412.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Mordovermis)
e7dac946-0891-531d-afe0-be52dd223412.description: While in sunlight, the mordovermis has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 9 when perceiving by sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the mordovermis has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 9 when perceiving by sight.

4d4be10d-9c1c-5071-9810-ffd2900a0387.name: Consume
4d4be10d-9c1c-5071-9810-ffd2900a0387.description: The mordovermis wraps its body around an incapacitated creature. The target must make a DC 13 STR save. On a failure, the target takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage and 9 (2d8) acid damage and is grappled (escape DC 13). On a success, the target takes half the damage and isn't grappled. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 18 (4d8) acid damage at the start of each of its turns, and the mordovermis can't use Consume.

76754575-427c-5214-b8b4-975c55ba5330.name: Multiattack (Mordovermis)
76754575-427c-5214-b8b4-975c55ba5330.description: The mordovermis makes two Sting attacks. If both Sting attacks hit one Large or smaller creature, the mordovermis can use Consume on the creature without the need for the target to be incapacitated.

02859bd9-ad70-5e38-be43-4053e9f07f3f.description: The mordovermis focuses its gaze on one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 WIS save or be charmed until the end of its next turn. While charmed, the creature is incapacitated and has a speed of 0.

4b622adc-36df-5719-b3a2-917779fc3ab0.description: The mummy makes two Rotting Fist attacks. If both attacks hit one creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, the target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be cursed with mummy rot (see the Mummy Rot sidebar).

e11489fb-8a1f-5ed1-b688-2b6ff9c2ab34.description: A destroyed mummy lord gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, regaining all its HP and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the mummy lord's heart.

dcf41564-5055-5fee-9ee6-46f760e298bc.description: The mummy lord sends necrotic power into up to three friendly Undead it can see, other than itself, within 30 feet of it. Each target regains 14 (4d6) HP and has advantage on the next attack roll it makes before the start of the mummy lord's next turn.

5e179f29-ebfe-5770-b789-5a7f3615d511.description: The mummy lord automatically detects every creature that isn't a Construct or Undead within 30 feet of it, pinpointing the current location of each.

Each target must succeed on a DC 17 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its next turn. If the target fails the save by 5 or more, it is also paralyzed for the same duration.

84caa56c-4c0e-57f0-b396-c05b3b0b0f7a.name: Multiattack (Mummy Lord)
84caa56c-4c0e-57f0-b396-c05b3b0b0f7a.description: The mummy makes two Blessed Khopesh attacks and one Rotting Fist attack, or it makes four Divine Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

6762bab1-6723-5be1-8b7e-beb179a5c2c4.name: Sandy Teleport
6762bab1-6723-5be1-8b7e-beb179a5c2c4.description: The mummy lord transforms into loose sand and teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see, reforming in that space. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it.

95b3e914-efc8-5099-93e8-b09e12edb7e1.name: Spellcasting (Mummy Lord)
95b3e914-efc8-5099-93e8-b09e12edb7e1.description:
The mummy lord casts one of the following spells, using WIS as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

- **At Will:** _command_, _guidance_, _thaumaturgy_
- **3/Day Each:** _dispel magic_, _hold_, _silence_
- **1/Day Each:** _contagion_, _insect plague_

7ed54e72-530f-5e20-a213-9e8d7aea586b.name: Undead Servitors
7ed54e72-530f-5e20-a213-9e8d7aea586b.description: The mummy lord magically calls 2d6 **skeletons** or **zombies**, 1d4 **specters**, or 2 **mummies**. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the mummy lord and obeying its spoken commands. The Undead remain for 1 hour, until the mummy lord dies, or until the mummy lord dismisses them as a bonus action. The mummy lord can have any number of Undead under its control at one time, provided the combined total CR of the Undead is no higher than 6.

On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

1bae8be3-6a8b-5ddb-aaa6-6c0f996f551b.name: Plant Resilience (Mycolid Commoner)
1bae8be3-6a8b-5ddb-aaa6-6c0f996f551b.description: The mycolid is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

attributes.description: The mycolid is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

978cfd98-25c9-5efc-904b-65f3333dfa02.name: Fetid Feast
978cfd98-25c9-5efc-904b-65f3333dfa02.description: The mycolid draws sustenance from a Medium or larger pile of carrion or rotting vegetation within 5 feet of it. It regains 5 (2d4) HP. The mycolid can't use Fetid Feast on a pile of carrion or vegetation if it or another mycolid has already used Fetid Feast on that pile.

dc948cad-254b-5483-a5c5-10fe85453a7b.name: Gardening Pick
dc948cad-254b-5483-a5c5-10fe85453a7b.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage.

37350f73-f59e-5776-8638-a09c1f817a77.name: Slowing Spores
37350f73-f59e-5776-8638-a09c1f817a77.description: The mycolid ejects slowing spores from its body. Each creature that isn't a mycolid within 5 feet of the mycolid must make a DC 13 WIS save. On a failure, a creature takes 5 (2d4) poison damage and is slowed until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't slowed. A slowed creature's speed is halved, and it can't take reactions.

8f69e4d8-3743-5a30-838e-72f362b7991b.name: Fungal Toxicity (Mycolid Spore Lord)
8f69e4d8-3743-5a30-838e-72f362b7991b.description: A creature that hits the mycolid with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned for 5 hours. If the poison isn't neutralized before 5 hours have passed, the creature must succeed on a DC 14 CON save, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

676b866f-7981-5041-922c-784c845b5814.name: Mycolid Connection (Mycolid Spore Lord)
676b866f-7981-5041-922c-784c845b5814.description: The spore lord can pinpoint the location of each friendly mycolid within 1 mile of it. In addition, its telepathy range increases to 1 mile when communicating with other mycolids.

The spore lord can't use Fetid Feast on a pile of carrion or vegetation if it or another mycolid has already used Fetid Feast on that pile.

6c566f34-fcca-5d74-b8ff-8c2ad06c103b.name: Fungal Staff
6c566f34-fcca-5d74-b8ff-8c2ad06c103b.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 6 (1d6+3) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.

9e13670f-fd48-5fe0-a7d6-c6db98128c1f.name: Hurl Sap
9e13670f-fd48-5fe0-a7d6-c6db98128c1f.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 11 (2d8+2) poison damage, and the sap sticks to the target. While the sap is stuck, the target takes 4 (1d8) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature can use an action to scrape away the sap, ending the effect.

041bc704-0c65-5f32-af62-1a5003115659.name: Multiattack (Mycolid Spore Lord)
041bc704-0c65-5f32-af62-1a5003115659.description: The spore lord makes two Fungal Staff attacks or uses Hurl Sap twice.

attributes.description: The spore lord makes two Fungal Staff attacks or uses Hurl Sap twice.

b06d9c8a-75ca-547c-bb34-072e0d2404d0.name: Mushroom Ring
b06d9c8a-75ca-547c-bb34-072e0d2404d0.description: The spore lord causes fungal growth to erupt from a point on the ground it can sense within 120 feet of it. A ring of mushrooms sprouts in a 15-foot radius around that point. Each creature that isn't a mycolid within that ring must make a DC 14 CON save, taking 13 (3d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Each mycolid within that ring gains 5 (2d4) temporary HP.

Each mycolid within that ring gains 5 (2d4) temporary HP.

c9cb479e-a11e-511a-b26f-26298ed263f4.name: Slumber Spores
c9cb479e-a11e-511a-b26f-26298ed263f4.description: The spore lord ejects sleep-inducing spores from its body. Each creature that isn't a mycolid within 10 feet of the spore lord must make a DC 14 WIS save. On a failure, a creature takes 9 (2d8) poison damage and falls unconscious for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't fall unconscious. The unconscious creature wakes if it takes damage or if a creature uses an action to wake it.

43a5a90b-214d-5dd1-a5b2-0c88cadc7c6c.name: Demonic Resilience (Nalfeshnee)
43a5a90b-214d-5dd1-a5b2-0c88cadc7c6c.description: The nalfeshnee is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

attributes.description: The nalfeshnee is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

1eebe122-2cdb-5c39-908f-149cc1d0d704.name: Horrific Nimbus
1eebe122-2cdb-5c39-908f-149cc1d0d704.description: The nalfeshnee magically emits scintillating, multicolored light that disorients and frightens mortals. Each creature that isn't an Aberration, Celestial, or Fiend and that starts its turn within 15 feet of the nalfeshnee must succeed on a DC 16 WIS save or be frightened until the start of its next turn. A creature that fails the save by 5 or more must take the Dash action on its turn and move away from the nalfeshnee by the safest available route, unless there is nowhere to move.

438dc11f-28a0-51bc-b05c-55401a8bfbb3.description: The nalfeshnee has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

1c9bf862-7714-537e-9bb0-2aff63548060.name: Bite (Nalfeshnee)
1c9bf862-7714-537e-9bb0-2aff63548060.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 28 (4d8+5) piercing damage. If this attack hits a frightened creature, the nalfeshnee regains HP equal to half the damage dealt.

4f02de75-75e5-5dac-9748-979d5e4b0be4.name: Gore (Nalfeshnee)
4f02de75-75e5-5dac-9748-979d5e4b0be4.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 21 (3d10+5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 STR save or be knocked prone.

367df4f6-382d-5549-b33e-4a10e6283e74.name: Multiattack (Nalfeshnee)
367df4f6-382d-5549-b33e-4a10e6283e74.description: The nalfeshnee makes one Bite attack, one Gore attack, and two Claw attacks.

f3c06507-73c0-57af-bb86-da9cc0e77ce8.name: Sudden Feast
f3c06507-73c0-57af-bb86-da9cc0e77ce8.description: When a creature the nalfeshnee can see within 20 feet of it is reduced to 0 HP or dies, the nalfeshnee can move up to its speed toward the creature without provoking opportunity attacks then feast on the creature, if it moves to within 5 feet of the creature. The nalfeshnee regains HP equal to twice the creature's CR or class level, and the creature has disadvantage on the next death save it makes, if it is making death saves.

f56aa353-ef8a-5493-a0d5-4a444c11fc19.name: Teleport (Nalfeshnee)
f56aa353-ef8a-5493-a0d5-4a444c11fc19.description: The nalfeshnee magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
