cf8aba4e-a7be-5c2b-a5bc-89a93356ba47.name: Magic Resistance (Night Hag)
cf8aba4e-a7be-5c2b-a5bc-89a93356ba47.description: The hag has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The hag has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

515f6abc-74d3-51f7-af85-dd74f54e7af4.name: Arcane Bolt (Night Hag)
515f6abc-74d3-51f7-af85-dd74f54e7af4.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 19 (3d10+3) force damage.

attributes.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 19 (3d10+3) force damage.

d4012b69-766e-5a66-acd3-2c5f9ffb1a09.name: Cause Sorrow
d4012b69-766e-5a66-acd3-2c5f9ffb1a09.description:
One creature the hag can see within 10 feet of it must succeed on a DC 14 CHA save or be filled with sorrow for 1 minute. While filled with sorrow, a creature is incapacitated and experiences visions or memories of sorrowful events. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns (if conscious) or end of each hour (if unconscious), ending the effect on itself on a success.
For each hour an unconscious creature is affected, its HP maximum is reduced by 5 (1d10). This reduction lasts until removed by the greater restoration spell or similar magic. The creature dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0. If an unconscious creature suffers from least 1 hour, it doesn't gain any benefits from the rest. The hag can have only one creature filled with sorrow at a time. If it uses Cause Sorrow on another, the effect on the previous creature ends.Cause Sorrow for at

04d4c8a1-0d0b-5986-a156-511fcd1b2971.name: Change Shape (Night Hag)
04d4c8a1-0d0b-5986-a156-511fcd1b2971.description: The hag magically transforms into Medium or smaller Humanoid, or back into its true form, which is Fiend. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

3c98e3f6-0129-5873-a219-69b3d337c46f.name: Claw (Night Hag)
3c98e3f6-0129-5873-a219-69b3d337c46f.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (4d6+4) slashing damage.

ed697940-d3a8-5793-9f0d-73e957f443ef.name: Etherealness (Night Hag)
ed697940-d3a8-5793-9f0d-73e957f443ef.description: The hag magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. The hag can use Cause Sorrow on an unconscious creature not on its plane; otherwise, the hag can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.

1ecc3a4a-db90-5e83-8a83-7abcdf70860e.name: Multiattack (Night Hag)
1ecc3a4a-db90-5e83-8a83-7abcdf70860e.description: The night hag can use Cause Sorrow. It then makes two Claw or Arcane Bolt attacks. It can replace one Claw or Arcane Bolt attack with a use of Spellcasting.

c2997dc7-d473-527a-a101-3dafc7e5b80b.name: Spellcasting (Night Hag)
c2997dc7-d473-527a-a101-3dafc7e5b80b.description:
The hag casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

- **At Will:** _ray of enfeeblement_, _silent image_
- **2/Day Each:** _detect thoughts_, _plane shift_ (self only), _sleep_

4d674a9f-1842-502d-b03b-93bf6bae493e.name: Illumination (Nightmare)
4d674a9f-1842-502d-b03b-93bf6bae493e.description: The nightmare sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.

attributes.description: The nightmare sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.

ae3bd34b-ad99-5bce-b402-30a35c32b9aa.name: Riding Flames
ae3bd34b-ad99-5bce-b402-30a35c32b9aa.description: Any creature riding a willing nightmare is resistant to fire damage. A creature riding the nightmare without the nightmare's permission takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of the nightmare's turns.

attributes.description: Any creature riding a willing nightmare is resistant to fire damage. A creature riding the nightmare without the nightmare's permission takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of the nightmare's turns.

56f7bede-f043-53ec-a14e-939a54592edb.name: Burning Hoofprints
56f7bede-f043-53ec-a14e-939a54592edb.description: The nightmare increases the intensity of the heat on its hooves. Until the start of its next turn, it leaves burning hoofprints in any surface through which it walks, creating a trail of fire in its wake. A creature that enters a space with burning hoofprints for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must succeed on a DC 13 DEX save or take 3 (1d6) fire damage. The hoofprints stop burning at the start of the nightmare's next turn.

e584d0fc-5c38-5e4c-8df2-ad4f66c4d780.name: Ethereal Stride
e584d0fc-5c38-5e4c-8df2-ad4f66c4d780.description: The nightmare and up to three willing creatures within 5 feet of it magically enter the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa.

2e10d6f3-7e3c-5694-abfc-c085c38a1a4c.name: Flaming Hoof
2e10d6f3-7e3c-5694-abfc-c085c38a1a4c.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d6+4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

6bdd037a-9461-5a56-9fcd-b499ebb259f1.name: Multiattack (Nightmare)
6bdd037a-9461-5a56-9fcd-b499ebb259f1.description: The nightmare makes two Flaming Hoof attacks.

a1e14ec7-3cda-5e5c-bf45-959574e987d6.name: Impenetrable Ego
a1e14ec7-3cda-5e5c-bf45-959574e987d6.description: While the noble is conscious and wearing no armor and wielding no shield, it adds its CHA modifier to its AC (included above). In addition, it is resistant to the charmed and frightened conditions.

f42531cf-1c14-5472-8633-d9408f861f3c.name: Parry (Noble)
f42531cf-1c14-5472-8633-d9408f861f3c.description: The noble adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the noble must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

398dfb79-bca0-5003-93c0-d090f8fa4a2a.name: Rapier (Noble)
398dfb79-bca0-5003-93c0-d090f8fa4a2a.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d8+1) piercing damage.

0a250ad8-91b6-543a-b484-124e4320457d.name: Amorphous (Ochre Jelly)
0a250ad8-91b6-543a-b484-124e4320457d.description: The ochre jelly can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

f708ff1e-1940-525b-9843-14e5652fa648.name: Ooze Nature (Ochre Jelly)
f708ff1e-1940-525b-9843-14e5652fa648.description: The ochre jelly doesn't require sleep.

9591720b-dc59-5e32-887e-048e5a432028.name: Ooze Resilience (Ochre Jelly)
9591720b-dc59-5e32-887e-048e5a432028.description: The ochre jelly is resistant to the restrained condition, and it is immune to exhaustion and to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, and prone conditions.

539c46de-0e16-5cc7-8878-6050729385fb.name: Overwhelming Stench
539c46de-0e16-5cc7-8878-6050729385fb.description: A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the ochre jelly must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. If a creature fails the save by 5 or more, it must spend its turn retching uncontrollably and be unable to move or act.

c5b9816f-95a1-5247-a82a-cdfed31572fa.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (2d6+3) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) acid damage. If the target is poisoned, it must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or also take 5 (2d4) poison damage.

01af8d41-5979-5f52-871a-ad2a0abefe08.name: Split (Ochre Jelly)
01af8d41-5979-5f52-871a-ad2a0abefe08.description: When an ochre jelly that is Medium or larger is subjected to lightning or slashing damage, it splits into two new ochre jellies if it has at least 10 HP. Each new jelly has HP equal to half the original jelly's, rounded down. New jellies are one size smaller than the original jelly.

65365f1b-3a65-55ae-b4f5-b6f9cf524142.name: Hold Breath (Octopus)
65365f1b-3a65-55ae-b4f5-b6f9cf524142.description: While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

7dac7fc5-2ca6-5660-8e5f-7bb227601a14.description: The octopus's Stealth is 18 while underwater.

attributes.description: The octopus's Stealth is 18 while underwater.

c5a1fc3a-2983-5a16-8626-063a09815e0c.name: Water Breathing
c5a1fc3a-2983-5a16-8626-063a09815e0c.description: The octopus can breathe only underwater.

bf32e534-de70-5cc9-b34f-98ed01216667.name: Ink Dash
bf32e534-de70-5cc9-b34f-98ed01216667.description: When a creature the octopus can see deals damage to it, the octopus can release a 5-foot-radius cloud of ink all around itself, if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured until the end of the octopus's next turn, although a significant current can disperse the ink. Then, the octopus can swim up to its swimming speed. If it does so, it immediately releases any creature it is grappling.

Until this grapple ends, the octopus can't use its Tentacles on another target.

2969e0de-af16-55b4-8adc-2bf3f51d3515.name: Hold Breath (Octopus, Giant)

The area is heavily obscured until the end of the octopus's next turn, although a significant current can disperse the ink. Then, the octopus can swim up to its swimming speed. If it does so, it immediately releases any creatures it is grappling.

02ff0e67-3e32-57ad-bcdb-8fb01680786f.name: Tentacle Slam
02ff0e67-3e32-57ad-bcdb-8fb01680786f.description: The octopus slams a Medium or smaller creature it is grappling into a solid surface. The target must make a DC 13 STR save, taking 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

8f082d5c-7a18-5453-8d1e-da06ea29fa81.name: Tentacles (Octopus, Giant)

Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The octopus can grapple up to two creatures at one time.

e0d775a0-3392-5df8-b950-08be19621717.name: Giant Attributes (Ogre)
e0d775a0-3392-5df8-b950-08be19621717.description: The ogre is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

attributes.description: The ogre is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

87be49da-c1be-5ad9-ba52-9778f4c4d6e4.name: Bowling Sweep
87be49da-c1be-5ad9-ba52-9778f4c4d6e4.description: The ogre sweeps its weapon in a wide arc around it. Each creature within 10 feet of the ogre must make a DC 14 STR save. Small and smaller creatures have disadvantage on the save. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage, is pushed up to 10 feet away from the ogre, and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

eaca1333-b32c-523e-8e00-ee6db0e9024b.name: Shoving Rush (Ogre)
eaca1333-b32c-523e-8e00-ee6db0e9024b.description: The ogre takes the Dash action. If it moves, it can propel itself into one creature it can see along its path. The target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks from a target that fails this save.

9c99531c-c9be-5246-9c99-c8174971a02d.name: Undead Fortitude
9c99531c-c9be-5246-9c99-c8174971a02d.description: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 HP, it must make a CON save with a DC equal to 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 HP instead.

c7cdd7c8-1c04-57d1-95c1-6f20278b30ee.name: Undead Nature (Ogre Zombie)
c7cdd7c8-1c04-57d1-95c1-6f20278b30ee.description: The zombie doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

11fe0e53-30d9-5e16-bb6e-2b90a7f0ba6e.name: Undead Resilience (Ogre Zombie)
11fe0e53-30d9-5e16-bb6e-2b90a7f0ba6e.description: The zombie is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

attributes.description: The zombie is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

a4311254-ceaa-5f0b-a7d4-e1e61f3d92ab.name: Lumbering Charge
a4311254-ceaa-5f0b-a7d4-e1e61f3d92ab.description: The ogre zombie shoulders its weapon and charges forward, shoving into creatures on its way. It moves up to 20 feet in a straight line and can move through the space of any Medium or smaller creature. The first time it enters a creature's space during this move, that creature must make a DC 14 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

44a54cf6-b4e0-5e84-8971-682aa2c37901.name: Arcane Bolt (Oni)

936704f1-0f06-5210-88ee-2518001a4f5f.name: Change Shape (Oni)
936704f1-0f06-5210-88ee-2518001a4f5f.description: The oni magically transforms into a Small or Medium Humanoid, a Large ogre, or back into its true form, which is Giant. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it, except for its glaive, which adjusts to fit its new form. If the oni dies, it reverts to its true form, and the glaive reverts to its normal size.

bcba5113-cba6-5e30-b041-524861e434f8.name: Spellcasting (Oni)
bcba5113-cba6-5e30-b041-524861e434f8.description:
The oni casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14).

- **At Will:** _darkness_, _invisibility_ (self only)
- **1/Day Each:** _charm_, _gaseous form_, _sleep_

f406d806-69fe-5049-9778-8a07134efa0e.description: The oni channels its magic into its twirling glaive, creating magical wind in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 31 (9d6) cold damage and is pushed up to 15 feet away from the oni. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed.

617a416a-fda7-5649-ab71-d344eb00aa1c.name: Stalwart (Orc)
617a416a-fda7-5649-ab71-d344eb00aa1c.description: If the orc starts its turn afflicted by an ongoing effect that allows for a repeated save to end the effect, such as the hold spell or the poison from an ettercap's Bite, the orc can make the save at the start of the turn instead of the end and has advantage on the save.

8f3656e4-e0fa-5299-849b-2c355c1bec76.description: The orca slaps one creature it can see within 15 feet of it with its tail. A creature that fails this save by 5 or more is also stunned until the end of its next turn.

fb920917-14c7-5d65-ad42-8db3f07ce2e2.description: The otyugh is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

afed87f2-4b12-5160-a30a-c3661dca47de.description: The otyugh can magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120 feet of it that can understand a language. This form of telepathy doesn't allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.

1547520a-fca5-5a0b-8e93-74b4416b253c.name: Bite (Otyugh)
1547520a-fca5-5a0b-8e93-74b4416b253c.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or become infected with a disease. Until the disease is cured, the target is poisoned. Every 24 hours that elapse, the infected creature must repeat the save, reducing its HP maximum by 5 (1d10) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The creature dies if the disease reduces its HP maximum to 0. This reduction to the creature's HP maximum lasts until it finishes a long rest after the disease is cured.

c681bb8a-3ef4-5a21-aa45-46e0dd8069c8.description: The owlbear has long, sturdy feathers along its forelimbs and sides that expand while falling to slow its rate of descent to 60 feet per round, landing on its feet and taking no falling damage. It can move up to 5 feet horizontally for every 1 foot it falls. The owlbear can't gain height with its gliding feathers alone. If subjected to a strong wind or lift of any kind, it can use the updraft to glide farther.

The first time it enters a creature's space during this move, that creature must make a DC 15 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 18 (4d8) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

While restrained in this way, the target can see and attack creatures on the Ethereal Plane, and the restrained target can be seen and attacked by creatures on the Ethereal Plane. A creature, including the restrained target, can take its action to free the target from the webbing by succeeding on a DC 13 STR check. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 12; HP 10; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

Each friendly creature within 15 feet of the planetar is empowered with divine energy and has advantage on all melee attack rolls it makes before the start of the planetar's next turn.

ddd7d119-45e8-58c2-9117-a7e8645f57bb.description:
The planetar casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components and using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 19).

- **At Will:** _command_, _invisibility_ (self only)
- **3/Day Each:** _daylight_, _raise dead_ (as an action)

a86993f1-5aa7-52ca-93bf-3498c191c4f3.name: Hardy
a86993f1-5aa7-52ca-93bf-3498c191c4f3.description: Any critical hit against the dinosaur becomes a normal hit.

41e91cf7-0386-5170-ba3f-7e21518fd944.description: The plesiosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

attributes.description: The plesiosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.

ff2a0130-3191-5298-b429-c17bff17ba4a.name: Bite (Plesiosaurus)
ff2a0130-3191-5298-b429-c17bff17ba4a.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage.

2e402367-92c8-51a8-926a-6445543c25e0.name: Flipper Slam
2e402367-92c8-51a8-926a-6445543c25e0.description: While underwater, the plesiosaurus slams its flippers together, sending a shockwave of water in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be off-balance until the end of its next turn. While off-balance, a creature's speed is halved, and it has disadvantage on the first attack roll it makes on each of its turns.

016b790c-2443-5e2d-91e6-c67652b6e5f0.description: The priest is resistant to necrotic damage or radiant damage, as appropriate for the priest's deity.

2f932956-c21b-5927-90f7-980eb0f5a3db.description: The priest's weapons are shrouded in dark or golden flames, as appropriate for the priest's deity. When the priest hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 2d6 necrotic damage or radiant damage (included in the attack), the priest's choice.

The priest casts one of the following spells, using WIS as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13).

- **At Will:** _guidance_, _light_, _thaumaturgy_
- **2/Day Each:** _bane_, _bless_, _cure wounds_
- **1/Day Each:** _dispel magic_, _restoration_

e030c695-68a4-5753-8e46-b87f229e2572.name: Heightened Senses (Pseudodragon)
e030c695-68a4-5753-8e46-b87f229e2572.description: The pseudodragon's Perception is 18 when perceiving by sight, hearing, or smell.

attributes.description: The pseudodragon's Perception is 18 when perceiving by sight, hearing, or smell.

d4fdce5b-32c4-5321-bcab-80683d68313e.name: Limited Telepathy (Pseudodragon)
d4fdce5b-32c4-5321-bcab-80683d68313e.description: The pseudodragon can magically communicate simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with any creature within 100 feet of it that can understand a language.

attributes.description: The pseudodragon can magically communicate simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with any creature within 100 feet of it that can understand a language.

36feb3f1-b448-553c-bf99-ab3777e82ea2.name: Magic Resistance (Pseudodragon)
36feb3f1-b448-553c-bf99-ab3777e82ea2.description: The pseudodragon has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The pseudodragon has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

3f887b61-5ecf-5b10-9d92-6522e938bb58.name: Puff of Smoke
3f887b61-5ecf-5b10-9d92-6522e938bb58.description: The pseudodragon exhales a cloud of smoke in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on itself. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for 1 minute or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.

13734aca-baeb-526b-bb97-568c64871925.name: Sting (Pseudodragon)
13734aca-baeb-526b-bb97-568c64871925.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 11 CON save or be poisoned for 1 hour. If the creature fails the save by 5 or more, it falls unconscious while poisoned in this way, or until it takes damage or another creature uses an action to shake it awake.

fb731b6e-3b61-521f-a2d2-aeedb2b981b9.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Purple Worm)
fb731b6e-3b61-521f-a2d2-aeedb2b981b9.description: The purple worm is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The purple worm is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

4b18bea5-6f94-5d60-89da-c548de175a48.name: Tunneler
4b18bea5-6f94-5d60-89da-c548de175a48.description: The purple worm can burrow through solid rock at half its burrowing speed, and it leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: The purple worm can burrow through solid rock at half its burrowing speed, and it leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

768613a1-5ec4-5f8a-bc6b-33c621ece777.name: Bite (Purple Worm)
768613a1-5ec4-5f8a-bc6b-33c621ece777.description:
_Melee Weapon Attack:_ +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (3d8+9) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 19 DEX save or be swallowed by the purple worm.
A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside of the worm, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the worm's turns. If the worm takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the worm must succeed on a DC 21 CON save at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the worm. If the worm dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

bbd0e550-a897-5c43-8c99-f5cfa47476e8.name: Rapid Digestion
bbd0e550-a897-5c43-8c99-f5cfa47476e8.description: The purple worm's digestive system absorbs some of the already digested material from creatures it has swallowed. If the purple worm has at least one swallowed creature inside it, the purple worm regains 9 (2d8) HP. This healing increases by 4 (1d8) for each creature currently inside the purple worm, to a maximum of 10d8.

2e4bd361-f93c-550e-98b3-064301cd3234.name: Tail Stinger
2e4bd361-f93c-550e-98b3-064301cd3234.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 19 (3d6+9) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 19 CON save, taking 42 (12d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

9e1f5ed5-7f3c-5c8c-ac41-7ba9efed8f9a.name: Thrash
9e1f5ed5-7f3c-5c8c-ac41-7ba9efed8f9a.description: The purple worm convulses its large body, smashing everything around it. Each creature within 20 feet of the worm must make a DC 19 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 54 (12d8) bludgeoning damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

7b660d4a-ceb5-5887-89bb-ddac4eaf8fae.name: Demonic Resilience (Quasit)
7b660d4a-ceb5-5887-89bb-ddac4eaf8fae.description: The quasit is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

7f4823f0-c7aa-5fc9-afa6-1e733c6fa03a.name: Magic Resistance (Quasit)
7f4823f0-c7aa-5fc9-afa6-1e733c6fa03a.description: The quasit has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

ecc2b843-6902-547f-9a32-997cb6be67bf.name: Change Shape (Quasit)
ecc2b843-6902-547f-9a32-997cb6be67bf.description:
The quasit magically transforms into a Medium or smaller Beast that has a CR no higher than its own or back into its true form, which is a Fiend. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form.
Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

2467bf30-06a7-5d42-b311-b8edf7ae9ff4.name: Claws (Quasit)
2467bf30-06a7-5d42-b311-b8edf7ae9ff4.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or take 5 (2d4) poison damage and be poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

29c0d764-9d8d-556b-9a92-d96b10c03878.name: Invisibility (Quasit)
29c0d764-9d8d-556b-9a92-d96b10c03878.description: The quasit magically turns invisible until it attacks, uses Scare, or uses Change Shape, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the quasit wears or carries is invisible with it.

b9d6f3b2-4205-5226-b171-b1bf3eba1bc3.name: Scare
b9d6f3b2-4205-5226-b171-b1bf3eba1bc3.description: One creature of the quasit's choice within 20 feet of it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

644ab803-ea24-5b80-9935-7b28c401d8bd.description: The quipper has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its HP.

731b8b1e-1dda-51bc-9cb8-0270fd3e9e07.name: Water Breathing (Quipper)
731b8b1e-1dda-51bc-9cb8-0270fd3e9e07.description: The quipper can breathe only underwater.

5a4733ea-8164-5355-8098-e381648a1540.description: The swarm's Perception is 15 when perceiving by smell.

d35ae20f-fce9-5755-bc53-3e5d735be04a.name: Swarm (Quipper, Swarm of Quippers)
d35ae20f-fce9-5755-bc53-3e5d735be04a.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny quipper. The swarm can't regain HP or gain temporary HP.

cb0f500d-bb97-51e5-b275-a8a9e79a7bd6.name: Water Breathing (Quipper, Swarm of Quippers)
cb0f500d-bb97-51e5-b275-a8a9e79a7bd6.description: The swarm can breathe only underwater.

565d66da-8e9c-5336-8af9-ec49eb163df0.name: Bites (Quipper, Swarm of Quippers)
565d66da-8e9c-5336-8af9-ec49eb163df0.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. _Hit:_ 18 (4d8) piercing damage, or 9 (2d8) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its HP or fewer, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 DEX save or have its flesh shredded by the attack. A creature with shredded flesh loses 4 (1d8) HP at the start of each of its turns as the wound bleeds profusely. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 10 WIS (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

4e2913e6-bc0c-50ae-b0b9-57b2bbdc15fd.name: Limited Magic Immunity
4e2913e6-bc0c-50ae-b0b9-57b2bbdc15fd.description: The rakshasa can't be affected or detected by spells of 6th level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saves against all other spells and magical effects.

b537b323-df7a-5438-a1af-e493791a84e3.name: Arcane Bolt (Rakshasa)
b537b323-df7a-5438-a1af-e493791a84e3.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +10 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (5d6+5) force damage.

1d5b0c4f-50ca-5420-a265-44d22aaad12f.name: Charming Gaze
1d5b0c4f-50ca-5420-a265-44d22aaad12f.description: The rakshasa turns its gaze toward one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. If the target can see the rakshasa, the target must succeed on a DC 18 CHA save or be charmed for 1 minute. A charmed creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The rakshasa can have up to three creatures charmed in this way at a time.

8d24c4a3-5ce2-5da8-b613-40a0ce5cf88e.name: Claw (Rakshasa)
8d24c4a3-5ce2-5da8-b613-40a0ce5cf88e.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) force damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) force damage.

35ba5f0c-f80c-565c-9db3-b5a8c64a1c7c.name: Illusory Appearance (Rakshasa)
35ba5f0c-f80c-565c-9db3-b5a8c64a1c7c.description: The rakshasa covers itself and anything it is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes it look like another creature of its general size and Humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the rakshasa takes a bonus action to end it or if the rakshasa dies. The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, a creature touching the disguised rakshasa might feel its fur instead of Humanoid flesh. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 25 INT (Investigation) check to discern that the rakshasa is disguised.

56c1a506-33c7-5e0a-b377-45bcdc8c83f3.name: Multiattack (Rakshasa)
56c1a506-33c7-5e0a-b377-45bcdc8c83f3.description: The rakshasa makes four Claw or Arcane Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting. If two Claw attacks hit one creature, the target is cursed. While cursed, the target gains no benefit from finishing a short or long rest. The curse lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or similar magic.

506562b0-146b-5286-9b80-e69fdaa06e2e.name: Travel the Planes (Rakshasa)
506562b0-146b-5286-9b80-e69fdaa06e2e.description: The rakshasa magically transports itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the rakshasa can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature.

attributes.description: The rakshasa magically transports itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the rakshasa can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature.

1e976931-2c85-546f-b178-f63769eb95c2.name: Accustomed to Filth
1e976931-2c85-546f-b178-f63769eb95c2.description: The rat has advantage on saves against contracting diseases.

attributes.description: The rat has advantage on saves against contracting diseases.

6b1c19b7-3ac6-5337-bf1b-b0385f253649.name: Heightened Smell (Rat)
6b1c19b7-3ac6-5337-bf1b-b0385f253649.description: The rat's Perception is 15 while perceiving by smell.

attributes.description: The rat's Perception is 15 while perceiving by smell.

6864eb3c-9734-5cd1-bb16-864ff7bf286a.name: Bite (Rat)
6864eb3c-9734-5cd1-bb16-864ff7bf286a.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

70518783-5a76-57ab-b6cd-11b8fe88acff.name: Pack Tactics (Rat, Giant)
70518783-5a76-57ab-b6cd-11b8fe88acff.description: The rat has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

attributes.description: The rat has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

ea86eb99-931f-50c3-a435-dfaab193b612.name: Bite (Rat, Giant)
ea86eb99-931f-50c3-a435-dfaab193b612.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must make a DC 13 CON save. On a failure, the target contracts the rat plague disease (see Diseased Rats sidebar) or is poisoned until the end of its next turn (the GM's choice).

5362fa57-688d-5cb4-a0fb-36ca23a236e1.name: Accustomed to Filth (Rat, Swarm of Rats)
5362fa57-688d-5cb4-a0fb-36ca23a236e1.description: The swarm has advantage on saves against contracting diseases.

b9a893bb-9a0b-5216-8d4d-a1c2f2b79212.name: Swarm (Rat, Swarm of Rats)
b9a893bb-9a0b-5216-8d4d-a1c2f2b79212.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain HP or gain temporary HP.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain HP or gain temporary HP.

3650bb03-e322-5d35-bd67-e46045c3bcfc.name: Bites (Rat, Swarm of Rats)
3650bb03-e322-5d35-bd67-e46045c3bcfc.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. _Hit:_ 7 (2d6) piercing damage, or 3 (1d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its HP or fewer. If the target is a creature, it must make a DC 9 CON save. On a failure, the target contracts the rat plague disease (see Diseased Rats sidebar) or is poisoned until the end of its next turn (the GM's choice).

12e6d3c3-63e0-57c8-8d8a-46108d4d18d6.name: Carrion Sense
12e6d3c3-63e0-57c8-8d8a-46108d4d18d6.description: The raven can pinpoint, by scent, the location of carrion, dead creatures, and Undead without the Incorporeal Movement trait within 60 feet of it.

attributes.description: The raven can pinpoint, by scent, the location of carrion, dead creatures, and Undead without the Incorporeal Movement trait within 60 feet of it.

0be5496d-8190-5ef6-93f8-10dd46847b72.name: Mimicry (Raven)
0be5496d-8190-5ef6-93f8-10dd46847b72.description: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a chord of a flute melody, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 WIS (Insight) check.

attributes.description: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a chord of a flute melody, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 WIS (Insight) check.

f871a1cc-2eaa-531c-a310-01fdf6b6f069.name: Recollection
f871a1cc-2eaa-531c-a310-01fdf6b6f069.description: The raven knows up to 20 words in any language it has heard and can repeat those words in the voices it heard them, using its Mimicry trait.

attributes.description: The raven knows up to 20 words in any language it has heard and can repeat those words in the voices it heard them, using its Mimicry trait.

afcedd61-e699-5bf6-8b0d-f850ef96a456.name: Beak (Raven)
afcedd61-e699-5bf6-8b0d-f850ef96a456.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 3 (1d4+1) piercing damage.

4b7f1046-b5ef-53e9-99f5-5fd886d6b882.name: Carrion Sense (Raven, Swarm of Ravens)
4b7f1046-b5ef-53e9-99f5-5fd886d6b882.description: The swarm can pinpoint, by scent, the location of carrion, dead creatures, and Undead without the Incorporeal Movement trait within 60 feet of it.

f051a612-35a0-5dfb-b491-5eff6730f7ad.name: Pilfering Swarm
f051a612-35a0-5dfb-b491-5eff6730f7ad.description: A creature in the swarm's space is surrounded by ravens pecking and pulling at its clothing, hair, fur, and belongings. If a creature in the swarm's space casts a spell with a material component, it must succeed on a DC 12 DEX save or the spell fails to cast, expending the action required to cast it but not the spell slot or daily use, as the ravens steal the component.

09567964-a638-5e07-af09-d2a217549964.name: Swarm (Raven, Swarm of Ravens)

7c9b9951-0670-5492-8041-7c377d942257.name: Beaks
7c9b9951-0670-5492-8041-7c377d942257.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target in the swarm's space. _Hit:_ 9 (2d8) piercing damage, or 4 (1d8) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its HP or fewer.

2f1009b5-dee5-534e-a7b9-db85be44f35b.name: Pounce (Red Dragon Wyrmling)
2f1009b5-dee5-534e-a7b9-db85be44f35b.description: If the dragon moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the dragon can make one Claw attack against it as a bonus action.

16c58966-65b6-5ba3-ab35-9f20a9724838.name: Bite (Red Dragon Wyrmling)
16c58966-65b6-5ba3-ab35-9f20a9724838.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 9 (1d10+4) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.

341ec607-ea6e-59da-96c5-d2243b23b524.name: Fire Breath (Red Dragon Wyrmling)
341ec607-ea6e-59da-96c5-d2243b23b524.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 15foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 DEX save, taking 28 (8d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The dragon exhales fire in a 15foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 DEX save, taking 28 (8d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

a5ee672b-dfb7-5885-a0e8-be10ddecf54e.name: Heated Body (Remorhaz)
a5ee672b-dfb7-5885-a0e8-be10ddecf54e.description: A creature that touches the remorhaz or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: A creature that touches the remorhaz or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.

b211d563-5732-55f1-8cc4-65b6f1bdfec7.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Remorhaz)
b211d563-5732-55f1-8cc4-65b6f1bdfec7.description: The remorhaz is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The remorhaz is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

9d141b46-a6a3-5128-8462-ebf76dc74bf8.name: Tunneler (Remorhaz)
9d141b46-a6a3-5128-8462-ebf76dc74bf8.description: The remorhaz can burrow through ice, snow, and permafrost, and it leaves a 5-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

attributes.description: The remorhaz can burrow through ice, snow, and permafrost, and it leaves a 5-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.

a3c1445c-0ab2-59a5-9975-d98316aa73db.name: Bite (Remorhaz)
a3c1445c-0ab2-59a5-9975-d98316aa73db.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 40 (6d10+7) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) fire damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 DEX save or be swallowed by the remorhaz. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the remorhaz, and it takes 10 (3d6) acid damage and 10 (3d6) fire damage at the start of each of the remorhaz's turns. If the remorhaz takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a swallowed creature, the remorhaz must succeed on a DC 19 CON save at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the remorhaz. If the remorhaz dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

d54ae81f-db35-5ed8-9727-835f258e1674.name: Vent Heat
d54ae81f-db35-5ed8-9727-835f258e1674.description: As the remorhaz's life force ebbs, its body generates more heat to protect itself. It can open valves in its carapace to vent this excess heat. Each creature within 5 feet of the remorhaz must succeed on a DC 17 CON save or suffer one level of exhaustion.

attributes.description: As the remorhaz's life force ebbs, its body generates more heat to protect itself. It can open valves in its carapace to vent this excess heat. Each creature within 5 feet of the remorhaz must succeed on a DC 17 CON save or suffer one level of exhaustion.

6b392517-6694-5f8b-9b7f-d99a109c8514.name: Charge (Rhinoceros)
6b392517-6694-5f8b-9b7f-d99a109c8514.description: If the rhinoceros moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 STR save or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the rhinoceros and knocked prone.

68d56c69-14df-516e-a0ae-40e8fc4dd8b9.name: Gore (Rhinoceros)
68d56c69-14df-516e-a0ae-40e8fc4dd8b9.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d6+5) bludgeoning damage.

88aa84e3-e6b3-567b-a3ab-f6c2dccaac16.name: Quaking Stomp
88aa84e3-e6b3-567b-a3ab-f6c2dccaac16.description: The rhinoceros rears up and slams its forefeet on the ground, shaking the area. Each creature within 10 feet of the rhinoceros must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or be knocked prone.

09430edb-b28f-5a69-a364-1bac1bc10f9a.name: Construct Nature (Robot Drone)
09430edb-b28f-5a69-a364-1bac1bc10f9a.description: The drone doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The drone doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

a21bfaf3-6561-5dc4-993b-23eb9a590f2b.name: Construct Resilience (Robot Drone)
a21bfaf3-6561-5dc4-993b-23eb9a590f2b.description: The drone is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

attributes.description: The drone is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

d3cda162-3eb4-52a9-af15-23d045b2a564.name: Electrical Malfunction
d3cda162-3eb4-52a9-af15-23d045b2a564.description: Whenever the drone takes lightning damage, it must succeed on a DC 11 WIS save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Whenever the drone takes lightning damage, it must succeed on a DC 11 WIS save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

29b0f5b5-76de-5e59-ac0c-215b26837002.name: Point-Blank Shots
29b0f5b5-76de-5e59-ac0c-215b26837002.description: When the drone makes a ranged attack, it doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll from being within 5 feet of a hostile creature, though it may still have disadvantage from other sources.

54c28acb-52d5-5d30-a7d5-018bfacbfcf9.name: Flame Jet
54c28acb-52d5-5d30-a7d5-018bfacbfcf9.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (2d4+3) fire damage.

4ffe3f3e-a7b4-5de4-b808-c4eed8431ce0.name: Fueled Escape
4ffe3f3e-a7b4-5de4-b808-c4eed8431ce0.description: The drone takes the Dash or Disengage action, leaving a small cloud of fuel fumes behind it. Each creature within 5 feet must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The drone takes the Dash or Disengage action, leaving a small cloud of fuel fumes behind it. Each creature within 5 feet must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

c552bd04-f1e9-5ff8-b6a2-eb8d5d7ccf4c.name: Slam (Robot Drone)
c552bd04-f1e9-5ff8-b6a2-eb8d5d7ccf4c.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) bludgeoning damage.

2a6c13ba-321c-537b-bf28-47ff68dad997.name: Heightened Sight (Roc)
2a6c13ba-321c-537b-bf28-47ff68dad997.description: The roc's Perception is 19 when perceiving by sight.

5a6c3821-e828-562c-a711-e897016e004b.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Roc)
5a6c3821-e828-562c-a711-e897016e004b.description: The roc is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The roc is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

09b3c89e-fd70-5753-88b8-64e090d1f2db.name: Seabird (Roc)
09b3c89e-fd70-5753-88b8-64e090d1f2db.description: The roc can swim up to 60 feet on its turn, but it must start and end its movement either flying or on a solid surface, such as a ship or beach. If it is swimming at the end of its turn, it must succeed on a DC 19 CON save or it immediately begins to sink and suffocate. A suffocating roc must succeed on a DC 19 STR check to fly out of the substance where it is sinking.

1b8eea67-6ca1-5f63-893b-f064b2862f92.name: Beak (Roc)
1b8eea67-6ca1-5f63-893b-f064b2862f92.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 27 (4d8+9) piercing damage.

1411147e-9673-5774-ac90-e79f14e56729.name: Multiattack (Roc)
1411147e-9673-5774-ac90-e79f14e56729.description: The roc makes one Beak attack and two Talon attacks. If both Talon attacks hit one Huge or Gargantuan creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the roc can't use its Talons on another target.

5bc772f1-dbc7-5001-b7e3-3aba22d53a88.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 23 (4d6+9) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature. dc9946a5-c1b5-5c25-b8c7-e39e84c58817.name: Territorial Shriek
dc9946a5-c1b5-5c25-b8c7-e39e84c58817.description: The roc shrieks a territorial challenge at up to two creatures it can see within 60 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 17 CHA save or be frightened until the end of its next turn. While frightened by this shriek, a creature must take the Dash action on its turn and move away from the roc by the safest available route, unless there is nowhere to move.

e6e43d9d-9b2d-5d29-8ce9-09847d2e7626.name: Climbing Tendrils
e6e43d9d-9b2d-5d29-8ce9-09847d2e7626.description: If at least four of the roper's Grasping Tendrils aren't grappling creatures, the roper has a climbing speed of 30 feet.

d8a1593e-5b7d-555d-ae82-a9425a083f90.name: False Appearance (Roper)
d8a1593e-5b7d-555d-ae82-a9425a083f90.description: While the roper remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal conical or spire-like cave formation, such as a stalagmite or stalactite.

attributes.description: While the roper remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal conical or spire-like cave formation, such as a stalagmite or stalactite.

797c0b2f-bee6-52c5-901d-41561007f213.name: Grasping Tendrils
797c0b2f-bee6-52c5-901d-41561007f213.description: The roper can have up to six Grasping Tendrils at a time. Each Grasping Tendril can be attacked (AC 20; 10 HP; vulnerable to thunder damage; immune to poison and psychic damage). Destroying a Grasping Tendril deals no damage to the roper, which can extrude a replacement tendril on its next turn. A Grasping Tendril can also be broken if a creature takes an action and succeeds on a DC 15 STR check against it.

60ea5c4a-0bec-5dd7-b96c-24191cfc8e0c.description: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

695c571c-2744-5d8b-8bd2-e2678007dafa.name: Grasping Tendril
695c571c-2744-5d8b-8bd2-e2678007dafa.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 50 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 6 (1d4+4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained and has disadvantage on STR checks and STR saves, and the roper can't use the same Grasping Tendril on another target. A creature immune to the poisoned condition doesn't have disadvantage on STR checks and STR saves from the tendril.

95e385a5-1964-51e6-a828-cb908fedf887.name: Multiattack (Roper)
95e385a5-1964-51e6-a828-cb908fedf887.description: The roper makes one Bite attack and three Grasping Tendril attacks.

attributes.description: The roper makes one Bite attack and three Grasping Tendril attacks.

c9db6188-1945-587c-88d5-b3a0d8970e2e.name: Reel (Roper)
c9db6188-1945-587c-88d5-b3a0d8970e2e.description: The roper pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

attributes.description: The roper pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

bab02f18-298a-5e3b-ba40-5d1c51bd7b2e.name: Snapping Tendril
bab02f18-298a-5e3b-ba40-5d1c51bd7b2e.description: When a Grasping Tendril that is grappling a creature is destroyed, the roper can quickly pull the remains of that tendril back to it with a whipping snap. Each creature within 10 feet of the roper must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or be knocked prone.

a92a8824-5bfe-5f7c-8446-b09a7f5bee22.name: Antimagic Susceptibility (Rug of Smothering)
a92a8824-5bfe-5f7c-8446-b09a7f5bee22.description: The rug is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by _dispel magic_, the rug must succeed on a CON save against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

08c1b9f1-c41e-56e0-b60f-cd82d5105fcf.name: Construct Nature (Rug of Smothering)
08c1b9f1-c41e-56e0-b60f-cd82d5105fcf.description: The rug doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The rug doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

bb929d3a-e08d-5b34-98cf-53bd2044c500.name: Construct Resilience (Rug of Smothering)
bb929d3a-e08d-5b34-98cf-53bd2044c500.description: The rug is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

attributes.description: The rug is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

8213aec4-f98a-51d6-b73e-bcb3e1582259.name: Damage Transfer (Rug of Smothering)
8213aec4-f98a-51d6-b73e-bcb3e1582259.description: While it is grappling a creature, the rug takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down), and the creature grappled by the rug takes the other half.

attributes.description: While it is grappling a creature, the rug takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down), and the creature grappled by the rug takes the other half.

afb9af3a-ffe6-529d-bca9-779ae844155d.name: False Appearance (Rug of Smothering)
afb9af3a-ffe6-529d-bca9-779ae844155d.description: While the rug remains motionless and isn't flying, it is indistinguishable from a normal rug.

attributes.description: While the rug remains motionless and isn't flying, it is indistinguishable from a normal rug.

8103ce5a-d038-5c77-8767-fc241e6fe407.name: Rolling Charge
8103ce5a-d038-5c77-8767-fc241e6fe407.description: If it isn't grappling a creature, the rug curls up and rolls along the ground up to triple its speed straight toward a creature it can sense. If it stops within 5 feet of the target, it can make one Smother attack against the target.

attributes.description: If it isn't grappling a creature, the rug curls up and rolls along the ground up to triple its speed straight toward a creature it can sense. If it stops within 5 feet of the target, it can make one Smother attack against the target.

c76d3801-db56-5861-ae7d-76033f43b3ce.name: Smother
c76d3801-db56-5861-ae7d-76033f43b3ce.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, blinded, and unable to breathe, and the rug can't fly and can't Smother another target.

c15a4cad-850b-5278-a975-4e582419bd62.name: Squeeze Prey
c15a4cad-850b-5278-a975-4e582419bd62.description: The rug of smothering tightens around a creature it is grappling. The target must make a DC 13 STR save, taking 18 (4d8) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A breathing creature that fails this save by 5 or more has the remaining air squeezed from its lungs and begins suffocating.

60080abb-2ed0-5f1c-a92e-2af84ca6b9a1.name: Iron Scent
60080abb-2ed0-5f1c-a92e-2af84ca6b9a1.description: The rust monster can pinpoint, by scent, the location of ferrous metal within 30 feet of it.

f48f7b63-1f63-5670-a10d-294f252aa2fc.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Rust Monster)
f48f7b63-1f63-5670-a10d-294f252aa2fc.description: The rust monster is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The rust monster is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

cd4f08de-abb7-558f-a1da-038fca508056.name: Rust Metal
cd4f08de-abb7-558f-a1da-038fca508056.description: Any nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits the rust monster corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Nonmagical ammunition made of metal that hits the rust monster is destroyed after dealing damage.

b2624540-c225-5e70-8ef8-8f6593831dd2.name: Spider Climb (Rust Monster)
b2624540-c225-5e70-8ef8-8f6593831dd2.description: The rust monster can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The rust monster can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

f50eccae-a99c-531f-8526-3631592f2a70.name: Antennae
f50eccae-a99c-531f-8526-3631592f2a70.description:
The rust monster corrodes a nonmagical ferrous metal object it can see within 5 feet of it. If the object isn't being worn or carried, the touch destroys a 1-foot cube of it. If the object is being worn or carried by a creature, the creature can make a DC 11 DEX save to avoid the rust monster's touch.
If the object touched is either metal armor or a metal shield being worn or carried, it takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC it offers. Armor reduced to an AC of 10 or a shield that drops to a +0 bonus is destroyed. If the object touched is a held metal weapon, it rusts as described in the Rust Metal trait.

a4b39893-7b82-5911-a86b-b5e123014f8a.description: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating.

69700834-414c-5acb-93bc-88411e952d1c.description: If the sahuagin ends its turn within 10 feet of at least two other friendly sahuagin or sharks, the sahuagin can snap its teeth at one creature within 15 feet of it that it can see and that can see or hear it. The target must succeed on a DC 11 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

42ffe38e-ea42-5bbc-9de2-70948eecab68.name: Intoxicating Bolt
42ffe38e-ea42-5bbc-9de2-70948eecab68.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

f9d094d2-49dd-5128-a742-14aa5b3370ab.name: Revelries
f9d094d2-49dd-5128-a742-14aa5b3370ab.description:
The satyr dances and plays a tune on its pipes, affecting one creature it can see within 30 feet of it in one of the following ways. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CHA save or gain the listed effect. A willing creature can choose to fail the save.
- **Celebrate.** The target feels invigorated by the music, dancing along with it. Until the start of the satyr's next turn, the target has advantage on DEX saves and on the next attack roll it makes.
- **Overindulge.** The satyr's song is laced with magical enchantments, and the target is forced to dance along with the music. Until the start of the satyr's next turn, the target is charmed, and its speed is reduced by 10 feet, as it dances uncontrollably.
- **Unnerve.** The satyr's song and dance turn frightful with heavy stomps, shrill notes, and a rapid, staccato melody. The target is frightened until the end of its next turn.

Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, an ignited creature takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

81f1a835-9dd4-588a-b043-887c9e6e5ad1.name: Fan the Flames
81f1a835-9dd4-588a-b043-887c9e6e5ad1.description: The scorch drake flaps its wings in the direction of one ignited creature it can see within 15 feet of it. The flames coating the target flare up and generate excess smoke. The target must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The scorch drake flaps its wings in the direction of one ignited creature it can see within 15 feet of it. The flames coating the target flare up and generate excess smoke. The target must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

91130752-88e5-59e4-8ac0-1c862cf04450.name: Fire Breath (Scorch Drake)
91130752-88e5-59e4-8ac0-1c862cf04450.description: The scorch drake spits liquid fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 DEX save. On a failure, a creature takes 24 (7d6) fire damage and ignites. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't ignite. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, an ignited creature takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. This fire ignites flammable objects in the line that aren't being worn or carried.

81a5c1b9-3c88-506e-8f29-35687d68c152.description: The scout's Perception is 18 when perceiving by hearing or sight.

fa5b5538-8a23-5eab-a09d-047067114470.name: Escape to Report
fa5b5538-8a23-5eab-a09d-047067114470.description: The scout takes the Dash or Disengage action.

c86491b4-b587-53e9-8973-18dee7e4b3d7.name: Multiattack (Scout)
c86491b4-b587-53e9-8973-18dee7e4b3d7.description: The scout makes two Shortsword or Shortbow attacks.

0bab7eb9-1da8-5d04-9a23-ec9652d57ea6.name: Shortbow (Scout)
0bab7eb9-1da8-5d04-9a23-ec9652d57ea6.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, ranged 80/320 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage.

c52399ba-c0da-5c96-9068-df2b4c5f0270.name: Amphibious (Sea Hag)
c52399ba-c0da-5c96-9068-df2b4c5f0270.description: The sea hag can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The sea hag can breathe air and water.

745baa65-e77e-5526-b795-44e2f8ae7a3c.name: Fey Resilience (Sea Hag)
745baa65-e77e-5526-b795-44e2f8ae7a3c.description: The sea hag is resistant to the charmed and unconscious conditions.

attributes.description: The sea hag is resistant to the charmed and unconscious conditions.

9dec8926-002b-5a63-baef-ced7bdc8a38e.name: Horrific Appearance
9dec8926-002b-5a63-baef-ced7bdc8a38e.description: When a Humanoid that can see the hag's true form starts its turn within 30 feet of the hag, the hag can force it to make a DC 12 WIS save. On a failure, the creature is frightened until the start of its next turn. Unless surprised or the revelation of the hag's true form is sudden, such as the ending of Illusory Appearance, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the save at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the hag until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the hag in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

31b58036-388c-5608-954f-f22aa2c55dc7.description: The hag's Stealth is 18 while underwater and not using Illusory Appearance.

attributes.description: The hag's Stealth is 18 while underwater and not using Illusory Appearance.

b2c0240b-6233-5d16-890a-423244b4d15d.name: Barnacle Block
b2c0240b-6233-5d16-890a-423244b4d15d.description: When the hag takes damage from a source it can see, the hag can shift the barnacles and scales on its body to absorb some of the impact, reducing the damage by 4 (1d8).

266df359-c57b-50b5-a7a1-6e013cf9b884.name: Death Glare
266df359-c57b-50b5-a7a1-6e013cf9b884.description: One creature the hag can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 12 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its next turn. If the target is already frightened and fails the save, it is reduced to 0 HP instead. If reduced to 0 HP in this way, the creature is stable.

attributes.description: One creature the hag can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 12 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its next turn. If the target is already frightened and fails the save, it is reduced to 0 HP instead. If reduced to 0 HP in this way, the creature is stable.

23b214b7-7da8-523d-8c6e-55b70aafe6b7.name: Illusory Appearance (Sea Hag)
23b214b7-7da8-523d-8c6e-55b70aafe6b7.description:
The hag covers itself and anything it is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes it look like another creature of its general size and Humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the hag takes a bonus action to end it or if the hag dies.
The changes from this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, the hag could appear to have smooth skin, but someone touching it would feel its scaly flesh. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 20 INT (Investigation) check to discern that the hag is disguised.

5add2a0d-6d09-5eec-89b6-66a7c5bd062c.description: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

attributes.description: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

d53790b5-6d15-55b0-8599-a8d4dc1a2536.name: Charge (Seahorse, Giant)
d53790b5-6d15-55b0-8599-a8d4dc1a2536.description: If the seahorse moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a Ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 12 STR save or be knocked prone.

43abb982-5f22-585f-b64d-cb3739c62df0.name: Grasping Tail
43abb982-5f22-585f-b64d-cb3739c62df0.description: The seahorse grabs one Medium or smaller creature within 10 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 12 STR save or be grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the seahorse can't use Grasping Tail on another creature.

3398af9f-4220-5491-8d18-5741699e0882.description: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

46ccbbcb-5ce5-5dc0-967e-2416a055a85c.name: Shadow Bond
46ccbbcb-5ce5-5dc0-967e-2416a055a85c.description: One creature the shadow can see within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 12 WIS save or the shadow bonds with the target's shadow for 1 minute. While bonded with the target's shadow, the shadow can use this bonus action to teleport to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of that creature, provided the creature is within 120 feet of the shadow.

bd4d147a-e5c6-51f0-80f4-25c90828b6b9.name: Shadow Stealth
bd4d147a-e5c6-51f0-80f4-25c90828b6b9.description: The shadow takes the Hide action. It can use this bonus action only while in dim light or darkness.

93b26d2c-7c91-5a4a-a5dd-74da36a87b80.name: Strength Drain
93b26d2c-7c91-5a4a-a5dd-74da36a87b80.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 9 (2d6+2) necrotic damage, and the target's STR score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its STR to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest. If a Humanoid dies from this attack, a new shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.

99ad1c4b-e638-59a8-a43c-ad9b44f7d71b.name: Rotting Vegetation
99ad1c4b-e638-59a8-a43c-ad9b44f7d71b.description: The shambling mound emits the smell of rotting vegetation. A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the shambling mound must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

b5f907ba-395b-57df-9d5e-ade24b4102a5.name: Engulf (Shambling Mound)
b5f907ba-395b-57df-9d5e-ade24b4102a5.description: The shambling mound engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. In addition to being grappled, the engulfed target is blinded, restrained, and unable to breathe, and it must succeed on a DC 14 CON save at the start of each of the mound's turns or take 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage and 3 (1d6) poison damage. If the mound moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The mound can have only one creature engulfed at a time.

68a2c443-6f72-5ba2-bb3b-a613652fcc1a.description: The shark moves up to half its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see. This movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

d76535ec-85d4-56f8-bd66-36ccd2ef10c8.description: The shark can pinpoint, by scent, the location of creatures that don't have all of their HP within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

38fcc8bd-301f-5797-a973-e95d29b1bb3b.description: Whenever the shark takes lightning damage, it must succeed on a DC 11 CON save or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

ef4a21f0-7aa1-54f4-85b7-3c24ac0479de.description: The shark has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the shark's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

c3a308d9-8b89-5d1f-9048-a97de7857361.name: Stealthy Hunter (Shark, Reef)
c3a308d9-8b89-5d1f-9048-a97de7857361.description: The shark takes the Hide action.

33b9c550-9db9-5960-83c4-8777572ed6ef.name: Bound
33b9c550-9db9-5960-83c4-8777572ed6ef.description: The shield guardian is magically bound to an amulet. As long as the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet's wearer, and the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian, teleporting the guardian to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the wearer after 1 minute. In addition, if the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (rounded up) is taken by the guardian instead.

0067a576-312d-53df-bee5-484c6f897a21.name: Construct Nature (Shield Guardian)
0067a576-312d-53df-bee5-484c6f897a21.description: The shield guardian doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

1faec657-2e08-51ab-bc47-f53a7e5282cc.name: Construct Resilience (Shield Guardian)
1faec657-2e08-51ab-bc47-f53a7e5282cc.description: The shield guardian is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

attributes.description: The shield guardian is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

2576f731-d6af-5825-88cd-0490181dbdba.name: Regeneration (Shield Guardian)
2576f731-d6af-5825-88cd-0490181dbdba.description: The shield guardian regains 10 HP at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP.

attributes.description: The shield guardian regains 10 HP at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP.

ffdf33e5-fa8d-51fa-95af-bddd0655372e.name: Spell Storing
ffdf33e5-fa8d-51fa-95af-bddd0655372e.description: A spellcaster who wears the shield guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of 4th level or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. When commanded to do so by the wearer or when a situation arises that was predefined by the spellcaster, the guardian casts the stored spell, using the appropriate action required by the spell, with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no components. When the spell is cast or a new spell is stored, any previously stored spell is lost.

51f81f36-16e8-584a-bcb5-c7e1b58618e7.name: Multiattack (Shield Guardian)
51f81f36-16e8-584a-bcb5-c7e1b58618e7.description: The shield guardian makes two Runed Fist attacks, or it makes three Rune Bolt attacks.

attributes.description: The shield guardian makes two Runed Fist attacks, or it makes three Rune Bolt attacks.

556bdf5a-1572-5bb7-b0de-d572826ea533.name: Protective Step
556bdf5a-1572-5bb7-b0de-d572826ea533.description: The guardian teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see within 5 feet of the amulet's wearer.

attributes.description: The guardian teleports up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space it can see within 5 feet of the amulet's wearer.

073657e4-9064-56ac-8c03-03abbe82d110.name: Rune Bolt
073657e4-9064-56ac-8c03-03abbe82d110.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 16 (4d6+2) force damage.

attributes.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 16 (4d6+2) force damage.

15f7b5a7-93c9-5c24-a2fc-6181a282b6c5.name: Runed Fist
15f7b5a7-93c9-5c24-a2fc-6181a282b6c5.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d8+4) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d8) force damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 13 (2d8+4) bludgeoning damage plus 14 (4d8) force damage.

282fb88d-c636-57b5-b22c-114bad20207a.name: Shield
282fb88d-c636-57b5-b22c-114bad20207a.description: When a creature the guardian can see makes an attack against the amulet's wearer, the guardian grants a +2 bonus to the wearer's AC if the guardian is within 5 feet of the wearer.

attributes.description: When a creature the guardian can see makes an attack against the amulet's wearer, the guardian grants a +2 bonus to the wearer's AC if the guardian is within 5 feet of the wearer.

8b67c78c-b3a4-5672-bd1f-7d13bfd820ef.name: False Appearance (Shrieker)
8b67c78c-b3a4-5672-bd1f-7d13bfd820ef.description: While the shrieker remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

attributes.description: While the shrieker remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

a34e0bbe-6957-5c75-8e91-0c06e9336f0d.name: Plant Resilience (Shrieker)
a34e0bbe-6957-5c75-8e91-0c06e9336f0d.description: The shrieker is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

attributes.description: The shrieker is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

9f84d1bc-918b-537c-b5c3-6914d71f87b3.name: Shriek
9f84d1bc-918b-537c-b5c3-6914d71f87b3.description:
The shrieker emits a high-pitched shriek audible within 300 feet of it. Each creature within 30 feet of it that isn't a Plant and that can hear the shriek must succeed on a DC 10 WIS save or be frightened until the shriek ends. The shrieker must use a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue shrieking. It can stop shrieking at any time. The shriek ends if the shrieker is incapacitated.
A frightened creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature that successfully saves is immune to the frightened effect of this shrieker's Shriek for the next 24 hours.

aa28eaa5-cb8e-5fa3-a423-2785cd3ff5d7.name: Startled Shriek
aa28eaa5-cb8e-5fa3-a423-2785cd3ff5d7.description: When bright light or a creature other than a Plant moves to within 30 feet of the shrieker, the shrieker can use Shriek, if it isn't already shrieking.

attributes.description: When bright light or a creature other than a Plant moves to within 30 feet of the shrieker, the shrieker can use Shriek, if it isn't already shrieking.

22d6ed75-cdf7-51fb-8e4f-cc3041f5eb6a.name: Thunderous Burst
22d6ed75-cdf7-51fb-8e4f-cc3041f5eb6a.description: The shrieker emits a concentrated burst of sound at one creature it can sense within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 10 DEX save, taking 2 (1d4) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The shrieker emits a concentrated burst of sound at one creature it can sense within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 10 DEX save, taking 2 (1d4) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

65cb287b-25f4-54b4-a163-97bf370a2a6d.name: Amphibious (Sila)
65cb287b-25f4-54b4-a163-97bf370a2a6d.description: The sila can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The sila can breathe air and water.

1a821631-e3b6-551a-a075-1de610fada6a.name: Fluid Body (Bipedal Form Only)
1a821631-e3b6-551a-a075-1de610fada6a.description: The sila can move through the space of any creature, regardless of size, and a creature of any size can move through a sila's space. In addition, the sila can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The sila can move through the space of any creature, regardless of size, and a creature of any size can move through a sila's space. In addition, the sila can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

9442bfcb-6765-5658-99a2-8f952fb0a90e.name: Nebulous (Cloud Form Only) (Sila)
9442bfcb-6765-5658-99a2-8f952fb0a90e.description: The sila's Stealth is 21, it can hover while flying, can't manipulate objects or attack, and it can pass through any space air or water can pass through without squeezing. In addition, it can enter and hide in any Tiny or larger container, such as a pouch, lamp, backpack, or barrel.

251cb89e-2e0d-5984-9fa2-0029c54ad82a.name: Clouded Eyes
251cb89e-2e0d-5984-9fa2-0029c54ad82a.description: The sila condenses the air or water around the head or eyes of up to two creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 17 DEX save or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The sila condenses the air or water around the head or eyes of up to two creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 17 DEX save or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

48949416-2777-5095-9483-34509014b78e.name: Cold-Infused Jambiya
48949416-2777-5095-9483-34509014b78e.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 14 (2d8+5) slashing damage plus 5 (2d4) cold damage.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 14 (2d8+5) slashing damage plus 5 (2d4) cold damage.

2624cfda-e684-5bfe-89f8-6978ab915cef.name: Create Water Elemental
2624cfda-e684-5bfe-89f8-6978ab915cef.description: The sila magically creates one water-based Elemental of CR 5 or lower in an unoccupied space the sila can see within 30 feet of it. The elemental acts as an ally of the sila, obeying its spoken commands. The elemental remains for 1 hour, until the sila dies, or until the sila dismisses it as a bonus action.

attributes.description: The sila magically creates one water-based Elemental of CR 5 or lower in an unoccupied space the sila can see within 30 feet of it. The elemental acts as an ally of the sila, obeying its spoken commands. The elemental remains for 1 hour, until the sila dies, or until the sila dismisses it as a bonus action.

693d8cc7-56cf-56ba-9e3c-ba3823903166.name: Genie Shape (Sila)
693d8cc7-56cf-56ba-9e3c-ba3823903166.description: The sila magically transforms into a Medium cloud of thick mist that leaves droplets of water on everything it touches or back into its bipedal form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its bipedal form if it dies. The sila can't use this bonus action to transform into its bipedal form while inside a Medium or smaller container.

5c4da853-82ec-5852-86ea-40303ff38db0.name: Multiattack (Sila)
5c4da853-82ec-5852-86ea-40303ff38db0.description: The sila makes four Cold-Infused Jambiya or Water Burst attacks. If two Water Burst attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be pushed up to 15 feet away from the sila.

attributes.description: The sila makes four Cold-Infused Jambiya or Water Burst attacks. If two Water Burst attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be pushed up to 15 feet away from the sila.

f07a73a0-f91e-58fa-af7c-52c9a6adfdef.name: Travel the Planes (Sila)
f07a73a0-f91e-58fa-af7c-52c9a6adfdef.description: The sila transports itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except it can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature.

attributes.description: The sila transports itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except it can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature.

286f24ad-613e-5416-9e63-7920b91ac15f.name: Water Burst

7837eda3-61ba-5eeb-9729-263629bf5399.name: Cold Breath (Silver Dragon Wyrmling)
7837eda3-61ba-5eeb-9729-263629bf5399.description: The dragon exhales an icy blast in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 CON save, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

e7a09f9e-c40e-5a09-9f97-759c5294bbfc.name: Paralyzing Breath (Silver Dragon Wyrmling)
e7a09f9e-c40e-5a09-9f97-759c5294bbfc.description: The dragon exhales paralyzing gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

cff35c79-d4d3-5995-bcb9-11cb5fb06e96.name: False Appearance (Skeleton)

a9fd05dc-385c-55a7-83ec-53d665e26e2b.description: When a creature the skeleton can see hits it with an attack, the skeleton can make one Shortsword or Shortbow attack against the attacker.

attributes.description: When a creature the skeleton can see hits it with an attack, the skeleton can make one Shortsword or Shortbow attack against the attacker.

e48e65ac-c567-5c16-9f87-232d7a780709.name: Heightened Hearing (Skullbloom)

a61e78db-2165-54d5-b987-cdec47ffa4bc.description: The skullbloom is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

ca2d25af-ddbc-5da8-adfa-27ae383a1731.description: The skullboom takes the Dash action toward an uninfected Humanoid it can see or sense.

948bf27b-fdfa-5e28-a8f8-bfbb174f631f.name: Multiattack (Skullbloom)
948bf27b-fdfa-5e28-a8f8-bfbb174f631f.description: The skullbloom makes one Bite attack and one Slam attack. If the Bite and Slam attacks both hit one Humanoid, the target must succeed on a DC 12 CON save or be infected with apocalyptic fungus (see sidebar).

3b99c28d-ec87-533d-a3da-fcebfab7cc78.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 6 (1d8+2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12), if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the snake can't Constrict another target.

2abff80f-0811-5305-a340-2951a053c481.description: When a creature the snake can see attacks it, the snake can move up to 5 feet. If this movement puts the snake out of reach of the attack, the attack misses.

2b161aa5-4d7c-5e66-9a82-2a999b730b4d.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 CON save, taking 5 (2d4) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

4714f4b0-1309-566a-9f62-a24cd36a5abd.description: When a creature the snake can see hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it, the snake can make a quick nip at the creature. The attacker must succeed on a DC 11 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

96230a5d-343e-507e-ae69-10cd60d93e01.name: Poisonous Swarm
96230a5d-343e-507e-ae69-10cd60d93e01.description: The hissing, spitting, and constant nipping of snakes in the swarm leaves the swarm's space dripping with poison. A creature that starts its turn in the swarm's space must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

1eb23762-fdf8-5e73-9123-49f2942ffab8.name: Swarm (Snake, Swarm of Poisonous Snakes)
1eb23762-fdf8-5e73-9123-49f2942ffab8.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny snake. The swarm can't regain HP or gain temporary HP.

d47823ec-f4d7-51b2-a2a7-738217a08fdc.name: Bites (Snake, Swarm of Poisonous Snakes)
d47823ec-f4d7-51b2-a2a7-738217a08fdc.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. _Hit:_ 10 (4d4) piercing damage, or 5 (2d4) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its HP or fewer.
