bf43ba79-ad77-5088-a2b7-d67a78b8672c.name: Angelic Resilience (Solar)
bf43ba79-ad77-5088-a2b7-d67a78b8672c.description: The solar is resistant to radiant damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed and frightened conditions.

attributes.description: The solar is resistant to radiant damage and to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed and frightened conditions.

a4344d45-c2e9-5630-be15-11a3f0e71b2c.name: Angelic Senses (Solar)
a4344d45-c2e9-5630-be15-11a3f0e71b2c.description: The solar can pinpoint the location of Aberrations, Celestials, Fiends, and Undead within 30 feet of it and knows if a place or object it can sense is consecrated or desecrated.

attributes.description: The solar can pinpoint the location of Aberrations, Celestials, Fiends, and Undead within 30 feet of it and knows if a place or object it can sense is consecrated or desecrated.

d6f0ab1c-eb97-5a06-8895-a9c83ac3db10.name: Angelic Weapons (Solar)
d6f0ab1c-eb97-5a06-8895-a9c83ac3db10.description: The solar's weapon attacks are magical. When the solar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 6d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).

8c1ab124-735a-5073-9cb9-26fffeb7a672.name: Divine Awareness (Solar)
8c1ab124-735a-5073-9cb9-26fffeb7a672.description: The solar knows if it hears a lie.

3291350b-58e0-5aed-a2ba-363509ede870.name: Divine Protection (Solar)

5eadf237-92f5-5689-beef-a1e4335144c8.name: Immortal Nature (Solar)

c856b1fb-4b4c-583e-aa3e-84f3d48ceac6.name: Magic Resistance (Solar)
c856b1fb-4b4c-583e-aa3e-84f3d48ceac6.description: The solar has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

f4c38ced-f544-5628-8c1f-3aec489612cc.name: Celestial Tactics
f4c38ced-f544-5628-8c1f-3aec489612cc.description:
The solar uses one of the following tactics:
- **Empower Strikes.** The solar sends divine power into the weapons of up to two friendly creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target has advantage on the next weapon attack roll it makes before the start of the solar's next turn. If that attack hits, the weapon deals an extra 7 (2d6) radiant damage.
- **Inspire Resolve.** One friendly creature the solar can see within 30 feet of it gains 14 (4d6) temporary HP and becomes immune to the charmed and frightened conditions until the start of the solar's next turn, ending any effect currently causing the target to be charmed or frightened.
- **Manipulate Battlefield.** The solar commands up to three friendly creatures it can see to reposition themselves on the battlefield. Each target can use a reaction to move up to half its speed in a direction of the solar's choice. This movement is unaffected by difficult terrain and doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

9751fab0-9ef2-55c0-9b95-1f66cb758b77.description: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

63167370-dd3b-5012-a293-f9f000d357ae.description: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 12 (3d6+2) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 12 CON save or its HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.

715d907a-0b72-59f2-b6a3-a374558eb278.description: The spider launches a gob of webbing at one creature it can see within 15 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 9 DEX save or have its speed reduced by 10 feet. A creature can take an action to remove the webbing, ending the effect.

If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 HP, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining HP, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

e5b40a5d-ab03-59e7-81ce-a4c151b84e83.description: The spider launches a gob of webbing at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 12 DEX save or be restrained. A creature, including the restrained target, can take its action to free the target from the webbing by succeeding on a DC 12 STR check. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; HP 5; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

a637f250-ac83-56b3-9231-51ccdad5f086.name: Guardian Projection
a637f250-ac83-56b3-9231-51ccdad5f086.description: The spirit naga's skeletal form is covered with a magical illusion that makes it look like the guardian naga it was in life. The naga can use a bonus action to dismiss this illusion until the end of its next turn. The changes wrought by this illusion fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, a creature touching the spirit naga would feel its rough, dry scales and exposed bones instead of the smooth, cool scales of a guardian naga. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 20 INT (Investigation) check to discern the spirit naga's true appearance.

Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save.

18c5f0dc-ca75-5920-9da3-5cd095f71285.name: Blinding Burst
18c5f0dc-ca75-5920-9da3-5cd095f71285.description: The star crow dims then suddenly bursts with blinding light. Each creature within 30 feet of the star crow must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The star crow dims then suddenly bursts with blinding light. Each creature within 30 feet of the star crow must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

ac9605f9-412c-51b5-b6d8-0c0a468259eb.name: Radiant Touch
ac9605f9-412c-51b5-b6d8-0c0a468259eb.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d4+3) radiant damage, and the star crow attaches to the target. While attached, the star crow can use only the Thought Share action and Blinding Burst bonus action, and it moves with the target whenever the target moves, requiring none of the star crow's movement. The star crow can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the star crow by succeeding on a DC 13 STR check.

44faa032-0ffb-528a-a2d2-65855733b92e.name: Thought Share
44faa032-0ffb-528a-a2d2-65855733b92e.description: The star crow learns some of the attached target's memories, and the attached target experiences a rapid sequence of memories from other creatures the star crow has encountered. The target takes 5 (2d4) psychic damage and must succeed on a DC 13 CHA save or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

78c2b7f4-0681-5b50-9457-c131efc7e7d1.name: Death Burst (Steam Mephit)
78c2b7f4-0681-5b50-9457-c131efc7e7d1.description: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a cloud of steam. Each creature within 5 feet of the mephit must succeed on a DC 11 DEX save or be scalded for 1 minute. A scalded creature has disadvantage on weapon attack rolls and on ability checks that require manual dexterity. A scalded creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

8f0244db-44c6-56c0-ba2d-1e43a4f7af04.name: Hazy Form
8f0244db-44c6-56c0-ba2d-1e43a4f7af04.description: The mephit casts the blur spell, requiring no material components and using WIS as the spellcasting ability.

6071e03c-50b2-55e4-b09a-da74d326b5c1.name: Steam Blast
6071e03c-50b2-55e4-b09a-da74d326b5c1.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage

30aa4c60-0448-52b5-9174-825f8865a700.name: Steam Breath (Steam Mephit)
30aa4c60-0448-52b5-9174-825f8865a700.description: The mephit exhales superheated breath in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 CON save. On a failure, a creature takes 5 (2d4) fire damage and suffers one level of exhaustion. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't suffer exhaustion. A creature can't suffer more than two levels of exhaustion from a steam mephit's Steam Breath, regardless of the number of times it fails the save or the number of steam mephits using Steam Breath against it.

b447584c-72a9-5f88-b48a-7635b008f2ca.name: Blood Drain
b447584c-72a9-5f88-b48a-7635b008f2ca.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage, and the stirge attaches to the target. While attached, the stirge can't attack, and at the start of each of the stirge's turns, the target loses 4 (1d4+2) HP due to blood loss. The attached stirge moves with the target whenever the target moves, requiring none of the stirge's movement. If can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement on its turn. It does so after it drains 8 HP of blood from the target or the target dies. A creature, including the target, can use its action to detach the stirge.

e7a84793-7b47-5f9f-b3cb-f18eb5d9bf75.name: Reactive Wiggle
e7a84793-7b47-5f9f-b3cb-f18eb5d9bf75.description: When the stirge is the target of an attack from a creature within 5 feet of it while it is attached to a creature, the stirge can wiggle, exposing the flesh where it is attached. The attacker must succeed on a DC 12 DEX save or the attack targets the creature to which the stirge is attached instead of the stirge.

3019e58d-c22c-5dc0-b545-da9a685ceb88.name: Giant Attributes (Stone Giant)
3019e58d-c22c-5dc0-b545-da9a685ceb88.description: The stone giant is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

ed758239-7a0e-5146-ad11-8a97928dbfcc.name: Stone Camouflage (Stone Giant)
ed758239-7a0e-5146-ad11-8a97928dbfcc.description: The giant's Stealth is 20 while in rocky terrain.

d9b9ed3d-d1e7-510d-a2a8-dbb8b3a008f3.name: Missile Deflection
d9b9ed3d-d1e7-510d-a2a8-dbb8b3a008f3.description: If a creature the giant can see makes a ranged weapon attack against the giant, the giant can add 3 to its AC. If the attack misses, the giant can catch the missile, provided the attack included a projectile, and throw it back at the attacker, using the giant's normal ranged weapon attack bonus and the weapon's normal damage.

8e44adf8-df14-51b9-a82b-20cbb81f65d5.name: Multiattack (Stone Giant)
8e44adf8-df14-51b9-a82b-20cbb81f65d5.description: The giant makes two Stony Fist or Rock attacks.

9993882d-f3dc-596d-b688-e1c6f97d2616.name: Rock (Stone Giant)
9993882d-f3dc-596d-b688-e1c6f97d2616.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 28 (4d10+6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be knocked prone.

16e669a6-1ac4-5103-a281-7d5edcfcd085.name: Stony Fist
16e669a6-1ac4-5103-a281-7d5edcfcd085.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 24 (4d8+6) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the stone giant isn't already grappling a creature.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 24 (4d8+6) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the stone giant isn't already grappling a creature.

4a9608ed-fe4c-547e-b493-3856343864c6.name: Wrestle
4a9608ed-fe4c-547e-b493-3856343864c6.description:
The stone giant performs one of the following wrestling maneuvers against one creature it is grappling. The target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or suffer the listed effect until the stone giant uses this bonus action again or until the grapple ends.
- **Armbar.** The target has disadvantage on attack rolls and on checks made to escape the grapple.
- **Chinlock.** The target can't speak and can't cast spells with verbal components.
- **Takedown.** The target is knocked prone and restrained.
- **Throw.** The target is thrown up to 30 feet in a random direction and knocked prone, ending the grapple. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 17 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

attributes.description:

- **Chinlock.** The target can't speak and can't cast spells with verbal components.

If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 17 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

b11c7f0c-eb34-55bd-bb48-c30a63549c67.name: Rearrange Stone
b11c7f0c-eb34-55bd-bb48-c30a63549c67.description:
The stone golem rearranges some of the stone comprising its body, choosing one of the following arrangements. The arrangement lasts until the golem ends the effect as a bonus action, uses this bonus action again, or until it is incapacitated.
- **Jagged Stones.** The golem turns several of the stones on its body to point outward. Its AC is reduced by 2, and each time a creature within 5 feet of the golem hits it with a melee attack, the attacker takes 5 (2d4) piercing damage.
- **Protective Slabs.** The golem slides several flat stones around its body to protect its vulnerable areas. Its speed is reduced by 10 feet, and each time it takes damage, the damage is reduced by 5 (2d4).

0edb1d04-cbb6-5425-8864-da3b0d4a8632.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 21 (3d10+5) bludgeoning damage.

4e322cfd-a5cd-5941-b871-81c1e625fbdc.name: Slow
4e322cfd-a5cd-5941-b871-81c1e625fbdc.description: The golem shares the plodding perception of timeless stone with those nearby, slowing all life to a crawl. Each creature within 10 feet of the golem must make a DC 17 WIS save. On a failure, a creature can't use reactions, its speed is halved, and it can't make more than one attack on its turn. In addition, the creature can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both. These effects last for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

978008e7-9829-5913-aa7d-d0e4b6aab9ca.name: Amphibious (Storm Giant)
978008e7-9829-5913-aa7d-d0e4b6aab9ca.description: The giant can breathe air and water.

44c518c2-d3d4-5144-965c-238551ae5259.name: Giant Attributes (Storm Giant)
44c518c2-d3d4-5144-965c-238551ae5259.description: The giant is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

attributes.description: The giant is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

89ff8c7f-5e2a-56e6-a2bd-601c50af961b.name: Influence Weather
89ff8c7f-5e2a-56e6-a2bd-601c50af961b.description: Nearby weather responds to the storm giant's desires. At the start of each minute, the storm giant can choose to change the precipitation, temperature, and wind within 3 miles of it by one stage, up or down (no action required). This effect works like the changing weather conditions aspect of the control weather spell, except the conditions change immediately and the storm giant can't change the temperature by more than one stage up or down from the area's standard temperature.

f636c584-e1e8-5e75-9f99-35a4d2e13bca.name: Lightning Bolt (Storm Giant)
f636c584-e1e8-5e75-9f99-35a4d2e13bca.description: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +9 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 22 (4d8+4) lightning damage. If the giant scores a critical hit, the target must succeed on a DC 17 CON save or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

36ad8413-786e-5f2e-be1e-136ea0ecaaca.name: Stormy Rebuke
36ad8413-786e-5f2e-be1e-136ea0ecaaca.description: When a creature the storm giant can see hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of the giant, the giant can send a stormy blast at the creature. The attacker must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be pushed up to 15 feet away from the giant and knocked prone.

bd758028-a940-58f0-b83f-5570d2f0181d.name: Thunderous Strike
bd758028-a940-58f0-b83f-5570d2f0181d.description: The giant hurls a magical lightning bolt at a point it can see within 500 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 17 DEX save. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) lightning damage and 21 (6d6) thunder damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned.

0f54c0df-85af-5961-be67-bb00a5463310.name: Telepathic Bond
0f54c0df-85af-5961-be67-bb00a5463310.description: The succubus ignores the range restriction on its telepathy when communicating with a creature it has charmed. The two don't even need to be on the same plane of existence.

1514a651-6dec-5d80-af80-58c5121864b6.name: Change Shape (Succubus)
1514a651-6dec-5d80-af80-58c5121864b6.description: The succubus transforms into a Small or Medium Humanoid or back into its true form, which is Fiend. Without wings, it loses its flying speed. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

942dc23d-9b64-5130-9d7c-15bab3254e26.name: Charm
942dc23d-9b64-5130-9d7c-15bab3254e26.description:
One Humanoid the succubus can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 WIS save or be magically charmed for 1 day, until the succubus dies, or until the succubus takes a bonus action to end the effect. The charmed target obeys the succubus's verbal or telepathic commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to this succubus's Charm for the next 24 hours.
The succubus can have only one target charmed at a time. If it charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.

e1d470cb-a0a9-5598-b018-c4925a10e822.description: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is charmed, incapacitated, or restrained. _Hit:_ 15 (3d6+5) psychic damage, and the target's HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.

7293f6e8-25a3-5359-987e-e187eb55f84d.description: The tarrasque is resistant to exhaustion.

758308c9-7ad2-501c-bacd-a9fa1a8da796.name: Reflective Hide
758308c9-7ad2-501c-bacd-a9fa1a8da796.description: Any time the tarrasque is targeted by a magic missile spell, a line spell, or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll a d6. On a 1 to 5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected, and the effect is reflected back at the caster as though it originated from the tarrasque, turning the caster into the target.

a2ac4b4a-a82d-5cfb-a9db-cc2b59ada5f8.name: Siege Behemoth
a2ac4b4a-a82d-5cfb-a9db-cc2b59ada5f8.description: The tarrasque deals triple damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The tarrasque deals triple damage to objects and structures.

06e4c630-ce85-5a65-b756-8906b8f92d15.name: Acid Spit (Tarrasque)
06e4c630-ce85-5a65-b756-8906b8f92d15.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +12 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 36 (6d10+3) acid damage.

attributes.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +12 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 36 (6d10+3) acid damage.

2e68abea-80c6-5394-a29a-b84eb2bc06ef.name: Bite (Tarrasque)
2e68abea-80c6-5394-a29a-b84eb2bc06ef.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +19 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 36 (4d12+10) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 27 DEX save or be swallowed by the tarrasque. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effect outside of the tarrasque, and it takes 42 (12d6) acid damage at the start of each of the tarrasque's turns. If the tarrasque takes 60 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the tarrasque must succeed on a DC 20 CON save at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the tarrasque. If the tarrasque dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

131c0106-7e33-5746-b646-742a252c6169.name: Detect (Tarrasque)
131c0106-7e33-5746-b646-742a252c6169.description: The tarrasque automatically detects every creature and trap within 60 feet of it, pinpointing the current location of each.

b904ba57-6806-53b2-bcc8-eb748c59ce04.name: Frightful Presence (Tarrasque)
b904ba57-6806-53b2-bcc8-eb748c59ce04.description: Each creature of the tarrasque's choice within 120 feet of it and aware of it must succeed on a DC 27 WIS save or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's save is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the tarrasque's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

fe6158d2-5930-56eb-a992-f3ed3f64db33.description: The tarrasque uses its Frightful Presence. It then makes one Bite attack, four Claw attacks, and one Spiked Tail attack, or it makes five Acid Spit attacks.

108189d4-65e7-5956-9ce9-2245c3f4f533.description: The tarrasque whips its spiked tail in a wide arc, flailing it in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 27 DEX save. On a failure, a creature takes 45 (10d8) piercing damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

9659f9e3-7bc8-506a-9793-5e6ba7ca8fd4.description: The thug employs unscrupulous tactics to hit its opponent in a vulnerable spot. One creature the thug can see within 5 feet of it must make a DC 12 DEX save. On a failure, the target takes 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.

9e61ad5b-27c5-5efc-a332-8ec2297640ba.description: The tiger makes one Bite attack and one Claws attack. If both attacks hit one creature, the target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save at the start of its next turn or lose 5 (2d4) HP, as the wound continues bleeding.

d8a62992-193f-5640-9392-25b544899f06.description: If the tiger moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claws attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone. 37b4d2dd-b956-5ff3-9c66-84504f2b7f40.name: Bite (Tiger, Saber-Toothed)
37b4d2dd-b956-5ff3-9c66-84504f2b7f40.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 9 (1d10+4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 DEX save or suffer a puncture wound. A creature suffering a puncture wound loses 5 (1d10) HP at the start of each of its turns as the wound bleeds excessively. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 WIS (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.

98721b77-d24a-5ea2-b739-0fe761c2f524.description: While the treant remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.

654a55d4-8c4d-5304-a47f-17774a05661f.name: Plant Resilience (Treant)
654a55d4-8c4d-5304-a47f-17774a05661f.description: The treant is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

attributes.description: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

558f4a6d-f328-5557-9586-34aa32635302.name: Speak with Plants
558f4a6d-f328-5557-9586-34aa32635302.description: The treant can communicate with Plants and nonmagical plants as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The treant can communicate with Plants and nonmagical plants as if they shared a language.

0ea33ef7-dbeb-58e9-9595-6347c214074f.name: Animate Trees
0ea33ef7-dbeb-58e9-9595-6347c214074f.description: The treant magically animates 2 trees or 2d6 shrubs it can see within 60 feet of it. The trees use the statistics of an **awakened tree**, and the shrubs use the statistics of an **awakened shrub**. The animated plants act as allies of the treant, obeying its spoken commands. The plants remain for 1 hour, until the treant dies, or until the treant dismisses them as a bonus action.

e6431bb1-c4bc-51c2-bb6f-74057bf78725.name: Halt Intruders
e6431bb1-c4bc-51c2-bb6f-74057bf78725.description: The treant calls to the roots beneath up to two creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 17 STR save or be restrained by roots until the end of its next turn. The treant can target only creatures in contact with the ground and can't target creatures in contact with a manufactured floor, such as the wooden floor of a building.

bc2c653a-7e56-57fa-95c0-c9b22f8ede5e.description: If the triceratops moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 STR save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the triceratops can make one Stomp attack against it as a bonus action.

485455f4-767e-50a0-9282-9617b8d57660.name: Warning Bugle
485455f4-767e-50a0-9282-9617b8d57660.description: The triceratops emits a piercing call in a 30-foot cone, signaling its impending attack. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 14 WIS save or be frightened until the end of its next turn. If the triceratops uses this bonus action before moving the requisite 20 feet for Trampling Charge, the target of its charge has disadvantage on this save, and the triceratops can make a Stomp attack against the prone target without needing to use a bonus action, provided the target fails the STR save from the charge.

efa0bb76-ed92-5884-aa4a-b9e77fc10364.description: The troll regains 10 HP at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 HP and doesn't regenerate.

94af1db5-9cb7-505a-bcee-7672b8bbfb19.description: Desperate for a meal as its injuries mount, the troll moves up to half its speed and makes one Bite attack against a creature it can see within range. The troll then regains HP equal to half the damage dealt.

3943e392-a100-5120-843a-7ec15203961f.name: Bite (Tyrannosaurus Rex)
3943e392-a100-5120-843a-7ec15203961f.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 31 (4d12+5) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the tyrannosaurus can't Bite another target.

91d3f658-b32c-5084-844d-dcae1c008b1d.name: Rending Shake
91d3f658-b32c-5084-844d-dcae1c008b1d.description: While grappling a creature, the tyrannosaurus shakes its head, tearing at the creature. The grappled creature must succeed on a DC 16 STR save or take 6 (1d12) slashing damage and be thrown up to 20 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If the thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 16 DEX save or take the same damage and be knocked prone.

150d3a9f-7e32-5c82-b063-9b1f922bcaf0.name: Sense the Unnatural
150d3a9f-7e32-5c82-b063-9b1f922bcaf0.description: The unicorn can pinpoint the location of Aberrations and Undead within 60 feet of it.

26bff3cc-e607-5cb3-aff9-01f2f2d4c3f9.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants (Unicorn)
26bff3cc-e607-5cb3-aff9-01f2f2d4c3f9.description: The unicorn can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

9e930bf5-6924-5341-a354-7cf482c53d27.name: Woodland Walk (Unicorn)
9e930bf5-6924-5341-a354-7cf482c53d27.description: Difficult terrain composed of nonmagical plants doesn't cost the unicorn extra movement. In addition, the unicorn can pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

53fc9809-a251-5013-a2aa-f7d7b73144a1.description: The unicorn moves up to half is speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

939a866e-dac5-552b-9942-01fd753b2538.name: Healing Touch (Unicorn)
939a866e-dac5-552b-9942-01fd753b2538.description: The unicorn touches another creature with its horn. The target magically regains 11 (2d8+2) HP and is freed from all curses, diseases, and poisons afflicting it.

e27d05c9-f08d-54d6-b2e7-045f09e7d985.description: The unicorn makes one Hooves attack and one Horn attack, or it makes two Horn Bolt attacks.

2e8ff88b-bde8-56f0-9e43-b550c576e5f0.name: Radiant Stomp
2e8ff88b-bde8-56f0-9e43-b550c576e5f0.description: The unicorn raises its hooves glowing with golden light and brings them down with a reverberating stomp. Each hostile creature within 10 feet of the unicorn must make a DC 14 STR save. On a failure, a creature takes 10 (3d6) radiant damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

5bd8b6b2-0a74-5c4b-80a2-8e26271a3b61.name: Shimmering Shield
5bd8b6b2-0a74-5c4b-80a2-8e26271a3b61.description: When a creature the unicorn can see within 30 feet of it, including the unicorn, is attacked, the unicorn can surround it with a shimmering shield of radiant light. The target adds 3 to its AC against the attack.

eaa41432-5ebe-5875-ace5-0f84fb64a285.name: Unicorn Magic
eaa41432-5ebe-5875-ace5-0f84fb64a285.description: The unicorn can cast the dancing lights and druidcraft cantrips at will, requiring no material components and using WIS as the spellcasting ability.

ddce30d1-f138-5194-abf7-e2cb10508d04.name: Demonic Resilience (Unska)
ddce30d1-f138-5194-abf7-e2cb10508d04.description: The unska is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

3ddeba94-aa61-5002-ab63-5e033d9b5bc8.name: Magic Resistance (Unska)
3ddeba94-aa61-5002-ab63-5e033d9b5bc8.description: The unska has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

60a36e4f-e6a6-55f2-bee3-0580af129edd.name: Claw (Unska)
60a36e4f-e6a6-55f2-bee3-0580af129edd.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (2d6+3) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned, the target has disadvantage on saves against the unska's Whirl of Ink. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

32a4288c-edfe-57c8-ab36-9c719fa07b5e.name: Ink Blast

9833cd7c-1871-5443-93d6-3e471d44c1b7.name: Multiattack (Unska)
9833cd7c-1871-5443-93d6-3e471d44c1b7.description: The unska makes two Claw attacks and one Tongue attack, or it makes three Ink Blast attacks.

238f146a-9fed-5699-8815-a9c4054e94f0.name: Tongue
238f146a-9fed-5699-8815-a9c4054e94f0.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 12 (2d8+3) piercing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 CON save, or its HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if its HP maximum is reduced to 0.

a1598cb2-95a7-508b-ad66-e9bcd8af75ab.name: Whirl of Ink
a1598cb2-95a7-508b-ad66-e9bcd8af75ab.description: Tattoos leap off the unska's body and latch onto a creature the unska can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 WIS save or be charmed, disoriented, or frightened (the unska's choice) until the end of its next turn. When a disoriented creature moves, it moves in a random direction.

When a disoriented creature moves, it moves in a random direction.

5c2ed599-fba5-51ed-a200-b20e9696b297.name: Hungry Dead Nature (Vampire)
5c2ed599-fba5-51ed-a200-b20e9696b297.description: The vampire doesn't require air or sleep. In addition, it must consume at least 80 ounces of blood (approximately half the blood in a Medium Humanoid's body) every 24 hours, or it loses its immunity to exhaustion and risks starvation until it does so. While it has any levels of exhaustion from starvation, the vampire can't remove levels of exhaustion until it consumes at least 160 ounces of blood.

6cbd1530-e2ae-5ea4-8402-020154424603.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day) (Vampire)
6cbd1530-e2ae-5ea4-8402-020154424603.description: If the vampire fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

attributes.description: If the vampire fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

75953859-3f4a-5081-ae1f-59ed23a2f46f.name: Misty Escape
75953859-3f4a-5081-ae1f-59ed23a2f46f.description: When it drops to 0 HP outside its resting place, the vampire transforms into a cloud of mist (as in the Mist Form bonus action) instead of falling unconscious, provided it isn't in sunlight or running water. If it can't transform, it is destroyed. While it has 0 HP in mist form, it can't revert to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it reverts to its vampire form. It is then paralyzed until it regains at least 1 HP. After spending 1 hour in its resting place with 0 HP, it regains 1 HP.

0972860a-64e0-5bb7-bbee-9a5e378c0e0b.name: Regeneration (Vampire)
0972860a-64e0-5bb7-bbee-9a5e378c0e0b.description: The vampire regains 20 HP at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.

attributes.description: The vampire regains 20 HP at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.

028dc012-a35c-5ec9-afce-1d08039990ee.name: Resting Place
028dc012-a35c-5ec9-afce-1d08039990ee.description: The vampire has a coffin, grave, sarcophagus, or similar location just large enough for it to lie down designated as its resting place. While in its resting place, the vampire doesn't suffer exhaustion levels from starvation and has keensense out to a range of 120 feet.

attributes.description: The vampire has a coffin, grave, sarcophagus, or similar location just large enough for it to lie down designated as its resting place. While in its resting place, the vampire doesn't suffer exhaustion levels from starvation and has keensense out to a range of 120 feet.

5cf807f0-cdcd-5687-9914-304a388fa3db.name: Spider Climb (Vampire)
5cf807f0-cdcd-5687-9914-304a388fa3db.description: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

539ee57d-9700-54b0-9e5f-f91af09bf6d9.name: Stake to the Heart
539ee57d-9700-54b0-9e5f-f91af09bf6d9.description: If a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire is incapacitated in its resting place, the vampire is paralyzed until the stake is removed.

attributes.description: If a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into the vampire's heart while the vampire is incapacitated in its resting place, the vampire is paralyzed until the stake is removed.

f8f3936c-7c54-5031-a74c-2c88394844d9.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
f8f3936c-7c54-5031-a74c-2c88394844d9.description: The vampire takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

attributes.description: The vampire takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

37f5b38e-6e77-5eab-b06d-5850f88f2e91.name: Vampire Weaknesses
37f5b38e-6e77-5eab-b06d-5850f88f2e91.description:
The vampire has the following flaws:
- **Forbiddance.** The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from one of the occupants.
- **Harmed by Running Water.** The vampire takes 20 acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

f6a9d931-8465-527b-9962-fc93dc70672d.description: The vampire is immune to exhaustion.

6db25aed-5b10-5d95-b9f7-b1e70b2bf802.name: Bite (Vampire)
6db25aed-5b10-5d95-b9f7-b1e70b2bf802.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6+4) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

e8b425a9-7897-5cc9-9047-eed53dc47443.name: Call Children
e8b425a9-7897-5cc9-9047-eed53dc47443.description: The vampire uses Children of the Night.

attributes.description: The vampire uses Children of the Night.

34ec8ca0-26e5-5a68-aaba-90c57b691d58.name: Call Children (Costs 2 Actions)
34ec8ca0-26e5-5a68-aaba-90c57b691d58.description: The vampire uses Children of the Night.

attributes.description: The vampire uses Children of the Night.

13a058d2-a738-5f5a-a063-2da76a6ebe55.name: Change Shape (Vampire)
13a058d2-a738-5f5a-a063-2da76a6ebe55.description: The vampire transforms into a Tiny bat, Tiny rat, Medium wolf, or back into its true form, which is Undead. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing transforms with it, but anything it is carrying doesn't transform with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing transforms with it, but anything it is carrying doesn't transform with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

8e8576c0-77c1-5688-ba89-f11a4da10782.name: Charm (Vampire)
8e8576c0-77c1-5688-ba89-f11a4da10782.description:
One Humanoid the vampire can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 17 WIS save or be magically charmed for 1 day, until the vampire dies, or until the vampire takes a bonus action to end the effect. The charmed target obeys the vampire's verbal commands and is a willing target for the vampire's Draining Bite attack. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.
The vampire can have up to two creatures charmed in this way at a time. If it charms a third, the effect on the first target ends.

If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.
The vampire can have up to two creatures charmed in this way at a time. If it charms a third, the effect on the first target ends.

8fdeb408-4670-5a38-b5ac-c9d30e94dbb1.name: Children of the Night
8fdeb408-4670-5a38-b5ac-c9d30e94dbb1.description: The vampire magically calls 2d4 **swarms of bats** or **rats**, provided that the sun isn't up. While outdoors, the vampire can call 3d6 **wolves** instead. The called creatures arrive in 1d4 rounds, acting as allies of the vampire and obeying its spoken commands. The Beasts remain for 1 hour, until the vampire dies, or until the vampire dismisses them as a bonus action. The vampire can have any number of such Beasts under its control at one time, provided the combined total CR of the Beasts is no higher than 4.

62b6cf25-f8f6-53b1-b21f-9c5850859fea.name: Claw (Vampire)
62b6cf25-f8f6-53b1-b21f-9c5850859fea.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6+4) slashing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage.

fcbfa561-1ac2-544e-8c2c-02bc1116b5c3.name: Draining Bite
fcbfa561-1ac2-544e-8c2c-02bc1116b5c3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the vampire, incapacitated, or restrained. _Hit:_ 9 (2d4+4) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) necrotic damage. The target's HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains HP equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0. A Humanoid slain in this way and then fed at least one drop of the vampire's blood rises the following night as a **vampire spawn** under the vampire's control.

8f14de30-1946-56a0-b598-ef9025003e0c.name: Excessive Bleeding
8f14de30-1946-56a0-b598-ef9025003e0c.description: Each creature within 15 feet of the vampire that doesn't have all its HP must succeed on a DC 17 CON save or lose 14 (4d6) HP as its wounds bleed profusely. Before the end of its next turn, the vampire has advantage on the next attack roll it makes against a creature that failed this save.

578340a5-1b71-50e6-aee2-8b6f9f312ed2.name: Excessive Bleeding (Costs 2 Actions)

4d942c0d-c22e-59f7-aa0f-81967e5ddab7.name: Mist Form
4d942c0d-c22e-59f7-aa0f-81967e5ddab7.description: The vampire transforms into a Medium cloud of mist or back into its true form, which is Undead. While in mist form, it can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless, has a flying speed of 20 feet, can hover, and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, if air can pass through a space, the mist can do so without squeezing, and it can't pass through water. It has advantage on STR, DEX, and CON saves, and it is immune to all nonmagical damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.

863c2661-afe5-5b28-8677-1a20a83954c4.name: Move (Vampire)
863c2661-afe5-5b28-8677-1a20a83954c4.description: The vampire moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The vampire moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

4f931387-b900-50b2-9772-f4c3d939bac9.name: Multiattack (Vampire)
4f931387-b900-50b2-9772-f4c3d939bac9.description: The vampire can use Charm. It then makes three Bite or Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a Draining Bite attack. If two Claw attacks hit one Large or smaller creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 17).

As the **vampire**.

73424e3a-abc9-560d-86f2-79b3a0ca4ce0.name: Regeneration (Vampire Spawn)
73424e3a-abc9-560d-86f2-79b3a0ca4ce0.description: The vampire spawn regains 10 HP at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.

9ef34d30-068b-5da6-b030-f3c7f90cb8eb.name: Call Blood
9ef34d30-068b-5da6-b030-f3c7f90cb8eb.description: The vampire calls to the blood within one injured creature it can see within 10 feet of it, causing blood to pour from the creature's wounds. If the target doesn't have all its HP, it must make a DC 14 CON save, losing 7 (2d6) HP on a failed save, or losing half as much HP on a successful one. Before the end of its next turn, the vampire has advantage on the next attack roll it makes against a creature that failed the save.

cb10d7d2-5245-5c14-accc-becd29466262.name: Claw (Vampire Spawn)
cb10d7d2-5245-5c14-accc-becd29466262.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 8 (2d4+3) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

085db3df-93cc-5ed9-a5a6-a519822f4ebb.name: Draining Bite (Vampire Spawn)
085db3df-93cc-5ed9-a5a6-a519822f4ebb.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the vampire, incapacitated, or restrained. _Hit:_ 8 (2d4+3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target's HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains HP equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.

a73a0130-3bad-5b09-81d3-27b185f6ba8e.name: Multiattack (Vampire Spawn)
a73a0130-3bad-5b09-81d3-27b185f6ba8e.description: The vampire spawn makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a Draining Bite attack. If both Claw attacks hit one Large or smaller creature, the target is grappled (escape DC 14).

395b4d8d-8a89-5f17-9446-784347a6bb07.name: Blood-Bound
395b4d8d-8a89-5f17-9446-784347a6bb07.description: If the thrall has not consumed 1 ounce of blood from a vampire within the past week, it is poisoned for 1 week, and it loses darkvision and its Limited Regeneration, Spider Climb, and Sunlight Sensitivity traits until it consumes 1 ounce of vampire blood.

18a795f2-3964-56f7-9873-7547102aeebf.name: Limited Regeneration
18a795f2-3964-56f7-9873-7547102aeebf.description: The thrall regains 2 HP at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 HP and isn't in sunlight. If the thrall takes radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the thrall's next turn.

c912e6e0-d457-5ee3-a85c-5e5e00d0f06a.name: Spider Climb (Vampire Thrall)
c912e6e0-d457-5ee3-a85c-5e5e00d0f06a.description: The thrall can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

8b946843-4faa-51f6-bb79-5850fb0dba73.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Vampire Thrall)
8b946843-4faa-51f6-bb79-5850fb0dba73.description: While in sunlight, the thrall has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 8 when perceiving by sight.

e22dfb57-6f94-56f9-b9b8-dc4d55546971.name: Multiattack (Vampire Thrall)
e22dfb57-6f94-56f9-b9b8-dc4d55546971.description: The vampire thrall makes two Rapier attacks.

bcc5c498-dc70-5691-bf5b-4395a9cfe298.name: Repay the Gift
bcc5c498-dc70-5691-bf5b-4395a9cfe298.description: When a friendly vampire the thrall can see within 5 feet of it is hit by an attack that would reduce the vampire to 0 HP, the thrall can give some of its life force to save the vampire. The thrall loses 10 (3d6) HP, and the vampire regains HP equal to that amount.

b6bc10bf-5b25-5e68-861a-dbe5641818dd.name: Pack Tactics (Velociraptor)
b6bc10bf-5b25-5e68-861a-dbe5641818dd.description: The velociraptor has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet of the target and the ally isn't incapacitated.

be9a0ef0-fecc-54fc-93f1-678e6dafcc50.name: Bite (Velociraptor)
be9a0ef0-fecc-54fc-93f1-678e6dafcc50.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 5 (1d6+2) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the velociraptor can't Bite another target.

a1331e62-c7a3-53a2-ba7c-5a037520b7d3.name: Maul
a1331e62-c7a3-53a2-ba7c-5a037520b7d3.description: The velociraptor uses its claws to rip into one creature it is grappling. The target must make a DC 12 STR save, taking 10 (4d4) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

24f5ad40-7872-56b0-967d-3236a66b3bf0.name: Longsword (Veteran)
24f5ad40-7872-56b0-967d-3236a66b3bf0.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10+3) slashing damage if used with two hands.

43394696-a9d6-5028-937c-faf9ff8057ce.name: Parry (Veteran)
43394696-a9d6-5028-937c-faf9ff8057ce.description: The veteran adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the veteran must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

9e405623-8b3b-54a5-96b4-7468cb510b6b.name: Shoulder
9e405623-8b3b-54a5-96b4-7468cb510b6b.description: The veteran shoves a creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 STR save or be knocked prone.

b0eed485-d3e7-50e9-9fab-9160b05ee5ba.name: False Appearance (Violet Fungus)
b0eed485-d3e7-50e9-9fab-9160b05ee5ba.description: While the violet fungus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

attributes.description: While the violet fungus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.

15c201c3-5f44-5d88-8e94-a3a326ef122a.name: Plant Resilience (Violet Fungus)
15c201c3-5f44-5d88-8e94-a3a326ef122a.description: The violet fungus is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

ec285311-09f9-5635-bfa9-ec0c7b445bf3.name: Necrotic Spores
ec285311-09f9-5635-bfa9-ec0c7b445bf3.description: The violet fungus sends out a burst of necrotic-laced spores, rapidly rotting nearby flesh. Each creature within 10 feet of the violet fungus that isn't a Construct must make a DC 10 CON save, taking 5 (2d4) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

a7f34f54-2f2e-5da0-9d6a-b621e5c0a5da.name: Rotting Touch
a7f34f54-2f2e-5da0-9d6a-b621e5c0a5da.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +2 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 5 (2d4) necrotic damage.

8bb5a24b-37f4-5a56-9d6f-6da6ec3f1a32.name: Versatile Artist
8bb5a24b-37f4-5a56-9d6f-6da6ec3f1a32.description: At the end of each long rest, the lich chooses one form of artistic expression, such as song, poetry, dance, fashion, paint, or similar. Until it finishes a long rest, the lich has immunity to one type of damage, which is associated with its artistic expression. For example, a lich expressing art through song or poetry has immunity to thunder damage, a lich expressing art through fashion has immunity to slashing damage, and a lich expressing art through paint has immunity to acid damage. This trait can't give the lich immunity to force, psychic, or radiant damage.

a39009cc-1f0f-516d-b638-0ec5d620e365.name: Artistic Flourish
a39009cc-1f0f-516d-b638-0ec5d620e365.description: _Melee or Ranged Spell Attack:_ +9 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 18 (3d8+5) damage of the type chosen with the Versatile Artist trait plus 9 (2d8) force damage.

The lich uses Call Muse.

c1067c62-eaad-5de9-9f67-20b17589266d.name: Corrupted Art
c1067c62-eaad-5de9-9f67-20b17589266d.description:
The lich hums a discordant melody, paints a crumbling symbol of death in the air, performs a reality-bending pirouette, or emulates some other expression of corrupted or twisted art and targets one creature it can see, other than itself, within 60 feet. This action's effects change, depending on if the target is Undead.
- **Non-Undead.** The target must make a DC 17 WIS save. On a failure, a creature is blinded, charmed, or deafened (the lich's choice) until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.
- **Undead.** The target regains 18 (4d8) HP. Healing that exceeds the target's HP maximum becomes temporary HP.

58587f91-393b-59bf-9999-48e3fc04f50b.name: Move (Virtuoso Lich)
58587f91-393b-59bf-9999-48e3fc04f50b.description: The lich moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

c3cc5727-6ae4-5469-a6be-eccbe4c9121a.name: Multiattack (Virtuoso Lich)
c3cc5727-6ae4-5469-a6be-eccbe4c9121a.description: The virtuoso lich uses Corrupted Art. It then makes three Artistic Flourish attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

7db438b5-87c7-54f5-8129-8477afd0cac0.name: Spellcasting (Virtuoso Lich)
7db438b5-87c7-54f5-8129-8477afd0cac0.description:
The lich casts one of the following spells, using CHA as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17).

- **At Will:** _disguise self_, _mage hand_, _message_, _prestidigitation_
- **3/Day Each:** _charm_, _hideous laughter_, _hold_, _invisibility_ (self only)
- **2/Day Each:** _dispel magic_, _fear_, _dimension door_
- **1/Day Each:** _irresistible dance_, _programmed illusion_, _seeming_

7031ee81-f6a9-5274-9403-28901e37c38f.description: The lich unleashes the full force of its artistic talents. Each creature with 15 feet of the lich must make a DC 17 DEX save. On a failure, a creature takes 9 (2d8) damage of the type chosen with the Versatile Artist trait and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

0e3e2acf-541c-59bf-b40f-593c77300e30.description: The vrock is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

3dc4d7b2-a937-5a15-a755-e63dc4428e25.description: The vrock has advantage on saves against spells and other magical effects.

770fbec2-4b16-5c15-8c23-106d3946e2bf.description: The vrock makes one Beak attack and two Talon attacks.

ed72b1de-b68c-59b9-b662-324fb0dc1c74.name: Startling Screech
ed72b1de-b68c-59b9-b662-324fb0dc1c74.description: The vrock emits a horrific screech at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or be able to take either an action or bonus action on its turn, not both, and it can't take reactions.

23fddfa7-2540-59be-9d33-59cea026e123.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 14 (2d10+3) slashing damage.

217985e9-eb4c-5039-a149-64b403250763.name: Wing Spores
217985e9-eb4c-5039-a149-64b403250763.description: The vrock shakes a cloud of toxic spores from its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of it must make a DC 15 CON save. On a failure, a creature takes 28 (8d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. While poisoned, a creature takes 3 (1d6) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. A poisoned creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Emptying a vial of holy water on the poisoned creature also ends the effect on it.

72ccfbb7-a515-54a1-ab5c-b8b3188d786c.name: False Appearance (War Horse Skeleton)
72ccfbb7-a515-54a1-ab5c-b8b3188d786c.description: While the war horse skeleton remains motionless and prone, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate war horse skeleton.

attributes.description: While the war horse skeleton remains motionless and prone, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate war horse skeleton.

77e724f1-2d0d-5e2f-9527-7f1fc9f14171.name: Counterattack (War Horse Skeleton)
77e724f1-2d0d-5e2f-9527-7f1fc9f14171.description: When a creature the war horse skeleton can see hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it, the skeleton can make one Hooves attack against the attacker.

8a157ac4-2500-55e9-a2e1-12f04299157b.name: Freeze
8a157ac4-2500-55e9-a2e1-12f04299157b.description: If the elemental takes cold damage, it partially freezes, and its speed is reduced by 20 feet until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: If the elemental takes cold damage, it partially freezes, and its speed is reduced by 20 feet until the end of its next turn.

db6537ff-96d5-52b3-9800-fd23a26774cb.name: Purify Water
db6537ff-96d5-52b3-9800-fd23a26774cb.description: If the water elemental sits in a body of slow-flowing or standing water, such as a spring, small creek, or lake, for at least 1 hour, the water becomes purified and rendered free of poison and disease. In slow-flowing water, this purification fades 1 hour after the elemental leaves the water. In standing water, this purification lasts until a contaminant enters the water while the elemental isn't in it.

d9ecf2c8-96c7-562a-a8b1-146211f6f643.name: Water Camouflage

d770f434-d903-5a4d-a307-96ddc57fa9c5.description: The water elemental makes two Water Tendril or Water Bolt attacks. If both Water Tendril attacks hit one creature, it can use Whelm on the target, if available.

78648b8c-3f30-53d1-8a67-daab16c64487.name: Purify Blood
78648b8c-3f30-53d1-8a67-daab16c64487.description: The water elemental touches a willing creature that isn't a Construct or Undead. The target is cured of the poisoned condition and of any disease afflicting it.

08949562-3026-5da3-ae9f-6577b1ae2116.name: Water Bolt
08949562-3026-5da3-ae9f-6577b1ae2116.description: _Ranged Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 16 (4d6+2) bludgeoning damage.

f2ebf960-7fed-5f7e-aae9-5f7b648e6048.name: Water Tendril
f2ebf960-7fed-5f7e-aae9-5f7b648e6048.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15) if it is Large or smaller. The water elemental can have up to three targets grappled at a time.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15) if it is Large or smaller. The water elemental can have up to three targets grappled at a time.

01f4e329-341c-53c2-9701-59ed6b2649b3.name: Whelm
01f4e329-341c-53c2-9701-59ed6b2649b3.description:
The water elemental envelops one creature it is grappling, and the grapple ends. While enveloped, the target is restrained, unable to breathe unless it can breathe water, can't be hit by the elemental's Water Tendril, and it takes 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the elemental's turns.
When the elemental moves, the enveloped creature moves with it. The elemental can have only one creature enveloped at a time. A creature within 5 feet of the elemental, including the target, can take its action to free the target from the elemental by succeeding on a DC 15 STR check.

80bd93c5-ee20-531a-8755-20e1c20a71b7.name: Bite (Weasel)
80bd93c5-ee20-531a-8755-20e1c20a71b7.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 3 (1d4+1) piercing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the weasel can steal one item the target is wearing or carrying, provided the item weighs no more than 5 pounds, can fit in one hand, isn't a weapon, and isn't wrapped around or firmly attached to the target. For example, a weasel could steal a hat or belt pouch but not a creature's shirt or armor.

The target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn. While poisoned, the creature can't move to a space within 5 feet of the weasel.

c572afbb-d6d4-5374-8ca7-f62d8a539fe5.name: Bleed Prey
c572afbb-d6d4-5374-8ca7-f62d8a539fe5.description: The weretiger chooses a creature it can see within 30 feet of it to be its prey until the prey dies, until the weretiger dies, or until the weretiger uses this bonus action on another creature. While within 60 feet of its prey, the weretiger can pinpoint its prey's location. In addition, if the weretiger hits the prey with at least two melee weapon attacks, the weretiger rends the prey's flesh, and the prey must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or lose 7 (2d6) HP at the start of its next turn, as the wound bleeds excessively.

a5b2c460-23d1-510d-b6a9-dd70c5223002.name: Change Shape (Werewolf)
a5b2c460-23d1-510d-b6a9-dd70c5223002.description: The werewolf transforms into a Medum or Large wolf, a Medium wolf-humanoid hybrid, or back into its true form, which is Humanoid. Its statistics, other than its size, speed, and AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

4a096c37-e9b0-522b-b75e-d705c5951145.name: Undead Resilience (Wight)
4a096c37-e9b0-522b-b75e-d705c5951145.description: The wight is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

attributes.description: The wight is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

2147048e-4491-52fd-b134-6a02cf8fe0a6.name: Command Horde
2147048e-4491-52fd-b134-6a02cf8fe0a6.description:
The wight commands up to five friendly skeletons or zombies to do one of the following:
- **Protect.** Until the start of the wight's next turn, each time a friendly creature within 5 feet of a target is attacked, the target can use its reaction to intercept the attack, becoming the target instead.
- **Overwhelm.** Until the start of the wight's next turn, each target has advantage on attack rolls against a creature on its turn if at least one other target is within 5 feet of the creature and the allied target isn't incapacitated.
- **Shamble.** Each target uses its reaction to move up to its speed in a direction chosen by the wight. If this movement provokes an opportunity attack, that attack is made with disadvantage.

attributes.description:
The wight commands up to five friendly skeletons or zombies to do one of the following:
- **Protect.** Until the start of the wight's next turn, each time a friendly creature within 5 feet of a target is attacked, the target can use its reaction to intercept the attack, becoming the target instead.
- **Overwhelm.** Until the start of the wight's next turn, each target has advantage on attack rolls against a creature on its turn if at least one other target is within 5 feet of the creature and the allied target isn't incapacitated.
- **Shamble.** Each target uses its reaction to move up to its speed in a direction chosen by the wight. If this movement provokes an opportunity attack, that attack is made with disadvantage.

48039aa6-029f-5594-89d9-9c203bd872a8.name: Life Drain (Wight)
48039aa6-029f-5594-89d9-9c203bd872a8.description:
Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 10 (2d6+3) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or its HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.
A Humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a zombie under the wight's control, unless the Humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The wight can have no more than twelve zombies under its control at one time.

The target must succeed on a DC 13 WIS save or use its reaction to move up to its speed toward the will-o'-wisp by the most direct route. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks or damaging terrain when moving.

5af3bece-6750-5983-8d10-443d2f85f4fb.name: Freezing Nose
5af3bece-6750-5983-8d10-443d2f85f4fb.description:
The winter wolf touches its nose to a creature it can see within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 13 CON save or one of the following parts of its body (the winter wolf's choice) is encased in ice for 1 minute. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If the target takes fire damage, it has advantage on the next save it makes to end the effect.
- **Body.** The target has disadvantage on CON saves and is vulnerable to the first instance of cold damage it takes each turn.
- **Head.** The target can't breathe or speak.
- **Lower Limb.** The target's speed is reduced to 0, and it has disadvantage on DEX checks and DEX saves.
- **Upper Limb.** The target has disadvantage on weapon attack rolls made with that limb.

d50549bb-c192-5c87-9378-dcf38a87da62.name: Monstrosity Resilience (Worg)
d50549bb-c192-5c87-9378-dcf38a87da62.description: The worg is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

attributes.description: The worg is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

6287a24a-0437-5f59-ad62-3da4d520ac3e.name: Bite (Worg)
6287a24a-0437-5f59-ad62-3da4d520ac3e.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (2d6+3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 STR save or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 10 (2d6+3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 STR save or be knocked prone.

924ab2a2-e0da-5011-8b88-563c883fa1e3.name: Loathsome Howl
924ab2a2-e0da-5011-8b88-563c883fa1e3.description: The worg unleashes an unnatural howl audible out to a distance of 300 feet. Each creature of the worg's choice within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 13 CHA save or be frightened of it for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Until it finishes a long rest, the worg can sense the direction but not the exact location of each creature that was frightened by Loathsome Howl.

4a6402fa-9aa6-55c2-9087-f7271d143bf4.name: Incorporeal Movement (Wraith)
4a6402fa-9aa6-55c2-9087-f7271d143bf4.description: The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

681f4caa-0b53-59a0-bb5e-0fce05a8d527.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Wraith)
681f4caa-0b53-59a0-bb5e-0fce05a8d527.description: While in sunlight, the wraith has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 7 when perceiving by sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the wraith has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is 7 when perceiving by sight.

de617cd1-1cd3-59c8-9829-fe565e6bf6e9.name: Undead Nature (Wraith)
de617cd1-1cd3-59c8-9829-fe565e6bf6e9.description: The wraith doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

attributes.description: The wraith doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

db6aa187-74eb-511e-880e-38ae7d989560.name: Undead Resilience (Wraith)
db6aa187-74eb-511e-880e-38ae7d989560.description: The wraith is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

attributes.description: The wraith is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

1493e437-b735-579a-860b-89c9aed3f347.name: Create Specter
1493e437-b735-579a-860b-89c9aed3f347.description: The wraith targets one Humanoid it can see within 10 feet of it that has been dead for no longer than 1 minute and died violently. The target's spirit rises as a **specter** in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The **specter** is under the wraith's control. The wraith can have no more than seven specters under its control at one time.

The target's spirit rises as a **specter** in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The **specter** is under the wraith's control. The wraith can have no more than seven specters under its control at one time.

1e7c3874-282e-5121-9f0c-cc0a9c6fcf93.name: Life Drain (Wraith)
1e7c3874-282e-5121-9f0c-cc0a9c6fcf93.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 18 (4d6+4) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or its HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.

3bf96bb1-a6ad-55c7-81e2-e875d377d369.name: Multiattack (Wraith)
3bf96bb1-a6ad-55c7-81e2-e875d377d369.description: The wraith makes two Life Drain attacks.

attributes.description: The wraith makes two Life Drain attacks.

6c4bca93-0dcf-507b-be62-496d051fb059.name: Trail of Death
6c4bca93-0dcf-507b-be62-496d051fb059.description: The wraith moves up to 30 feet in a straight line. This distance is not reduced by moving through creatures or objects, and this movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks. The first time it enters a creature's space during this move, that creature must succeed on a DC 15 DEX save or be afflicted with wasting doom. While afflicted with wasting doom, a creature takes 3 (1d6) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. Wasting doom ends if a creature starts its turn in sunlight or regains HP.

e58fd9b0-c915-50cb-be6e-1d18b32381ce.name: Unravel Life
e58fd9b0-c915-50cb-be6e-1d18b32381ce.description: When a creature the wraith can see within 30 feet of it and that isn't a Construct or Undead regains HP, the wraith can corrupt the healing energies, halving the amount of healing that creature receives.

attributes.description: When a creature the wraith can see within 30 feet of it and that isn't a Construct or Undead regains HP, the wraith can corrupt the healing energies, halving the amount of healing that creature receives.

3fdc9b9d-d6ab-5a76-8c10-f6a6e4ed110b.name: Intuition
3fdc9b9d-d6ab-5a76-8c10-f6a6e4ed110b.description: The wyrdling rolls two dice for initiative, taking the higher number. In addition, the wyrdling has advantage on WIS (Insight) checks.

attributes.description: The wyrdling rolls two dice for initiative, taking the higher number. In addition, the wyrdling has advantage on WIS (Insight) checks.

b22e6e27-26d6-53bf-be4b-953f5bd94516.name: Read Fate
b22e6e27-26d6-53bf-be4b-953f5bd94516.description: The wyrdling can spend 1 minute communing with fate on behalf of one creature that remains within 10 feet of it for the duration. The creature must ask a single question concerning a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. At the end of the minute, the wyrdling pronounces the result of the target's inquiry. This trait works like the divination spell, except it can't be used to answer a specific creature's question more than once every 3 days, regardless if the creature asks a different question.

16b5bd9d-1bdf-57b7-b35b-b519780c483f.name: Call on Fate
16b5bd9d-1bdf-57b7-b35b-b519780c483f.description: When the wyrdling is attacked by a creature it can see, it can pluck the strands of fate around the creature, imposing disadvantage on that attack roll. If the attack misses, the wyrdling or one friendly creature it can see within 30 feet of it has advantage on the next attack roll it makes against the attacker before the end of the wyrdling's next turn.

ce26e947-f0f7-5404-a038-c891118d1b88.name: Pronounce Fate
ce26e947-f0f7-5404-a038-c891118d1b88.description: The wyrdling pronounces the fate, either fortune or doom (the wyrdling's choice), of one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target rolls a d4 and adds (fortune) or subtracts (doom) the number rolled to the next attack roll or save it makes before the start of the wyrdling's next turn.

58f54298-2c21-5b98-9c5a-1fd3a77755f6.description: While not flying, the wyvern is vulnerable to the grappled, prone, and restrained conditions.

05d10c66-564e-5ec5-954d-c34a6820709f.description: When a creature moves into a space within 15 feet of the wyvern, it can whip its tail at the creature. The target must succeed on a DC 15 STR save or be knocked prone.

e6645e85-a9fd-55f7-88cf-ff874907e5ec.description: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. _Hit:_ 15 (2d10+4) piercing damage plus 18 (4d8) poison damage. 55c6eb6e-ff24-5ee4-ac87-ba04ead438e9.name: Earth Glide (Xorn)
55c6eb6e-ff24-5ee4-ac87-ba04ead438e9.description: The xorn can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the xorn doesn't disturb the material through which it moves.

78512237-9c9a-5df3-a01a-7d3d2e87d417.description: The xorn's Stealth is 18 while in rocky terrain.

ed2608d5-d282-55e6-8a4a-64fde6c55e1a.name: Treasure Sense
ed2608d5-d282-55e6-8a4a-64fde6c55e1a.description: The xorn can pinpoint, by scent, the location of precious metals and stones, such as coins and gems, within 60 feet of it.

73253386-af65-5d80-b0dc-2dc45d47bb9e.name: Bite (Xorn)

e55e0d34-84dc-59e9-bbb9-2f7dd259d0ac.description: The xorn makes one Bite attack and three Claw attacks, or it makes three Lob Stone attacks.

b96da4aa-ee33-551c-9f51-e15fdf89dbc4.name: Shard Belch
b96da4aa-ee33-551c-9f51-e15fdf89dbc4.description: The xorn belches a mixture of stomach gas and crystalline shards in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 14 DEX save or be coated in miniscule, crystalline shards until the end of its next turn. A creature coated in shards suffers bouts of pain each time it moves, reducing its speed by 10 feet and imposing disadvantage on all weapon attack rolls.

f6362199-552e-5280-981c-bef5c40fe221.name: Acidic Vapors (Young Black Dragon)
f6362199-552e-5280-981c-bef5c40fe221.description: After the black dragon uses its Acid Breath, acid clings to its mouth, throat, and nostrils for a time, evaporating as the dragon breathes. While the dragon's Acid Breath is unavailable, acidic vapors surround it, and each creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 15 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

914d8a14-033c-5200-a37a-fe2494ef672b.description: The dragon exhales acid in a 3-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 DEX save, taking 49 (11d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

400ac32f-8a9c-5d47-a2d8-88ce5380ddf3.name: Charged Hide (Young Blue Dragon)
400ac32f-8a9c-5d47-a2d8-88ce5380ddf3.description: When the blue dragon hasn't exhaled its Lightning Breath, the electric charge builds up across its body. While the dragon's Lightning Breath is available, it emits wild sparks of electricity, and each creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be incapacitated until the start of its next turn.

3369e451-ba75-5f0a-b1d5-003f36f6632a.name: Lightning Breath (Young Blue Dragon)
3369e451-ba75-5f0a-b1d5-003f36f6632a.description: The dragon exhales lightning in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 DEX save, taking 55 (10d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

39d7a610-775d-5432-9c49-b6e01f0e8813.name: Suffocating Heat (Young Brass Dragon)
39d7a610-775d-5432-9c49-b6e01f0e8813.description: After the brass dragon uses its Fire Breath, the air around it is devoid of moisture and lacking in breathable air. While the dragon's Fire Breath is unavailable, each creature that requires air to breathe, other than the dragon, and that starts its turn within 10 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or begin suffocating. A creature that fails this save for two consecutive rounds falls unconscious until it takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.

A creature that fails this save for two consecutive rounds falls unconscious until it takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.

fe42e9ff-a7c6-5668-8bec-6c868662ac6c.name: Change Shape (Young Brass Dragon)
fe42e9ff-a7c6-5668-8bec-6c868662ac6c.description: The dragon magically transforms into a Beast or Humanoid that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form, which is Dragon. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it or is borne by the new form (the dragon's choice). It reverts to its true form if it dies. In a new form, the dragon retains its HP, ability to speak, proficiencies, and INT, WIS, and CHA scores, as well as this bonus action. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.

9efacf49-f144-576a-b5a8-ef7d1a2d1786.name: Sleep Breath (Young Brass Dragon)
9efacf49-f144-576a-b5a8-ef7d1a2d1786.description: The dragon exhales sleep gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 14 CON save or fall unconscious for 1 minute. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or another creature uses an action to wake it.

326bb069-3e4b-5316-a0b6-910b2b7c73f9.name: Lightning Extraction (Young Bronze Dragon)
326bb069-3e4b-5316-a0b6-910b2b7c73f9.description: After the bronze dragon uses its Lightning Breath, its body begins recharging with lightning, pulling electricity from nearby creatures. While the dragon's Lightning Breath is unavailable, each creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the dragon must make a DC 15 CON save. On a failure, a creature can use either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both.

bb69bd12-1e21-5995-b14c-6e1dd1eb7693.name: Corrosive Scales (Young Copper Dragon)
bb69bd12-1e21-5995-b14c-6e1dd1eb7693.description: When the copper dragon hasn't spit its Acid Breath, the acid built up within the dragon causes the patina on its scales to spread to weapons that strike it. While the dragon's Acid Breath is available, any weapon made of metal that hits the dragon corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If a nonmagical weapon's penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Nonmagical ammunition made of metal that hits the dragon is destroyed after dealing damage. A magical weapon can't have a penalty greater than -5, and a magical weapon removes this penalty after 24 hours or after its attuned wielder finishes a long rest.
